Welcome to the first edition of Laura Reacts to the News, a new segment that will run twice a week here on _LOOMER UNLEASHED_.
This is where you will get my take on various national news stories each week. The plan is to run this every Monday and Friday. On Mondays, I will discuss stories that I believe aren't getting enough attention from the fake news mainstream media, and on Fridays, I will post more of a recap of stories that I believe either made up the news cycle for the week, or need further attention and exposure.

### **[MEET MATTHEW TYRMAND--The DeSantis-Loving, Ukraine War-Shilling Political Consultant Who Forced James O'Keefe From Project Veritas](https://substack.com/redirect/999c3ca1-1aef-4382-a9c3-1fa250867555?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
###### By Shane Trejo at _Big League Politics_
**Summary:** Matthew Tyrmand, a political consultant on the fringe of the America First movement, has gained a considerable amount of infamy for being the primary force pushing James O'Keefe out of Project Veritas.
**My Take:**
I have known Matthew Tyrmand for 10 years. I considered both Matthew Tyrmand and James O'Keefe to be close friends, given that I grew very close to both of them when I worked for Project Veritas for several years. James O'Keefe even wrote the foreword for my book. It's sad to see Matthew Tyrmand betray James O'Keefe by participating in the board coup at Project Veritas, the company that was founded by O'Keefe. According to their Twitter numbers, Project Veritas lost over 300,000 followers (and a lot of donation money) the same day this week that they pushed O'Keefe out, essentially stealing the company from underneath him. I thought the board members of Project Veritas were thick as thieves with O'Keefe... but, perhaps they are just thieves!
[Grant Cardone @GrantCardoneI am actively requesting all funds back from @Project_Veritas \- Execs of the Veritas coordinated a fund raising event with me & James O'Keefe on @TwitterSpaces, Jan 28th 2023, knowing they were ousting @JamesOKeefeIII This was deceptive charity campaign practices. Project... https://t.co/POrDLkZCFL](https://substack.com/redirect/63540dd8-316e-4da1-bb52-4cbf99e28c90?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[7:09 PM ∙ Feb 20, 2023

## **[Trump hands out 'Trump Water,' speaks to the 'forgotten' Americans in East Palestine: 'We stand with you'](https://substack.com/redirect/995c1ffd-a82b-47df-9a63-a0fdeadd939f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
###### By **Brandon Gillespie** **at** _**Fox News**_
**Summary:** Former President Donald Trump [visited East Palestine, Ohio](https://substack.com/redirect/3ee70757-0716-4a7b-b8b3-1257c63c4a04?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), on Wednesday, a community still grappling with the aftermath of a train derailment earlier this month that led to a large release of toxic chemicals.
During the visit, Trump highlighted Americans he said had been "forgotten" by the Biden administration following the disaster, and pledged to help the community hold those responsible for the damage accountable.
**My Take:**
My nickname for President Trump has always been "the common man's billionaire". In case you were on the fence about who to support as the GOP nominee in 2024, President Trump made it very clear during his visit to East Palestine why he's the *only* choice for 2024.
Too bad Joe Biden was too busy visiting Zelensky in Ukraine. Joe Biden has no problem sending $120 BILLION US Taxpayer dollars to Ukraine, but you won't see the same eagerness to send money to Americans in need.
Today it was reported that Joe Biden will not be visiting East Palestine. Something tells me the people in Ohio won't be missing him very much....
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/77d4c041-bddd-4780-9038-2baa358ca03e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

## **[Biden declares'Kyiv stands' in surprise visit to Ukraine](https://substack.com/redirect/591b05da-b4fa-456a-8bb3-487d23f1ad95?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
###### By Evan Vucci, John Leicester, Aamer Madhani and Zeke Miller at _The Associated Press_
**Summary:** President Joe Biden swept unannounced into Ukraine on Monday to meet with President Volodymyr Zelenskyy in a defiant display of Western solidarity with a country still fighting what he called "a brutal and unjust war" days before the first anniversary of Russia's invasion.
LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Yt-4FmGecOSluvMZhEqGE3G5tK7G3aF_jUflsM0TV6Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=104924346)
"One year later, Kyiv stands," Biden declared after meeting Zelenskyy at Mariinsky Palace. Jabbing his finger for emphasis on his podium, against a backdrop of three flags from each country, he continued: "And Ukraine stands. Democracy stands. The Americans stand with you, and the world stands with you."
**My Take:**
Wow! So much for a war zone! I guess things really aren't as bad in Ukraine as the media would like all of us to believe. Do you really think they would allow Joe Biden to take a stroll down the streets of Kyiv with Zelensky if Ukraine was a total war zone? More Kabuki theatre! Maybe Joe Biden had to stop by to collect his 10% for the "big guy"? We may never know.... just like Joe Biden's permanent state of mind.
## **[Laura Loomer fights changes to FL'resign to run' law that would benefit Ron DeSantis](https://substack.com/redirect/63aa3539-ca9d-49b0-ad0c-129a57494ff7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
###### By Jacob Ogles at _Florida Politics_
**Summary: Laura Loomer** doesn't want to make Gov. **Ron DeSantis '** decision to run for President easier.
The Lady Lake Republican wants Republican Party of Florida (RPOF) leaders to take up resolutions opposing **[changes](https://substack.com/redirect/cf22b23b-65ce-41b6-9f85-ebcd54e91c9c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to Florida's "resign to run" law. She said it's important the party take that stance as DeSantis considers a White House run less than halfway into his second term as Governor.
She's attending the Republican Party of Florida annual meeting in Orlando and handing out copies of a **[resolution](https://substack.com/redirect/67fbce81-47b9-4caf-b350-aeeb817241fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **on the matter. It calls out DeSantis by name and says his priority needs to be the state of Florida.
"Ron DeSantis is obligated to the electors of the State of Florida to serve the entire four years of his second term as he was elected to serve," the resolution states.
**My Take:**
This is why I call him Con DeSantis. The last time I checked, it was dictators and authoritarians who changed laws to only benefit themselves. The worst kept secret in Florida is that ConDeSantis is running for President against Donald Trump in the GOP primary. Why hasn't he filed yet? Well, it's because he needs the Florida legislature to change the Florida Resign to Run law so that he doesn't have to resign his seat as Governor when he files to run against Trump.
Perhaps his campaign slogan should be "Have cake, and eat it." But, let's be honest... Ron DeSantis doesn't need any more cake.
This weekend, DeSantis will be in Palm Beach, Florida at the Four Seasons Resort for a top secret, high-dollar donor retreat. His wife Jill, who goes by "Casey", is from Ohio. You would think they would stop by East Palestine to help people out, especially given that Ohio is a key state, but DeSantis is too busy selling his new book and [rubbing elbows with Tik Tok investors](https://substack.com/redirect/39755ae3-c5a5-4d13-bf52-4bad60c1947e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and neocon consultants.
"Let them eat cake". Right, Ron?
### **DOJ Investigates Alex Jones ' Cat in Bankruptcy Hearing**
######
[Erika Wulff Jones @WulffJonesExclusive: DOJ investigates Alex Jones's cat. Not Satire! ](https://substack.com/redirect/3a9695ab-7cd8-496d-98ed-b08d39595d17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[1:46 AM ∙ Feb 24, 2023

**My Take:**
I guess the cat is out of the bag! Not only does our broken justice system target conservative Americans and free speech activists in sham witch hunt trials, but they are now after your fluffy friends too! Speaking of judgements, the jihadis at CAIR have a [$124,000 judgemen](https://substack.com/redirect/a67a17cc-a31d-49ba-b706-7d6b96bb31d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)t against me after the same magistrate judge who ordered the raid on Mar a Lago ordered me to pay CAIR after I sued them in 2019 for lobbying Twitter to ban me. I have not paid the judgement, because I don't have the money. Why would I have the money? My livelihood has been decimated by Big Tech tyranny, political censorship, and debanking.
It's a good thing my Yorki Poo that I rescued from a Chinese meat market almost 2 years ago is named "Mecca". Something tells me the jihadis at CAIR won't want my dog... Inshallah!

## **[Bizarre Interviews With Anti-Trump Grand Jury Forewoman Raise Eyebrows](https://substack.com/redirect/6cbf1f95-57d9-4ecc-9d5f-981b244e6b6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
###### By Frankie Stockes at _National File_
**Summary:** Bizarre interviews with the forewoman of the anti-Trump Georgia grand jury that has apparently recommended charges against the 45th President for asking questions about the 2020 election are raising eyebrows. The forewoman joined CNN and MSNBC to giggle her way through a pair of interviews and talk about how "cool" it would have been for her to subpoena Trump and put him under oath.
Emily Kohrs, the Georgia grand jury's forewoman, or "foreperson" as CNN and MSNBC have dubbed her, giggled her way through a pair of bizarre interviews with the corporate media outlets after the politically-charged grand jury moved to recommend charges against President Trump.
**My Take:**
Is there something in the water in Georgia?

clean_body: Plus: Biden's DOJ Targets Alex Jones' Cat - Joy Behar to East Palestine Residents: You Got What You Deserved for Voting Trump! - Crazy GA Grand Jury Forewoman Tanks Case? | | ---|---|--- | | | or ? ? Plus: Biden's DOJ Targets Alex Jones' Cat - Joy Behar to East Palestine Residents: You Got What You Deserved for Voting Trump! - Crazy GA Grand Jury Forewoman Tanks Case? | | | Feb 25 | | | | | | | | | | ? | | | | ---|---|--- Welcome to the first edition of Laura Reacts to the News, a new segment that will run twice a week here on LOOMER UNLEASHED. This is where you will get my take on various national news stories each week. The plan is to run this every Monday and Friday. On Mondays, I will discuss stories that I believe aren't getting enough attention from the fake news mainstream media, and on Fridays, I will post more of a recap of stories that I believe either made up the news cycle for the week, or need further attention and exposure. Please consider upgrading your subscription here for $7 month to help me keep this publication up and running. While everything here is free at the moment, my controversial takes and groundbreaking journalism will begin requiring a minimal paid subscription, which supports my journalistic efforts and expenses associated with my investigations. If you don't want to miss any of my hard-hitting stories, please subscribe today! By Shane Trejo at Big League Politics Summary: Matthew Tyrmand, a political consultant on the fringe of the America First movement, has gained a considerable amount of infamy for being the primary force pushing James O'Keefe out of Project Veritas. My Take: I have known Matthew Tyrmand for 10 years. I considered both Matthew Tyrmand and James O'Keefe to be close friends, given that I grew very close to both of them when I worked for Project Veritas for several years. James O'Keefe even wrote the foreword for my book. It's sad to see Matthew Tyrmand betray James O'Keefe by participating in the board coup at Project Veritas, the company that was founded by O'Keefe. According to their Twitter numbers, Project Veritas lost over 300,000 followers (and a lot of donation money) the same day this week that they pushed O'Keefe out, essentially stealing the company from underneath him. I thought the board members of Project Veritas were thick as thieves with O'Keefe... but, perhaps they are just thieves! BONUS: 14 Courageous Project Veritas Whistleblowers Release POWERFUL VIDEO and LETTER in Support of James O'Keefe By Brandon Gillespie at Fox News Summary: Former President Donald Trump , on Wednesday, a community still grappling with the aftermath of a train derailment earlier this month that led to a large release of toxic chemicals. During the visit, Trump highlighted Americans he said had been "forgotten" by the Biden administration following the disaster, and pledged to help the community hold those responsible for the damage accountable. My Take: My nickname for President Trump has always been "the common man's billionaire". In case you were on the fence about who to support as the GOP nominee in 2024, President Trump made it very clear during his visit to East Palestine why he's the only choice for 2024. Too bad Joe Biden was too busy visiting Zelensky in Ukraine. Joe Biden has no problem sending $120 BILLION US Taxpayer dollars to Ukraine, but you won't see the same eagerness to send money to Americans in need. Today it was reported that Joe Biden will not be visiting East Palestine. Something tells me the people in Ohio won't be missing him very much.... | | ---|---|--- By Evan Vucci, John Leicester, Aamer Madhani and Zeke Miller at The Associated Press Summary: President Joe Biden swept unannounced into Ukraine on Monday to meet with President Volodymyr Zelenskyy in a defiant display of Western solidarity with a country still fighting what he called "a brutal and unjust war" days before the first anniversary of Russia's invasion. LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. "One year later, Kyiv stands," Biden declared after meeting Zelenskyy at Mariinsky Palace. Jabbing his finger for emphasis on his podium, against a backdrop of three flags from each country, he continued: "And Ukraine stands. Democracy stands. The Americans stand with you, and the world stands with you." My Take: Wow! So much for a war zone! I guess things really aren't as bad in Ukraine as the media would like all of us to believe. Do you really think they would allow Joe Biden to take a stroll down the streets of Kyiv with Zelensky if Ukraine was a total war zone? More Kabuki theatre! Maybe Joe Biden had to stop by to collect his 10% for the "big guy"? We may never know.... just like Joe Biden's permanent state of mind. By Jacob Ogles at Florida Politics Summary: Laura Loomer doesn't want to make Gov. Ron DeSantis ' decision to run for President easier. The Lady Lake Republican wants Republican Party of Florida (RPOF) leaders to take up resolutions opposing to Florida's "resign to run" law. She said it's important the party take that stance as DeSantis considers a White House run less than halfway into his second term as Governor. She's attending the Republican Party of Florida annual meeting in Orlando and handing out copies of a on the matter. It calls out DeSantis by name and says his priority needs to be the state of Florida. "Ron DeSantis is obligated to the electors of the State of Florida to serve the entire four years of his second term as he was elected to serve," the resolution states. My Take: This is why I call him Con DeSantis. The last time I checked, it was dictators and authoritarians who changed laws to only benefit themselves. The worst kept secret in Florida is that ConDeSantis is running for President against Donald Trump in the GOP primary. Why hasn't he filed yet? Well, it's because he needs the Florida legislature to change the Florida Resign to Run law so that he doesn't have to resign his seat as Governor when he files to run against Trump. Perhaps his campaign slogan should be "Have cake, and eat it." But, let's be honest... Ron DeSantis doesn't need any more cake. This weekend, DeSantis will be in Palm Beach, Florida at the Four Seasons Resort for a top secret, high-dollar donor retreat. His wife Jill, who goes by "Casey", is from Ohio. You would think they would stop by East Palestine to help people out, especially given that Ohio is a key state, but DeSantis is too busy selling his new book and and neocon consultants. "Let them eat cake". Right, Ron? DOJ Investigates Alex Jones ' Cat in Bankruptcy Hearing My Take: I guess the cat is out of the bag! Not only does our broken justice system target conservative Americans and free speech activists in sham witch hunt trials, but they are now after your fluffy friends too! Speaking of judgements, the jihadis at CAIR have a against me after the same magistrate judge who ordered the raid on Mar a Lago ordered me to pay CAIR after I sued them in 2019 for lobbying Twitter to ban me. I have not paid the judgement, because I don't have the money. Why would I have the money? My livelihood has been decimated by Big Tech tyranny, political censorship, and debanking. It's a good thing my Yorki Poo that I rescued from a Chinese meat market almost 2 years ago is named "Mecca". Something tells me the jihadis at CAIR won't want my dog... Inshallah! | | ---|---|--- By Nicholas Fondacaro at NewsBusters Summary: After hysterical Sara Haines falsely blamed Trump for the derailment (despite the fact that the final report hasn't been released), Behar shouted at the residents of East Palestine through the camera (pictured above) and blamed their voting history for the disaster in their town: I don't know why they would ever vote for him. For somebody who - By the way, he placed someone with deep ties to the chemical industry in charge of the EPA's chemical safety office. That's who you voted for, in that district. Donald Trump, who reduces all safety. He did, in those days My Take: I'll let the video and her disgusting remarks speak for itself since my take on Joy Behar is not family friendly! LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. By Frankie Stockes at National File Summary: Bizarre interviews with the forewoman of the anti-Trump Georgia grand jury that has apparently recommended charges against the 45th President for asking questions about the 2020 election are raising eyebrows. The forewoman joined CNN and MSNBC to giggle her way through a pair of interviews and talk about how "cool" it would have been for her to subpoena Trump and put him under oath. Emily Kohrs, the Georgia grand jury's forewoman, or "foreperson" as CNN and MSNBC have dubbed her, giggled her way through a pair of bizarre interviews with the corporate media outlets after the politically-charged grand jury moved to recommend charges against President Trump. My Take: Is there something in the water in Georgia? | | ---|---|--- If you enjoyed this article, please SUBSCRIBE to LOOMER UNLEASHED, where I will continue to piss off the elitist political establishment by speaking the TRUTH. It is free to sign up, but paid subscriptions help keep this publication and my investigative journalism alive, so please consider joining for a nominal fee! Thank you for your support! I truly appreciate it. You're currently a free subscriber to . disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59221133/393583131/665653053?refcode=fl_em_pt_20230224rail_gv_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmYyZTQzYy1hNGI0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jGfPBUR9-DTyPhjXNyzNZkZYUNWN0-llAwW3wpQ-lys=)
---
Friend, By now, you’ve probably heard or read about the **devastating train derailment in East Palestine, Ohio** , where more than ten cars carrying multiple hazardous chemicals spilled and burned, creating a black plume of smoke over the region. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59221134/393583132/1746624025?refcode=fl_em_pt_20230224rail_gv_90da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmYyZTQzYy1hNGI0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jGfPBUR9-DTyPhjXNyzNZkZYUNWN0-llAwW3wpQ-lys=&emci=0efcdb36-a4b4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=bff2e43c-a4b4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4482565)
_Photo Credit: Gene J. Puskar/AP_ It’s still unclear how much environmental and public health damage was done by this disaster, and we may not know for years to come. Unfortunately, train derailments are more common than you’d think, and here in New Mexico, one metric ton of chemical cargo travels across our state every year. **That’s why I wrote a letter to rail companies BNSF and Union Pacific demanding they work with the Department of Transportation to ensure nothing like this ever happens in New Mexico.** **[Read my full letter and add your name to join me in demanding the rail industry do everything in its power to protect our rail workers, communities, and environment →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59221135/393583133/1746624025?refcode=fl_em_pt_20230224rail_gv_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmYyZTQzYy1hNGI0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jGfPBUR9-DTyPhjXNyzNZkZYUNWN0-llAwW3wpQ-lys=&emci=0efcdb36-a4b4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=bff2e43c-a4b4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4482565)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59221136/393583134/1746624025?refcode=fl_em_pt_20230224rail_gv_90da_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmYyZTQzYy1hNGI0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jGfPBUR9-DTyPhjXNyzNZkZYUNWN0-llAwW3wpQ-lys=&emci=0efcdb36-a4b4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=bff2e43c-a4b4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4482565)
---
Rail plays a critical role in New Mexico’s economy, and it’s imperative that goods continue to move safely and efficiently across our state.
Thank you for speaking up with me,
Gabe

| Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and giving a voice to underserved communities in Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico.

Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and giving a voice to underserved communities in Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: I know messages like these can be pesky

|
#
Hi Peter, I hate to bother you on a Friday afternoon, but I need to share something with you: According to my team, we are behind on our February fundraising goal. That’s not so great news because while we’re falling behind, the Senate Republicans’ campaign arm just started their smear campaign against me. It’s only the beginning of what will be a long effort to lie about my record and mislead Wisconsin voters. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today with an important request. name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: One year on, the strength of the Ukrainian people remains remarkable and awe-inspiring
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59221217/393588822/-876189841?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGE0OWIxMC1hNmI0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Rp4rq3Gx6ywWWeHDdSSyLRR8dCALBOZQdOIR-hytQ4=&emci=6fcc831a-92b4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=b4a49b10-a6b4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=32654120)
---
Friend, today marks one year since Vladimir Putin's unprovoked and barbaric invasion of Ukraine.

In the last 12 months, the Ukrainian people have shown unbelievable courage and tenacity. They have weathered tragedy and hardship that I cannot even begin to imagine. **One year since Putin started this war, one thing remains clear: we must continue to support the Ukrainian people and stand strong for freedom and self-determination in the face of a tyrant.**

There have been many moments that tested our resolve in the past year. Through it all, I applaud President Biden for helping to maintain a powerful international alliance that has isolated Russia. And I am glad that Congress managed to consistently provide Ukraine with aid and resources.

But as the war winds on, and misinformation and propaganda may seep into certain information channels, we cannot waver. I promise you that I will continue to use my voice in Congress for the safety and security of the Ukrainian people — whether in their home country or as refugees. Their strength is our strength, and we must never forget that.

Thank you,

Jennifer
Paid for by Wexton for Congress
Wexton for Congress
PO Box 650550
Sterling, VA 20165
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/fiVGoHflEE-FgL2jy2tvRQ2?unsubscribedata=R%2BaQ0wnWxgXZOUnuljVZu3CRCP0B5EKMGqC8b81CpgIOaz7wwauyMFYTRAi2wta8e0BYv3yM3DdvzlXIZZJUI4oBfL4fcOEnx28KQYdikg8iprnT7rgQddMD3JMK1Qk5APzEiES81NDLFbXlWM2o1EDiJqjzX6%2BADIH3V71aKMXo3SlMMTeD5VoC4g4vPgoNLLR2eE4q16b%2FSBCb%2FWUQtrpW1kjwhmiTNj0uTcXM785Xa5iQBeiPCPDLscYhFFVfCFc93XnvYVvopZ%2BUTYmBFPlYroB%2BdKAiF%2BYx%2BJFuhklqcIYfqd5MnwtusYsbemIvxc%2FaTo0o%2Bq5bZDfr0bViXcMiRCv%2FHouTD7To62VYP3TG9Za7jVsLeb8PutPUvK0U4BBsaGEI9VpiSZCVi1JNnXSJZLW8JZyaNYVXzDbRTEPWYbBdVnKBy43H3UfFICUe).

body:
Our end-of-month goal is coming up. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59221742/393595914/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230224_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzM3NTQ5OC1hOGI0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YtdcphJTzhSwO333elGJMx6TuE5PG80Hs0rLr_Yao7A=&emci=85ab174d-a7b4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d3375498-a8b4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=252045)

[**I am going to ask you to pitch in toward my campaign’s end-of-month goal in just a minute.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59221743/393595915/-317064385?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230224_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzM3NTQ5OC1hOGI0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YtdcphJTzhSwO333elGJMx6TuE5PG80Hs0rLr_Yao7A=) First, I hope you’ll let me explain why your support matters so much. It’s thanks to the support of folks like you chipping in donations of $5, $10, and $25 at a time that we were able to win — and expand — our Democratic Senate Majority. Now, the bipartisan infrastructure law, the _Inflation Reduction Act,_ and the _CHIPS and Science Act_ are bringing jobs back home and building American manufacturing back better. Millions of people now have access to high-speed internet, we capped the cost of insulin at $35 for Medicare beneficiaries, and families who electrify their households are saving the planet and getting money back in their pockets for it. We’re also seeing the incredible results of securing a Democratic state legislature in New Mexico and electing leaders who are investing in a brighter future — from our children’s education to clean energy to creating the jobs of tomorrow. We aren’t just _talking_ about results — we’re _delivering_ results that workers and families are seeing change their lives for the better. 22 Democratic Senate seats out of 33 total are up for election next year — including mine in New Mexico — and we need to start building up our campaign infrastructure now to protect our majority and the wins that come with it. That starts with meeting each and every fundraising deadline. **That’s why I’m reaching out today. Can you chip in any amount toward my campaign’s end-of-month goal? Your support will help support me in the Senate, elect strong local leaders, and hold the Democratic Majority during a historically tough election cycle.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59221744/393595916/-317064385?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230224_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzM3NTQ5OC1hOGI0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YtdcphJTzhSwO333elGJMx6TuE5PG80Hs0rLr_Yao7A=)

clean_body: Our end-of-month goal is coming up. = First, I hope you’ll let me explain why your support matters so much. It’s thanks to the support of folks like you chipping in donations of $5, $10, and $25 at a time that we were able to win — and expand — our Democratic Senate Majority. Now, the bipartisan infrastructure law, the Inflation Reduction Act, and the CHIPS and Science Act are bringing jobs back home and building American manufacturing back better. Millions of people now have access to high-speed internet, we capped the cost of insulin at $35 for Medicare beneficiaries, and families who electrify their households are saving the planet and getting money back in their pockets for it. We’re also seeing the incredible results of securing a Democratic state legislature in New Mexico and electing leaders who are investing in a brighter future — from our children’s education to clean energy to creating the jobs of tomorrow. We aren’t just talking about results — we’re delivering results that workers and families are seeing change their lives for the better. 22 Democratic Senate seats out of 33 total are up for election next year — including mine in New Mexico — and we need to start building up our campaign infrastructure now to protect our majority and the wins that come with it. That starts with meeting each and every fundraising deadline. That’s why I’m reaching out today. Can you chip in any amount toward my campaign’s end-of-month goal? Your support will help support me in the Senate, elect strong local leaders, and hold the Democratic Majority during a historically tough election cycle. name: =?utf-8?Q?Andrew=20Roth?=
subject: Big Victory in Wyoming
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Friends,

_“It does not require a majority to prevail, but rather an irate, tireless minority keen to set brush fires in people’s minds.”_ \- Samuel Adams

* * *
Battles continue across the country in the states where we have a freedom caucus. The biggest LIE we continue to see in red states is that Democrats know they can't win with a "D" next to their name, so they run as Republicans and then vote like liberals. **They are deceiving Republican voters!** But our state freedom caucuses are exposing it, one roll call vote at a time. Check out what is currently happening in **Wyoming** and **South Carolina** :

**WYOMING**
* Despite being outnumbered, the **Wyoming Freedom Caucus** killed a bill that would provide subsidies to Hollywood. In a local press report, a supporter of the bill who would have financially benefited from it “believes the [Wyoming] Freedom Caucus orchestrated the demise of HB 92 and other bills that had majority overall support, but which they didn’t agree with.”

* The other bills the WYFC killed included Medicaid Expansion!

* To understand the headwinds that the **WY Freedom Caucus** face, the WY House has a 57-Republican to 5-Democrat majority. But that’s only on paper, when you look at the lawmakers’ actual [voting records](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=fceb663f87&e=64ecec6d03), Liberals have 36 members compared to just 26 Conservatives. To date, this is why Wyoming hasn’t been able to pass commonsense conservative issues like school choice, medical freedom, parental rights, a ban on porn in school, mandates against ESG, and even sensible budgeting. So it's a BIG deal when the WY Freedom Caucus is able to secure this victories.

**SOUTH CAROLINA**

* The **SC Freedom Caucus** continues to rack up grassroots support. The Lexington County GOP was first out of the gate, announcing their support for the SCFC and censuring the SC House GOP for kicking the freedom caucus members out of the Republican Caucus. Their crime was refusing to sign the so-called “loyalty pledge” that prevented members from exposing their more liberal colleagues when they undermined conservative principles. **Since the Lexington decision, two more counties have joined in censuring the SC House GOP – Anderson and Newberry.** We expect more counties to do the same.

* Related, the SC House recently debated an abortion bill where SCFC members offered pro-life amendments. One amendment would remove all exceptions to abortion from the bill (Amdt 6). Another amendment would increase penalties and punishment for doctors who perform an abortion (Amdt 9).

* Despite the SC House having a Republican supermajority, both amendments were defeated. If you live in **South Carolina, we encourage you to see how your representative voted by clicking here -[Amdt 6](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=9645c030b7&e=64ecec6d03) and [Amdt 9](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=c4b8bb197f&e=64ecec6d03).** Since both votes were to kill the amendments, a “N” vote is the correct vote. A “Y” vote is to kill the amendment.

---
| [CLICK HERE TO DONATE](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=62d5b447f4&e=64ecec6d03 "CLICK HERE TO DONATE")
---
| Please help us continue to support these brave members of the various state freedom caucuses. For just $10 a month, you can support the State Freedom Caucus Network as it works to fight big government and secure liberty at the state level. Click [here](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=c1959311e0&e=64ecec6d03) to set up your recurring monthly donation now. Even $25 or $50 will make a huge difference.

Keep fighting,

**Andy Roth**
**President**
**State Freedom Caucus Network**

P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation’s state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a [contribution here](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=f671f47675&e=64ecec6d03) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.
---
| [ ](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=0022b1139e&e=64ecec6d03)
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2023 State Freedom Caucus Network, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
State Freedom Caucus Network300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003-1021
[Add us to your address book](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1&e=64ecec6d03&c=f6dbe3e14c) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1&e=64ecec6d03&c=f6dbe3e14c).

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Massive Voter Roll Clean Up in LA!
body:
New Lawsuit on Big Tech Censorship!

[INSIDE JW]

LA COUNTY REMOVES 1.2 MILLION INELIGIBLE VOTERS IN JUDICIAL WATCH
LAWSUIT SETTLEMENT

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=28937&F=T&&hash=cb40faadc502c6fe03a1d845bea027d0a204a2b1466c2c5caaf23f6267349df2]
Good news for voters and elections in California. Los Angeles
County removed 1,207,613 ineligible voters from its rolls since last
year under the terms of a settlement agreement
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=28192&F=T&&hash=2fb2f3be3c5dd2f347c4a52ba8f25affac2f48654381bec0cf2c8b2d1f133656]
in a federal lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=28920&F=T&&hash=fca750e1fa40385a030d9a693ce43596adfa17018004323cf59dc19abfaaea75]
we filed in 2017 (_Judicial Watch, Inc., et al. v. Dean C. Logan, et
al._
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=4908&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnQtYXJjaGl2ZS9qdy12LWNhLW52cmEtY29tcGxhaW50LTA4OTQ4Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=3c89dfbdbf2c1e5d36b07781f18706557dbcacec707d4eb2d5dc93f0f7444233]
(No. 2:17-cv-08948)).

We sued on behalf of four lawfully registered voters in Los Angeles
County and the Election Integrity Project California, Inc., a public
interest group involved in monitoring California’s voter rolls.

Under the terms of the settlement agreement
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=14293&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnQtYXJjaGl2ZS90YWcvbG9nYW4tc2V0dGxlbWVudC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=b1bb24ec2281b6658f0ab39e6f305cf48f4b02dcbaab0e4b2a56a6e675610893],
Los Angeles County sent almost 1.6 million address confirmation
notices in 2019 to voters listed as “inactive” on its voter rolls.
Under the federal National Voter Registration Act (NVRA), voters who
do not respond to the notices and who do not vote in the following two
federal elections must be removed from the voter rolls. The settlement
also required an update to the state’s online NVRA manual to make it
clear that ineligible names must be removed and to notify each
California county that they are obliged to do this.

In the most recent of a series of progress reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=28921&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3RhZ3MvbGEtdm90ZXItcm9sbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=bba63d76a58161f3f2fed340a0c0ca31ea5e488beddc05a70e9aea6b11113337]
to us,
Los Angeles County confirmed that 1,207,613 ineligible and inactive
voters were recently removed from the rolls. Los Angeles County
confirmed last year that more than 634,000 of its inactive voters
hadn’t voted in at least 10 years.

We previously detailed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=17104&F=T&&hash=87afc3039e2249454c34f1420ab3eba5b97b2e204529a50e5872a624490a3fab]
that Los Angeles County had allowed more than 20% of its registered
voters to become inactive without removing them from the voter list.

This long overdue voter roll clean-up is a historic victory and means
California elections are less at risk for fraud. Building on this
success, we will continue our lawsuits and activism to clean up voter
rolls and to promote and protect cleaner elections.

We are a national leader in voting integrity and voting rights. We
have assembled a team of highly experienced voting rights attorneys
who have stopped discriminatory elections in Hawaii, and cleaned up
voter rolls in California, Ohio, Indiana, and Kentucky, among other
achievements
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=21208&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGFnL252cmEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=6895639061ab0e9dd273a0f81e79d0c7c0d5d5fea1149f126ef741e00ac8c21d].

We recently settled
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=28646&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctYW5kLW55Yy1zZXR0bGUtbGF3c3VpdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=f85eb002f4b9dfa8334e25686194139c3301a613cd8d8d197cbaf3272fc1aa08]
a federal
election integrity lawsuit against New York City after the city
removed 441,083 ineligible names from the voter rolls and promised to
take reasonable steps going forward to clean its voter registration
lists.

Kentucky
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=17111&F=T&&hash=2deb84c5ddb4737f5fce328f8ebe60aacee9ea8f78b1ca64e47172b9aebff839]
also removed hundreds of thousands of old registrations after it
entered into a consent decree to end another Judicial Watch lawsuit.

In February 2022, we settled
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=26811&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbm9ydGgtY2Fyb2xpbmEtdm90ZXItcm9sbHMtbGF3c3VpdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=a6af463059e34cb9cf1f49fe6b1177525959492193949148e1cd6c3aab20065b]
a
voter roll clean-up lawsuit against North Carolina and two of its
counties after North Carolina removed over 430,000 inactive
registrations from its voter rolls.

In March 2022, a Maryland court ruled in favor
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=27012&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtdmljdG9yeS1jb3VydC1ydWxlcy1hZ2FpbnN0LWdlcnJ5bWFuZGVyLWluLW1hcnlsYW5kLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=e0e8b4f9a8733eca65c684d7935978c6c8245938c407e865d000a056917b7bbf]
of our challenge to the Democratic state legislature’s “extreme”
congressional gerrymander.

In May 2022, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=27407&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbGF3c3VpdC1hZ2FpbnN0LWlsbGlub2lzLXRvLXN0b3AtY291bnRpbmctb2YtYmFsbG90cy1hZnRlci1lbGVjdGlvbi1kYXkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=1b8b2e7ef9a18e3f797a44d49d3fad7b007089973d519a020f4f559472dd9712]
Illinois on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two other registered
Illinois voters to stop state election officials from extending
Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law.

Robert Popper, Judicial Watch senior attorney, leads our election law
program. Popper was previously in the Voting Section of the Civil
Rights Division of the Justice Department, where he managed voting
rights investigations, litigations, consent decrees, and settlements
in dozens of states.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES DHS FOR RECORDS ON ELECTION CENSORSHIP

We’re back in court in our continuing quest to unearth the federal
government’s election-related censorship. The more we learn, the
more concerning it becomes.

We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S.
Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for records of communication
related to the work of the Election Integrity Partnership
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=28922&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZWlwYXJ0bmVyc2hpcC5uZXQvYmxvZy9hYm91dC1laXAtMjAyMj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=ac1821ca1cfb6b17e82c422fc637a752e60f90d068adaed4f543757e71265531]
(EIP) that could
detail coordinated censorship activities (_Judicial Watch, Inc. v.
U.S. Department of Homeland Security_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=28923&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWF0bGFzc2lhbi1qaXJhLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMDM4NC9dXz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=ee9b9432ddb4f43bd1d92ed912525ea0ac1fa4012c664b7ef7dc8c3552e3efec
_(No. 1:23-cv-00384)).

We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after
the Cybersecurity and Information Security Agency (CISA), a component
of the Department of Homeland Security, failed to comply with an
October 27, 2022, FOIA request for:
1. All emails, direct messages, task management alerts, or other
records of communication related to the work of the Election Integrity
Partnership sent via the Atlassian Jira platform between any official
or employee of the Cybersecurity and Information Security Agency and
any member, officer, employee, or representative of any of the
following:

* The Election Integrity Partnership
* The University of Washington’s Center for an Informed Public
* Stanford University’s Internet Observatory
* The Center for Internet Security
* The Elections Infrastructure Information Sharing & Analysis Center
* The National Association of Secretaries of State
* The National Association of State Election Directors
* Graphika
* The Atlantic Council’s Digital Forensics Research Laboratory
* Any social media company

2. All memoranda of understanding, guidelines, or similar records
related to the Cybersecurity and Information Security Agency’s use
of the Atlassian Jira platform for work related to the Election
Integrity Partnership.
Based on representations from the Election Integrity Partnership
(see here
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=28924&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj10YUJtTVd2NGswUSZ0PTFzJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=22d541d6cf7bcc05ab7148cb2a54f0c45546c9d7f07057c8fa0abee219e04178]
and here
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=28925&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj11S2thWkktRWlpUSZ0PTc3NnMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=7b044f759b44b26162296ebf4e5ce7cd785144e1e7515d778c2438e33a0cf75a]),
the federal
government, social media companies, the EIP, the Center for Internet
Security
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=28926&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVjaHRhcmdldC5jb20vc2VhcmNoc2VjdXJpdHkvZGVmaW5pdGlvbi9DZW50ZXItZm9yLUludGVybmV0LVNlY3VyaXR5LUNJUz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=18c5c95b7035a8047543c749ccc8a1280c34dcde8dd795e88f67ffc89ade5343]
(a non-profit organization funded partly by DHS and the Defense
Department
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=28927&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5mbHVlbmNld2F0Y2gub3JnL25vbi1wcm9maXQvY2VudGVyLWZvci1pbnRlcm5ldC1zZWN1cml0eS8jbm90ZS0xP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=df6491281bda4331e925ffe6b51c20226eb42fb25195bfb6ab911ff1704c348e])
and numerous other leftist groups communicated privately via the
Atlassian
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=28928&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYXRsYXNzaWFuLmNvbS9nb3Zlcm5tZW50P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=b7878fd3c7e15b15340baee9da67475b67c2dfd482a3fe9618c68f48b40e9cc3]
software platform
called Jira
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=28929&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYXRsYXNzaWFuLmNvbS9zb2Z0d2FyZS9qaXJhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=f3ea82f400d0fbdc3a011d408b4d4727cdc69db4331aacf7d44c48f0f59b8b49].

In a February 8, 2023, hearing by the House Oversight Committee, Rep.
Anna Paulina Luna (R-FL) revealed information
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=28930&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90ZWNocG9saWN5LnByZXNzL3RyYW5zY3JpcHQtaG91c2Utb3ZlcnNpZ2h0LWhlYXJpbmctd2l0aC1mb3JtZXItdHdpdHRlci1leGVjdXRpdmVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=680135a79c130440eef79fa39d19698afc51c9055b6d706ccb126e6a85746bcb]
about federal agencies, social media companies, nonprofits and other
organizations communicating “their version of misinformation using
Jira.” Luna pointed out to Yoel Roth
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=28931&F=T&&hash=fcb1c7e148d14c4537aad1a1fdad76e1cd637e16969ca4cf47d0c61f6cc6f3cb],
then-Twitter’s head of trust and safety who helped suppress the
Hunter Biden laptop story:

> On this chart, I want to annotate that the Department of Homeland
> Security, which has a following branches, cybersecurity and
> infrastructure security agency, also known as CISA Countering
> Foreign Intelligence Task Force ... [were] used against the American
> people. The Election Partnership Institute or Election Integrity
> Partnership, EIP, which includes the following, Stanford Internet
> Observatory, University of Washington Center for Informed Public,
> Graphika and Atlantic Council’s Digital Forensic Research Lab. And
> potentially according to what we found on the final report by EIP,
> the DNC, the Center for Internet Security, CISA- a nonprofit funded
> by DHS, the National Association of Secretaries of State, also known
> as NASS and the National Association of State Election Directors,
> NASED.

> And in this case, because there are other social media companies
> involved, Twitter, what do all of these groups though, have in
> common? And I’m going to refresh your memory. They were all
> communicating on a private cloud server known as Jira. Now, the
> screenshot behind screenshot behind me, which is an example of one
> of thousands shows on November 3rd, 2020, that you, Mr. Roth, a
> Twitter employee, were exchanging communications on Jira, a private
> cloud server with CISA, NASS, NASED, and Alex Stamos, who now works
> at Stanford and is a former security of security officer at Facebook
> to remove a posting. Do you now remember communicating on a private
> cloud server to remove a posting? Yes or no?

***

> Well, I’m going to tell you right now that you did and we have
> proof of it.
The Elon Musk ‘Twitter Files’ are the tip of the iceberg, as the
federal government ran a massive, secret censorship op against the
American people. That the DHS is hiding these censorship records in
violation of FOIA law shows the agency still has something to hide.

We have been quite active in exposing unlawful election interference.

We are suing
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=28502&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGhzLWNlbnNvcnNoaXAtcmVxdWVzdHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=6de7cd770c319985aec4b4e64cf7080991aeff206eea30e1bc622dace3e0063e]
the DHS for all records of communications between the CISA and the
EIP, which was reportedly
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=28510&F=T&&hash=ce554eb88a26816a9cbd8e4b7b7a836633946b9989770709f619558d98b88eaf]
active during the 2022 midterm elections. Among the news outlets
flagged by EIP were websites for _Just the News_, _New York Post_,
_Fox News_, _Washington Examiner_, _The Washington Times_, _The Epoch
Times_ and _Breitbart._

We recently sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=28761&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLWxhcHRvcC1zdG9yeS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=12e49544581f463d7e44109397bf10acf5ba7eb60189da5176c4480aaf658b93]
the DOJ for
records of communications between the Federal Bureau of Investigation
(FBI) and social media sites regarding foreign influence in elections,
as well as the Hunter Biden laptop story.

In September 2022, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=28208&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtc3Vlcy1jYS1zZWNzdGF0ZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=6fa3975c85a4012821379a48ab42de01329defb81b41cc8b4afaae659b6bea6f]
the
Secretary of State of the State of California for having YouTube
censor a Judicial Watch election integrity video.

In May 2022, YouTube censored a Judicial Watch video about Biden
corruption and election integrity issues in the 2020 election. The
video
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=27333&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ydW1ibGUuY29tL3Z6N2FvZi1maXR0b24taW1wZWFjaC1iaWRlbi1jb3JydXB0aW9uLXRocmVhdGVucy1uYXRpb25hbC1zZWN1cml0eS5odG1sP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=30a0835386ca3e06fb33485591536b2d8adcc09296acf26b2386fda2ea28c157],
titled “Impeach? Biden Corruption Threatens National Security,”
was falsely determined to be “election misinformation” and removed

on its Rumble channel
(https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=27333&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ydW1ibGUuY29tL3Z6N2FvZi1maXR0b24taW1wZWFjaC1iaWRlbi1jb3JydXB0aW9uLXRocmVhdGVucy1uYXRpb25hbC1zZWN1cml0eS5odG1sP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=30a0835386ca3e06fb33485591536b2d8adcc09296acf26b2386fda2ea28c157).

In April 2021, we published
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=28194&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2Etc3RhdGUtb2ZmaWNpYWxzLWJpZy10ZWNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=dcba214496d3ef40d0cc4016be30bee78308d522f87dfe183db13910dd9ceb3d]

In May 2021, we revealed

In July 2021, we uncovered

from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), which

BIDEN ISSUES SECOND ORDER TO ‘FURTHER’ ADVANCE GOVERNMENTWIDE
RACIAL EQUITY

The Left’s use of the word “equity,” meaning equal outcomes for
different groups, is reminiscent of Karl Marx’s “From each
according to his ability, to each according to his needs.” And
Marxist “equity” is the official policy of the Biden
administration, as our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=28916&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4taXNzdWVzLXNlY29uZC1leGVjdXRpdmUtb3JkZXIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=262efd4f4d6c8b9d56c79b1b477a90777d17975c4aadb4bfa27e0a18c4ae6e9d].

> Although the U.S. has already implemented a governmentwide plan to
> advance racial equity and support underserved communities under a
> 2021 Biden executive order
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=27254&F=T&&hash=09eea1ff59f712d6becdff4834520b1419637c8e799f25024e6f3ba157ae1a74],
> the president has issued a second directive
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=28938&F=T&&hash=285129c1ac21a604c9df40ccc70576d161146a02c0f5dd863de72b530dc5b5f2]
> to strong arm federal agencies into launching more initiatives that
> will further tax Americans. Under the recently issued mandate
> government agencies have 30 days to establish an “Agency Equity
> Team” and conduct proactive engagement with members of underserved
> communities through culturally and linguistically appropriate
> listening sessions. Biden is also creating a White House Steering
> Committee on Equity composed of senior officials who will coordinate
> the government’s sweeping efforts to promote his leftist agenda.
>
> “By advancing equity, the Federal Government can support and
> empower all Americans, including the many communities in America
> that have been underserved, discriminated against, and adversely
> affected by persistent poverty and inequality,” Biden writes in
> the new document, adding that “equitability” will rebuild trust
> in government. “This order builds upon my previous equity-related
> Executive Orders by extending and strengthening equity-advancing
> requirements for agencies, and it positions agencies to deliver
> better outcomes for the American people,” according to the
> president. As examples the commander-in-chief offers building a
> strong, fair, and inclusive workforce and economy, investing in
> communities where federal policies have historically impeded equal
> opportunity, mitigating economic displacement, rooting out
> discrimination in the housing market, advancing equity in health,
> environmental justice and ending “unjust disparities” in the
> nation’s criminal justice system.
>
> Additionally, the director of the White House Office of Management
> and Budget (OMB) will update directives to “support equitable
> decision-making, promote equitable deployment of financial and
> technical assistance, and assist agencies in advancing equity, as
> appropriate and wherever possible,” the new executive order says.
> This is important because OMB plays a pivotal role in government by
> developing and executing the federal budget, overseeing federal
> agencies and executive branch operations, and coordinating all
> significant federal regulations. The new order also includes a
> blueprint to make equity part of the official federal budget process
> and specifically prevent discrimination based on gender identity and
> sexual orientation. “My Administration has embedded a focus on
> equity into the fabric of Federal policymaking and service
> delivery,” Biden writes, bragging that his presidency is the most
> diverse in our nation’s history.
>
> This month’s executive order is part of a robust movement by the
> administration to incorporate racial equity across all federal
> agencies. The president launched the plan on his first day in office
> with the lengthy executive order to advance racial equity and
> support for underserved communities through the government. The 2021
> document claims that “entrenched disparities” in laws, public
> policies, and private institutions have denied equal opportunity to
> individuals and communities and that the health and climate crises
> have exposed inequities while a “historic movement for justice has
> highlighted the unbearable human costs of systemic racism.”
> Therefore, the original order states, the federal government should
> pursue a “comprehensive approach to advancing equity for all,
> including people of color and others who have been historically
> underserved, marginalized, and adversely affected by persistent
> poverty and inequality.” It further says that “by advancing
> equity across the Federal Government, we can create opportunities
> for the improvement of communities that have been historically
> underserved, which benefits everyone.”
>
> Many key federal agencies have taken major steps to implement racial
> equity plans as per Biden’s first mandate. The Department of
> Justice (DOJ) has formulated a strategy to “advance equity for
> marginalized and underserved communities
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62340&L=28939&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9qLWlzc3Vlcy1qdXN0aWNlLWVxdWl0eS1wbGFuL13igJ0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=79ae83c41a38c55cb08a84e8447d691a95153360d1c4745d4516ec7ec4422389
> that, among other things, directs federal prosecutors to ignore
> maximum sentencing under the law to “avoid unwarranted
> disparities.” The Department of Labor has dedicated $260 million
> to promote “equitable access” to government unemployment
> benefits by addressing disparities in the administration and
> delivery of money by race ethnicity and language proficiency. The
> Treasury Department named its first ever racial equity chief, a
> veteran La Raza official who spent a decade at the nation’s most
> influential open borders group. The Department of Defense (DOD) is
> using outrageous anti-bias materials that indoctrinate troops with
> anti-American and racially inflammatory training on diversity
> topics. The U. S. Department of Agriculture (USDA) created an equity
> commission to address longstanding inequities in agriculture. The
> nation’s medical research agency has a special minority health and
> health disparities division that issued a study declaring COVID-19
> exacerbated preexisting resentment against racial/ethnic minorities
> and marginalized communities.
>
Until next week ...

clean_body: New Lawsuit on Big Tech Censorship! [INSIDE JW] LA COUNTY REMOVES 1.2 MILLION INELIGIBLE VOTERS IN JUDICIAL WATCH LAWSUIT SETTLEMENT [] Good news for voters and elections in California. Los Angeles County removed 1,207,613 ineligible voters from its rolls since last year under the terms of a settlement agreement [] in a federal lawsuit [] we filed in 2017 (Judicial Watch, Inc., et al. v. Dean C. Logan, et al. [] (No. 2:17-cv-08948)). We sued on behalf of four lawfully registered voters in Los Angeles County and the Election Integrity Project California, Inc., a public interest group involved in monitoring California’s voter rolls. Under the terms of the settlement agreement [], Los Angeles County sent almost 1.6 million address confirmation notices in 2019 to voters listed as “inactive” on its voter rolls. Under the federal National Voter Registration Act (NVRA), voters who do not respond to the notices and who do not vote in the following two federal elections must be removed from the voter rolls. The settlement also required an update to the state’s online NVRA manual to make it clear that ineligible names must be removed and to notify each California county that they are obliged to do this. In the most recent of a series of progress reports [] to us, Los Angeles County confirmed that 1,207,613 ineligible and inactive voters were recently removed from the rolls. Los Angeles County confirmed last year that more than 634,000 of its inactive voters hadn’t voted in at least 10 years. We previously detailed [] that Los Angeles County had allowed more than 20% of its registered voters to become inactive without removing them from the voter list. This long overdue voter roll clean-up is a historic victory and means California elections are less at risk for fraud. Building on this success, we will continue our lawsuits and activism to clean up voter rolls and to promote and protect cleaner elections. We are a national leader in voting integrity and voting rights. We have assembled a team of highly experienced voting rights attorneys who have stopped discriminatory elections in Hawaii, and cleaned up voter rolls in California, Ohio, Indiana, and Kentucky, among other achievements []. We recently settled [] a federal election integrity lawsuit against New York City after the city removed 441,083 ineligible names from the voter rolls and promised to take reasonable steps going forward to clean its voter registration lists. Kentucky [] also removed hundreds of thousands of old registrations after it entered into a consent decree to end another Judicial Watch lawsuit. In February 2022, we settled [] a voter roll clean-up lawsuit against North Carolina and two of its counties after North Carolina removed over 430,000 inactive registrations from its voter rolls. In March 2022, a Maryland court ruled in favor [] of our challenge to the Democratic state legislature’s “extreme” congressional gerrymander. In May 2022, we sued [] Illinois on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two other registered Illinois voters to stop state election officials from extending Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law. Robert Popper, Judicial Watch senior attorney, leads our election law program. Popper was previously in the Voting Section of the Civil Rights Division of the Justice Department, where he managed voting rights investigations, litigations, consent decrees, and settlements in dozens of states. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES DHS FOR RECORDS ON ELECTION CENSORSHIP We’re back in court in our continuing quest to unearth the federal government’s election-related censorship. The more we learn, the more concerning it becomes. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for records of communication related to the work of the Election Integrity Partnership [] (EIP) that could detail coordinated censorship activities (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security [ (No. 1:23-cv-00384)). We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the Cybersecurity and Information Security Agency (CISA), a component of the Department of Homeland Security, failed to comply with an October 27, 2022, FOIA request for: 1. All emails, direct messages, task management alerts, or other records of communication related to the work of the Election Integrity Partnership sent via the Atlassian Jira platform between any official or employee of the Cybersecurity and Information Security Agency and any member, officer, employee, or representative of any of the following: The Election Integrity Partnership The University of Washington’s Center for an Informed Public Stanford University’s Internet Observatory The Center for Internet Security The Elections Infrastructure Information Sharing & Analysis Center The National Association of Secretaries of State The National Association of State Election Directors Graphika The Atlantic Council’s Digital Forensics Research Laboratory Any social media company 2. All memoranda of understanding, guidelines, or similar records related to the Cybersecurity and Information Security Agency’s use of the Atlassian Jira platform for work related to the Election Integrity Partnership. Based on representations from the Election Integrity Partnership (see here [] and here []), the federal government, social media companies, the EIP, the Center for Internet Security [] (a non-profit organization funded partly by DHS and the Defense Department []) and numerous other leftist groups communicated privately via the Atlassian [] software platform called Jira []. In a February 8, 2023, hearing by the House Oversight Committee, Rep. Anna Paulina Luna (R-FL) revealed information [] about federal agencies, social media companies, nonprofits and other organizations communicating “their version of misinformation using Jira.” Luna pointed out to Yoel Roth [], then-Twitter’s head of trust and safety who helped suppress the Hunter Biden laptop story: On this chart, I want to annotate that the Department of Homeland Security, which has a following branches, cybersecurity and infrastructure security agency, also known as CISA Countering Foreign Intelligence Task Force ... [were] used against the American people. The Election Partnership Institute or Election Integrity Partnership, EIP, which includes the following, Stanford Internet Observatory, University of Washington Center for Informed Public, Graphika and Atlantic Council’s Digital Forensic Research Lab. And potentially according to what we found on the final report by EIP, the DNC, the Center for Internet Security, CISA- a nonprofit funded by DHS, the National Association of Secretaries of State, also known as NASS and the National Association of State Election Directors, NASED. And in this case, because there are other social media companies involved, Twitter, what do all of these groups though, have in common? And I’m going to refresh your memory. They were all communicating on a private cloud server known as Jira. Now, the screenshot behind screenshot behind me, which is an example of one of thousands shows on November 3rd, 2020, that you, Mr. Roth, a Twitter employee, were exchanging communications on Jira, a private cloud server with CISA, NASS, NASED, and Alex Stamos, who now works at Stanford and is a former security of security officer at Facebook to remove a posting. Do you now remember communicating on a private cloud server to remove a posting? Yes or no? Well, I’m going to tell you right now that you did and we have proof of it. The Elon Musk ‘Twitter Files’ are the tip of the iceberg, as the federal government ran a massive, secret censorship op against the American people. That the DHS is hiding these censorship records in violation of FOIA law shows the agency still has something to hide. We have been quite active in exposing unlawful election interference. We are suing [] the DHS for all records of communications between the CISA and the EIP, which was reportedly [] active during the 2022 midterm elections. Among the news outlets flagged by EIP were websites for Just the News, New York Post, Fox News, Washington Examiner, The Washington Times, The Epoch Times and Breitbart. We recently sued [] the DOJ for records of communications between the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) and social media sites regarding foreign influence in elections, as well as the Hunter Biden laptop story. In September 2022, we sued [] the Secretary of State of the State of California for having YouTube censor a Judicial Watch election integrity video. In May 2022, YouTube censored a Judicial Watch video about Biden corruption and election integrity issues in the 2020 election. The video [], titled “Impeach? Biden Corruption Threatens National Security,” was falsely determined to be “election misinformation” and removed by YouTube, and Judicial Watch’s YouTube account was suspended for a week. The video featured an interview with me. We continue to post our videos [] on its Rumble channel (). In April 2021, we published [] documents revealing how California state officials pressured social media companies (Twitter, Facebook, Google (YouTube)) to censor posts about the 2020 election. In May 2021, we revealed [] documents showing that Iowa state officials pressured social media companies Twitter and Facebook to censor posts about the 2020 election. In July 2021, we uncovered [] records from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), which revealed that Facebook coordinated closely with the CDC to control the COVID narrative and “misinformation” and that over $3.5 million in free advertising given to the CDC by social media companies. BIDEN ISSUES SECOND ORDER TO ‘FURTHER’ ADVANCE GOVERNMENTWIDE RACIAL EQUITY The Left’s use of the word “equity,” meaning equal outcomes for different groups, is reminiscent of Karl Marx’s “From each according to his ability, to each according to his needs.” And Marxist “equity” is the official policy of the Biden administration, as our Corruption Chronicles blog reports []. Although the U.S. has already implemented a governmentwide plan to advance racial equity and support underserved communities under a 2021 Biden executive order [], the president has issued a second directive [] to strong arm federal agencies into launching more initiatives that will further tax Americans. Under the recently issued mandate government agencies have 30 days to establish an “Agency Equity Team” and conduct proactive engagement with members of underserved communities through culturally and linguistically appropriate listening sessions. Biden is also creating a White House Steering Committee on Equity composed of senior officials who will coordinate the government’s sweeping efforts to promote his leftist agenda. “By advancing equity, the Federal Government can support and empower all Americans, including the many communities in America that have been underserved, discriminated against, and adversely affected by persistent poverty and inequality,” Biden writes in the new document, adding that “equitability” will rebuild trust in government. “This order builds upon my previous equity-related Executive Orders by extending and strengthening equity-advancing requirements for agencies, and it positions agencies to deliver better outcomes for the American people,” according to the president. As examples the commander-in-chief offers building a strong, fair, and inclusive workforce and economy, investing in communities where federal policies have historically impeded equal opportunity, mitigating economic displacement, rooting out discrimination in the housing market, advancing equity in health, environmental justice and ending “unjust disparities” in the nation’s criminal justice system. Additionally, the director of the White House Office of Management and Budget (OMB) will update directives to “support equitable decision-making, promote equitable deployment of financial and technical assistance, and assist agencies in advancing equity, as appropriate and wherever possible,” the new executive order says. This is important because OMB plays a pivotal role in government by developing and executing the federal budget, overseeing federal agencies and executive branch operations, and coordinating all significant federal regulations. The new order also includes a blueprint to make equity part of the official federal budget process and specifically prevent discrimination based on gender identity and sexual orientation. “My Administration has embedded a focus on equity into the fabric of Federal policymaking and service delivery,” Biden writes, bragging that his presidency is the most diverse in our nation’s history. This month’s executive order is part of a robust movement by the administration to incorporate racial equity across all federal agencies. The president launched the plan on his first day in office with the lengthy executive order to advance racial equity and support for underserved communities through the government. The 2021 document claims that “entrenched disparities” in laws, public policies, and private institutions have denied equal opportunity to individuals and communities and that the health and climate crises have exposed inequities while a “historic movement for justice has highlighted the unbearable human costs of systemic racism.” Therefore, the original order states, the federal government should pursue a “comprehensive approach to advancing equity for all, including people of color and others who have been historically underserved, marginalized, and adversely affected by persistent poverty and inequality.” It further says that “by advancing equity across the Federal Government, we can create opportunities for the improvement of communities that have been historically underserved, which benefits everyone.” Many key federal agencies have taken major steps to implement racial equity plans as per Biden’s first mandate. The Department of Justice (DOJ) has formulated a strategy to “advance equity for marginalized and underserved communities [ that, among other things, directs federal prosecutors to ignore maximum sentencing under the law to “avoid unwarranted disparities.” The Department of Labor has dedicated $260 million to promote “equitable access” to government unemployment benefits by addressing disparities in the administration and delivery of money by race ethnicity and language proficiency. The Treasury Department named its first ever racial equity chief, a veteran La Raza official who spent a decade at the nation’s most influential open borders group. The Department of Defense (DOD) is using outrageous anti-bias materials that indoctrinate troops with anti-American and racially inflammatory training on diversity topics. The U. S. Department of Agriculture (USDA) created an equity commission to address longstanding inequities in agriculture. The nation’s medical research agency has a special minority health and health disparities division that issued a study declaring COVID-19 exacerbated preexisting resentment against racial/ethnic minorities and marginalized communities. Until next week ...
