name: America First Policy Institute
subject: We’re suing Big Tech, and we need your help
body:
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62362407:6VQsO7GNn:m:1:3331421248:EAA29E672E77003643ECF14F2AFB1BAC:r)
---
Peter, It's not just the Big Tech oligarchs placing their thumbs on the scale. **_It 's intelligence agencies, legislators, and now even medical professionals. _** **Last year, the America First Policy Institute (AFPI) joined Former President Trump in filing a class action lawsuit against Big Tech to put an END to the blatant attacks on our First Amendment rights.** The emergence of Elon Musk's _Twitter Files_ is proving the unimaginable level of government involvement in shaping the narratives that have defined American discourse online for years. From characterizing its relationship with the FBI as a "partnership" to being paid more than $3.4 million for services rendered to the federal government, Twitter has announced its direct participation in state-sanctioned censorship. When characterizing the connection between public and private actors, the Twitter Files describe a "master-canine quality of the FBI's relationship to Twitter." Furthermore, Musk and his team exposed that everyone from Pfizer executives to high-level government officials was able to make puppets out of far left-wing Twitter employees. Here at AFPI, we've been on the frontlines of the battle against Big Tech since our inception. [_**And now that the TRUTH is coming out, we need your help to fight harder than EVER to ensure that our right to free speech is protected from Big Tech and corrupt government officials.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62362407:6VQsO7GNn:m:1:3331421248:EAA29E672E77003643ECF14F2AFB1BAC:r) Since we joined former President Trump's lawsuit, EVERY claim of censorship and corruption that we've made is now being vindicated in the public square. By Twitter's own admission, it "was taking requests from every conceivable government body beginning with the Senate Intel Committee" to "Treasury, the NSA, virtually every state, the HHS, from the FBI, and DHS, and more," all of which amounted to "mountains of domestic moderation requests" including "from state governments, even local police." Thankfully, the Supreme Court has decided to hear cases that will challenge Big Tech's ability to hide behind outdated and inapplicable provisions that exist in our laws. If either of these lawsuits succeeds it would be MONUMENTAL! Sadly, it's commonplace to see pundits, concerned citizens, and even elected officials be entirely stripped of their right to speak their minds in the public square, but these lawsuits could change the entire situation. [**_But we can win this fight WITH YOUR HELP._ **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62362407:6VQsO7GNn:m:1:3331421248:EAA29E672E77003643ECF14F2AFB1BAC:r) You see, we're up against some of the most powerful and secretive entities in the world--including leftist billionaires who use their capital to silence opposition. [_**That 's why our team at AFPI is humbly requesting that you chip in a tax-deductible donation to help fund our toughest legal battle yet.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62362407:6VQsO7GNn:m:1:3331421248:EAA29E672E77003643ECF14F2AFB1BAC:r)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Milk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | Peter, did you know that only about 20-30% of folks open these emails?

And only about 1% of our friends will go the extra mile by donating. Conservatives like me rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to reach out to supporters like you.

I don't have deep-pocketed billionaires I can call on to hit these fundraising goals. **I rely on a couple of bucks here and there from hard-working Americans when they can afford it. **

_If everyone reading this email chipped in just a little bit, we would be able to hit our February Goal and keep up with the Democrats ' massive war chest._

I'll be honest... The Democrats were able to stop our Red Wave in 2022. We need every little bit to fund the programs needed to win in 2024 - **and we need it today.**

**All we need from you today is the price of a gallon of milk. _[The Democrats rely on mega-donors who give thousands of dollars at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can contribute to reach my February goal.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62362453:JR3A07GRN:m:1:3331421248:93B7C1ECC1EAA2DE693451F57A680656:r "The Democrats rely
on mega-donors who give thousands of dollars at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $5, $12, or even $24.57 to reach my February
goal.")_**
---
| | | [CHIP IN THE PRICE OF A GALLON OF MILK!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62362453:JR3A07GRN:m:1:3331421248:93B7C1ECC1EAA2DE693451F57A680656:r "CHIP IN THE
PRICE OF A GALLON OF MILK!")
---
We can't sit idly by as the Democrats run this country into the ground. I'm rolling up my sleeves and working for families like yours - making our country better, stronger, and safer. **But I can 't do this without support from folks like you.**
---
| | | [CHIP IN THE PRICE OF A GALLON OF MILK!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62362453:JR3A07GRN:m:1:3331421248:93B7C1ECC1EAA2DE693451F57A680656:r "CHIP IN THE
PRICE OF A GALLON OF MILK!")
---
This is the shortest month of the year, which means we have even less time than normal to reach our goal. **_[Please don't ignore this call for help!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62362452:JR3A07GRN:m:1:3331421248:93B7C1ECC1EAA2DE693451F57A680656:r "Please
don’t ignore this call for help!")_**

Thank you so much for taking the time to read this all the way through,

Marco
---
| | |

ours. If you believe in the American Dream, I'm kindly asking for your donation to restore it.")
---

A Personal Note from Marco Rubio:

My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream.

**I will never stop fighting for the American Dream because to me, it 's personal.** However, the American Dream that allowed the son of a bartender and a maid to become a U.S. Senator is slipping further and further out of reach and I need help to make sure we can restore it.

**[Join my fight to restore the American Dream:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62362451:JR3A07GRN:m:1:3331421248:93B7C1ECC1EAA2DE693451F57A680656:r "Join my fight to restore the American Dream:")**
| [RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62362451:JR3A07GRN:m:1:3331421248:93B7C1ECC1EAA2DE693451F57A680656:r "RESTORE THE AMERICAN
DREAM")
---

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62362450:JR3A07GRN:m:1:3331421248:93B7C1ECC1EAA2DE693451F57A680656:r "The Democrats Agenda: Abolish the filibuster, increase taxes, open the border. Stop the radical Democrats:")

We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

**[If you're committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62362450:JR3A07GRN:m:1:3331421248:93B7C1ECC1EAA2DE693451F57A680656:r "If you’re
committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.")**
| [STOP THE DEMS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62362450:JR3A07GRN:m:1:3331421248:93B7C1ECC1EAA2DE693451F57A680656:r "STOP THE DEMS")

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Revealed: Plan to Transform America
body:
Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system.

| **Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy? And What Does It Mean for Your Money?** Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system. Right now, the mainstream media is completely ignoring what might be the most important story in the financial world that nobody is talking about. Amid the distractions caused by conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation, Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at an event called COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world’s most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President, Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...
From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a [$150 trillion ‘global transition’ of our economy.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9eq7k8quhnq2704mbfifctf907ckrefpiq3j8k8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph64o72c3h2bs) Since then, Bank of America has committed, along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world’s biggest companies. Several billionaires, led by Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this ‘transformation’ as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their ‘transformation’? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins, who predicted the 2008 market meltdown has followed the money... And what she’s discovered is startling. It has nothing to do with a market crash... a new reserve currency... or the end of fiat. Prins says: **“While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines, I’ve found evidence the elites are spending $150 trillion to ‘transform’ our economy into something we didn’t vote on... didn’t ask for... and very few are prepared for.** **In essence, we’re about to see a stranger, more extreme ‘new normal’ in America.** **Most people will be shocked when they see what happens in the months ahead.”** Prins considers this transformation so urgent, she has agreed to sit down for an interview to get her message in front of as many Americans as possible. For now, there’s no cost to watch. [Go here to see how this ‘transformation’ could affect you – and find out what it means for your money.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zke1cm8dqaui03h68hgsem0o8ebn16ehvn1k41do_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph64o72c3h2bs) [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zisa0ae7i4e3cs9hrieh08mn0a0m5k3jjcb2gt0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph64o72c3h2bs)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Suing Kaiser Permanente for abusing children
body:
Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot,Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when activist doctors decidedshe was “trans”... _... and fast-tracked her into Kaiser Permanente’s multi-billion-dollar_ _industry to “transition” her from a girl to a boy._
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4fqv0f62bukrpukkkn0hquk9hic2sn1iovbk04g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph64o72cph2bs)
---
| |
* She was given weekly testosterone injections.
* She was injected with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders.
* And finally, at age 15, the doctors at Kaiser Permanente removed Chloe’s healthy breasts in a radical double mastectomy.

---
| | Chloe and her parents were coerced by these doctors into thinking she was a boy. They purposefully lied to her about the side effects of the experimental treatments they were forcing her under. **And they effectively used Chloe as a lab rat to “test” their “gender affirming care.”** Now for the rest of Chloe’s life, her voice will always be deeper, she’ll never be able to breastfeed – if she can even have children – and who knows what cancers, fertility problems, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more lurk in her future. **Bottom line: The doctors at Kaiser Permanente destroyed Chloe’s healthy body for profit.****And this is happening to children across America.** My non-profit, the Center for American Liberty, is helping Chloe Cole SUE Kaiser Permanente for permanently destroying her body... **...and finally bring justice to those who have suffered the same fate at the hands of doctors they should have been able to trust.**[**I’m asking you to support Chloe’s landmark lawsuit today by contributing a tax-deductible donation of $35 to the case’s legal fund.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztg2aang8j5nee93o6u4pnhrrvi0itvqk1cnn3sg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph64o72cph2bs) Winning this case won’t be easy. Kaiser Permanente is the largest medical group in the country.They’re going to come at us with high-powered lawyers to protect their goldmine.**But making radical activists like this pay through litigation is the only way we’ll shut them down.** [**I’m counting on you to join me in Chloe’s fight today by supporting our legal battle with a tax-deductible $35 donation to our legal fund.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2dnoovb5eotl37q325m1o3r1svo86pf4j8t1r48_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph64o72cph2bs) Any donation you can send today will get us one step closer to finally bringing Chloe the justice she deserves after being coerced and harmed by a hospital that abused her like a lab rat.

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqkinkif950jadrfoa0h3gfugh26vj8ndqr24m0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph64o72cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znjkb15n9il193og86ufb1lunjdqemo15opfq0m8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph64o72cph2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf664b62jh26d2gsjdb7o5l2fbrfhl93g9prmcjo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph64o72cph2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: ICYMI News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg1buuanfaks90llekdvm472dmtc2290uhdm5qro_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph64o74c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3s7sn5odm13p4isa3frnai7pn1j8q2fk8st4gb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph64o74c1h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z64cni2g52d5o45e2td5sednffmq8lqv7bejdasg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph64o74c1h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zco4p74523t7qi43msu70nbo64ojhiiq4kh2ta50_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph64o74c1h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Speaker Kevin McCarthy
subject: Omar- FIRED. Swalwell- FIRED. Schiff- FIRED.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Let's set the record straight.

| |
---
| | | Let's set the record straight.

I fired Ilhan Omar because she was hurling anti-semitic and anti-American Remarks across social media. This is UNACCEPTABLE behavior for a member of a committee representing America on the world stage.

I fired Eric Swalwell from the intelligence committee because he became entangled with a spy for the Chinese Communist party. I do not have to explain to you why this would be a conflict of interest for someone sitting on the Intelligence Committee.

I fired Adam Schiff from the Intelligence Committee because he spread lies about Donald Trump's supposed involvement with Russia despite knowing them to be untrue at the time.
Adam Schiff leaked it?

I promised you that if we took back the majority, I would bring decency and justice to the people's House.

---

I will not stop until we get this country back on track. But the Democrats are FURIOUS at what we have been doing.

Even now, Omar, Schiff, and Swalell are raising MILLIONS off their terminations. They will not stop until they return to power.

We cannot let this happen. I promise to fight with everything I have to stop this from happening, and with your support, we will succeed.

name: American Action News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh5ccij04n4b6h8br39eodpftg7bame9ljt7atb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph64o74c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuq8qfrpa01oujonvpejef793voqdj087ca8jh38_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph64o74c3h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z45f01s4o2kalsi1h0cnlbnnlilp49mcf921dlv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph64o74c3h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf9fvpg1hr3j2q9furcipvdfedr0bqhn4mt844ho_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph64o74c3h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Brent Bozell
subject: Using a tragedy to sow division
body:
This is how deprived The New York Times has become.

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjgotvriacv11sgqots876hmasltbtgqr6u4r708_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph66ob4chh2bs)

Friend,

This is how deprived The New York Times has become.

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9491630o4ht1bfiqq355l9il706330lgbqeabpo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph66ob4chh2bs)
Instead of caring for the families in Ohio affected by the chemical spill, The New York Times is attacking conservatives who disagree with Biden.

They hate you more than they care about people in Ohio.

They would rather ban your way of life by taking away gas stoves than report on Biden's atrocities.

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, and I'm the Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

**MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.**

Our goal is to raise $10,000 this week to expose The New York Times and other corrupt media organizations.

[_**Friend, will you send $10, $35, $50, or any amount to expose the true evil in media? Click here to send your support >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrtvfni2uonfkve369dvve3fqhb515tachqio6ug_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph66ob4chh2bs)

The New York Times will say anything that goes against Biden is _" right-wing,"_ even caring for your fellow Americans.

People have every right to be critical of Biden's poor handling of the situation. But The New York Times is attempting to change the narrative and make the people concerned about it out to be the bad guys.

**The left-wing media lies to protect politicians ... and MRC exposes them.**

On Tuesday, NewsBusters reported that the broadcast networks of ABC, CBS, and NBC had abandoned the environmental fallout from the February 3 train derailment in East Palestine, Ohio.

On their flagship morning and evening shows, ABC covered it for 0 seconds, and CBS and NBC only covered it for 1 minute and 42 seconds after an evacuation order was lifted on February 8.

But since our study's publication and public outcry about the threats posed to the community's air, food, residents, and water supply, the liberal networks rediscovered the issue Wednesday morning.

They covered the story for a combined 6 minutes and 42 seconds.
* Tuesday's CBS _Evening News_ had a 31-second brief.
* CBS Mornings stayed on the case with a 2 minute and 29 second report.
* ABC's _Good Morning America_ made a similar return with 2 minutes and 16 seconds and _never made clear they had ignored it since February 8_.
* NBC's _Today_ scrapped together 2 minutes and 16 seconds to insist it still cares about East Palestine.

MRC is keeping the pressure on the media to keep them from covering up Biden's failures.

name: ICYMI News
subject: Revealed: Plan to Transform America
body:
| **Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to 'Transform' the American Economy? And What Does It Mean for Your Money?** Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system. Right now, the mainstream media is completely ignoring what might be the most important story in the financial world that nobody is talking about. Amid the distractions caused by conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation, Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at an event called COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world's most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President, Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a [$150 trillion 'global transition' of our economy.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqcbt4irau656a0q3fl8fjuuu624hrkue983cf7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph66ob4c9h2bs) Since then, Bank of America has committed, along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world's biggest companies. Several billionaires, led by Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this 'transformation' as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their 'transformation'? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins, who predicted the 2008 market meltdown has followed the money... And what she's discovered is startling. It has nothing to do with a market crash... a new reserve currency... or the end of fiat. Prins says: **" While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines, I've found evidence the elites are spending $150 trillion to 'transform' our economy into something we didn't vote on... didn't ask for... and very few are prepared for.** **In essence, we 're about to see a stranger, more extreme 'new normal' in America.** **Most people will be shocked when they see what happens in the months ahead. "** Prins considers this transformation so urgent, she has agreed to sit down for an interview to get her message in front of as many Americans as possible. For now, there's no cost to watch. [Go here to see how this 'transformation' could affect you - and find out what it means for your money.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z41b9h0s5kcvqo9ocgpdji79j6uiqvrq5m3pfblo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph66ob4c9h2bs) [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlbinj1boarj75i2s8fngbficja51v65ntt71jqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph66ob4c9h2bs)

name: 1600 Daily
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcuui2gfoe0ss07kegm0bqipn6bg9is0dcjnup98_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph66ob4cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvbmbklpqh9q5s7vamkbmakvn280k1scitko2618_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph66ob4cjh2bs)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo7u53a79j7k9a8pj1qegl6glnifraeso5qqoek8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph66ob4cjh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: The racist origins of Planned Parenthood
body:
It’s funny how you never hear about the racist origins of Planned Parenthood during Black History Month.

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08784%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DHOE1InPvB9L%2bWYDmeAu4Q&sysid=1)

Friend,

It’s funny how you never hear about the racist origins of Planned Parenthood during Black History Month.

But it’s hard to ignore Sanger’s racism when even Planned Parenthood has stated that Sanger believed in eugenics,

_“**An inherently racist and ableist ideology** that labeled certain people unfit to have children. . . [and] caused irreparable damage to the health and lives of generations of Black people, Latino people, Indigenous people, immigrants, people with disabilities, people with low incomes, and many others.”_

Time and time again, abortion apologists try to justify her beliefs in eugenics, but it’s hard to explain away quotes like:

_**“We do not want word to go out that we want to exterminate the Negro population.”**_
-- Margaret Sanger

Before I tell you the full story, I want to introduce myself. My name is Brandon Tatum, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens.

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08784%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DHOE1InPvB9L%2bWYDmeAu4Q&sysid=1)

BLEXIT focuses on teaching Black and minority communities about the importance of freedom, faith, and family to get them away from Planned Parenthood, CRT indoctrination, and the victimhood mentality.

I’ve set a goal of raising $50,000 this month to promote families over abortion, and I need your help to reach that goal.

[_**Will you send your support with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08795%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qx%2ft40cmrtVkelyGMMin2w&sysid=1)

Planned Parenthood is a racist organization that takes advantage of vulnerable teens and young adults in Black and minority communities:

79% of Planned Parenthoods are within walking distance of communities with a higher proportion of Black and Latina women.

**Because Planned Parenthood comes into Black communities,****they have surgically aborted 20 MILLION Black babies****.**

Since 1973, Planned Parenthood has effectively cut the Black population in half.

Now, abortion is the leading cause of death amongst Black Americans.

Unlike many of these causes of death -- like cancer, heart disease, or accidental deaths -- abortion isn’t an accident or a sickness.

**Abortion is murder. **

I know it's cliche to call people racists. I'm sick of it. But Planned Parenthood and abortion need to end.

[_**Can I count on you to join the fight against the racism and murder perpetuated by Planned Parenthood? Click here to send your support >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08796%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fNAVG1pB4goiiCUvPdwkhQ&sysid=1)

BLEXIT is teaching people to value life and the sanctity of every individual.

We stress the importance of supporting families and how the nuclear family can heal Black and minority communities.

By building strong families and educating future generations about the history of our great country, we can change the narrative surrounding America’s minority communities.

Your generous support helps the BLEXIT Foundation fight for our country, empower minority communities with our message, and win the hearts and minds of thousands.

[_**Please consider supporting BLEXIT Foundation with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount. Click here to send your donation >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08797%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YEnrjXXjK6nTrFXuMXI8Vw&sysid=1)

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08798%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4hc4z4lKOGt%2b%2f%2bNQPut%2fAw&sysid=1)

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy.

| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zb7hg509l2036s4bir9c5evpmbhm60go3b25sjkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph61oj6c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ze954ol9bar5qu9ef9sn6k29nvpl3udhkj2ba6a0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph61oj6c3h2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6qr5k9qk21l0kj06c6e1ii62qruu28i608p0uh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cph61oj6c3h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

name: Speaker Kevin McCarthy
subject: Omar- FIRED. Swalwell- FIRED. Schiff- FIRED.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Let’s set the record straight.

| |
---
| | | Let’s set the record straight.

I fired Ilhan Omar because she was hurling anti-semitic and anti-American Remarks across social media. This is UNACCEPTABLE behavior for a member of a committee representing America on the world stage.

I fired Eric Swalwell from the intelligence committee because he became entangled with a spy for the Chinese Communist party. I do not have to explain to you why this would be a conflict of interest for someone sitting on the Intelligence Committee.

I fired Adam Schiff from the Intelligence Committee because he spread lies about Donald Trump’s supposed involvement with Russia despite knowing them to be untrue at the time.
Adam Schiff leaked it?

I promised you that if we took back the majority, I would bring decency and justice to the people’s House.

---
| | [PROMISES MADE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650280%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Cwi0ECUOtc5OL8cihIthWQ&sysid=1)

---

I will not stop until we get this country back on track. But the Democrats are FURIOUS at what we have been doing.

Even now, Omar, Schiff, and Swalell are raising MILLIONS off their terminations. They will not stop until they return to power.

We cannot let this happen. I promise to fight with everything I have to stop this from happening, and with your support, we will succeed.

**[Can I ask that you chip in $1, $5, $10 or anything you might be able to give to help us take on the dark money Democrats and protect our Conservative House Majority?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650283%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AEspTJm6ZdZ4krBU1gitDQ&sysid=1 "Can I ask that you chip

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: What does it mean to be an American in 2023?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
If you’re going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding.

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcoamlkkknq1gic43d2ia9imjuj59o1vfe4da5f0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cpj60o34clh2bs)
Fellow American,

I am lucky. I grew up in Ohio in the '90s back when America still valued merit.

I might have been a skinny kid with a funny last name, but my parents taught me an important lesson: _If you are going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding._

If I'd been born 20 years later, my story would have been impossible. Today our nation is hungry for a cause; we want purpose and meaning.

The woke Left preys on that vacuum with a poisonous obsession with race, sexuality, and climate change. If you disagree with them, they call you a bigot. This is psychological slavery.

Fellow American, the best measure of the health of American democracy is the percentage of citizens who feel free to say what they actually think - _**IN PUBLIC.**_

Right now, we're failing that test.

**That's why I am running for President of the United States.**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv5cdq7c0i6gebkiepdg32ni5f686ec93dp4hgf8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cpj60o34clh2bs)
Today, we're starting a cultural movement in our country, Fellow American, and I want you to be a part of it. I want you to join our movement to create a new American dream for the next generation.

This time it isn't just about money. It is about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence itself. It means that we:

Believe in merit.
Believe in accountability.
Believe in free speech.
Believe in American exceptionalism.
Fellow American, if you're on board with these ideals, then we're already on the same team. We're ready to fight for the future of America. If we rediscover our shared national identity, then we can take on the greatest external threat we face: Communist China.

**[Will you join me? Please take just a few minutes to watch my launch video- and join Team Vivek by chipping in $1 or even $5 today as I launch my presidential campaign.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zavmoc7dmck12hc0uk9pa6o8mm1cgajs2bda2if8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cpj60o34clh2bs)**

It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy in America – in Washington D.C., on Wall Street, and in Silicon Valley – that does whatever allows them to accumulate more money and power for themselves. They try to divide & conquer, but that won't work if we stay united.

**E pluribus unum - _from many, one._**

These are the ideals that won the American Revolution; that reunited us after the Civil War; that won two World Wars and the Cold War. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist, and I am running for President to revive them.

Join me,

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbcvrugs0boc2vlokntm91v26gsrv062q4d1ijo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cpj60o34clh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW ->**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7ed8f38msf15filkcjgcuq4qdu1vsfjqu4a2fu0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cpj60o34clh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2k1ium45riptd6ul8ii835c7ehuns5u0ptgdut0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cpj60o34clh2bs)

---

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zks0pcn7u0ougv0sd4d4efpp2ngkpbdl6p4s1id8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cpj60o34clh2bs)| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs78m1p7frofde1ldee4hj51h7c5183pj2flpjc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cpj60o34clh2bs)| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zppijcgclqvi9ct961qv8oqfe3m9qufuf5fn997g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cpj60o34clh2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8tjr2c3mouci688s2vu78m82rtg0r3kebupmgso_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7ctj6co30chim49fg)

name: Your America
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08716%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hfNSXKDxkl8Zu166aGWTYw&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation’s highest court: **“My job is to apply the Constitution.”**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08717%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=G6Zpc5tU1DLJb3YoK6CIbw&sysid=1) [NO](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08718%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iQ893nFTchp0i7nInuO2rg&sysid=1) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08719%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ww0AmuaMR3y4HFAZZZtD8A&sysid=1)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as “Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution.”

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08710%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QPCszm3r34CrxRpIQXYflg&sysid=1)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7150%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=m7CrIY9x5SkOlCL%2fzTnTCg&sysid=1)_

|
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7150%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=m7CrIY9x5SkOlCL%2fzTnTCg&sysid=1)

name: American Action News
subject: Americans find this “British Bulldog”captivating
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zellv0ft707sv7ha12h15qpnihreu6m608ndabk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cpj60o36clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zprtho2dg1okvasnsme9gt8l64so1hrnph1k6hbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cpj60o36clh2bs)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3pdjmubtpgvtcsomike4iium4cvh7d1om6coipg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cpj60o36clh2bs) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5ef8rph5o56qs9lr63irco37j24eacon75kmi98_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cpj60o36clh2bs)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Senator Brown isn't just the best Ohio has to offer, he's one of the most dedicated, empathetic and effective Senators in the entire Senate. We need Sen. Brown in Washington to fight these fights--to regulate corporate power in the aftermath of East Palestine. Help us send him back to the Senate.
body:
He’s looking out for us.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tddcd91cc-9daa-4276-88fc-6a91ce44458a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **The disaster suffered in East Palestine, Ohio, caused by the toxic train derailment is a parable about modern America. **Look no further than this: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te1539c75-12b4-4595-9494-b2374b95f897/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Republican Donald Trump gutted the regulation that could've prevented the tragedy from happening_** , **_because Republicans worry more about large corporations making an extra billion than the basic needs of regular people._** **_GOP Governor of Ohio, Mike DeWine, refuses to call a state emergency to receive extra federal resources_** _ because, well...I have no idea. He's a multi-millionaire. He's been in government nearly every year since the 1980s. Maybe he's just given up caring._ **_Meanwhile, Senator Sherrod Brown, who we remind you has a difficult reelection ahead in 2024, Is A Leader_ :** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tddf2dd07-6dca-4904-9a38-70188d7bcdce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Senator Brown isn't just on the scene when there's a disaster. name: American Defense News
subject: Don’t miss this
body:
I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I
| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4kjbu3hkecsl2ibs926sobdb3ri9ft08gl1kamo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cpj6cor4cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8jgg5shq26nomnppr01neu68gq2ilfm9ju06860_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cpj6cor4cth2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5gcoh9fhe1djl9t5ikpi5tbujvporj1l5i3mbk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7cpj6cor4cth2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844

subject: Supporting Michigan Democrats up and down the ballot
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BUILDING BRIDGES PAC Building Bridges PAC
body:
We need Democratic leaders in all levels of government to keep moving Michigan forward. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59231278/393625620/1515494598?refcode=EM_FR_230225FR_N_GW_90DO_6_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzcvMS85MDA5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDk3ZjM5YS0xOGI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t_q6_CJCSWS3xkpLsI6urGDt1ZCmhB8gsh1iqbSdsns=)
---
If there’s anything we’ve learned over the past few years, it’s that we need leaders who: fight for American workers, will work to expand quality affordable health care, defend access to abortion, and build a more just, safer, equitable, sustainable nation.

We need Democratic leaders in all levels of government to keep moving Michigan forward, and the new Democratic trifecta is focused on doing just that. From passing the largest tax cut in decades to supporting funding for businesses and affordable housing, we’re getting things done.

**[If you’re ready to keep making progress in Michigan, please help us defend and expand our majorities in the State House and Senate by pitching in $5 before our end-of-month name: Jordan
subject: We’re close, but not close enough…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Help All On The Line meet our February goal!

Hey team,
As the AOTL Finance Coordinator, I work with each team on the 2023 budget. And I’m excited to work with the mapping team ahead of critical redraws in North Carolina, Ohio, and Texas.
But here’s the problem: If we don’t hit our fundraising goals, I might have to tell folks, like our mapping team, that we might have to postpone some of their new projects.
It’s the worst part of my job -- especially because geospatial mapping and analysis is vital to All On The Line’s work for fair redistricting processes and keeping voters engaged between elections. **Tight budgets mean tough choices.**
But you can help -- and we made it easy to do. **[Just rush a $23 donation to your custom donation link before our end-of-month deadline!>> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/feb2023-aotl?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59234352/393637192/-1229800645?refcode=20230228_AOTL_F_EOM3_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzNGYyNTEzLTFkYjUtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=D4u5ncG1MD0RXGM9-RtxJFY6piZla5wVPfhJBTSi_IE=)**
Thank you for everything you do to protect our democracy! I can’t tell you how much I appreciate the support team. I track every donation and trust me, every dollar counts.
\-- Jordan

But it’s still just about as slim as can be. The GOP is already working to win back control in 2024, and they’ve drawn big red circles around Montana on the map. We’ve got to fight back — _now_. Early grassroots donations grew our Democratic majority in 2022, and early grassroots donations will protect our Democratic majority in 2024. >
While we celebrate our hard-fought victories, we’ve got to get to work delivering more results for working families. And to get it done, we need to keep Jon Tester in the Senate.
Jon Tester’s always reminded me of my big brothers (not just because of the flat top haircut). He’s tough as nails, he’s got a heart bigger than the state of Montana, and he centers every decision on the needs of working people — because he understands those needs down to his bones. He’s the only working farmer in the Senate, and he and his wife, Sharla, work on the same land that his grandparents tended more than 100 years ago.
He is the best person to represent Montanans and working families in Congress, and it’s important to ensure he has the resources he needs to win.
We need to invest now to keep our majority because if the GOP takes over, they’ll derail the progress we’re making. They’ll drive an agenda chock-full of goodies for their rich donors and pain for struggling families. They’ll rip away more and more of our freedoms and threaten more and more of our democracy.
[_**Let’s make sure Jon can kick off his critical campaign with the strongest momentum possible. Please split $3 or anything you can between our campaigns now to help keep up the fight for working people in the Senate.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59234406/393637362/-1961904911?refcode=EMZ11W_TAN_E_20230225_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWRiYjkzNS0xZGI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CLnxdJuJaFZLL59CJ_EmDDZf2oub5OJFNFgS7ff5zRE=)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

clean_body: I want to take a moment to talk about Jon Tester. | | | In a moment, I’m going to ask if you can = But first, I want to take a moment to talk about why it’s so important to support this race early on. Democrats expanded our Senate majority (woo-hoo for John Fetterman, Raphael Warnock, Catherine Cortez-Masto, Mark Kelly, and everyone who supported their close races). But it’s still just about as slim as can be. The GOP is already working to win back control in 2024, and they’ve drawn big red circles around Montana on the map. We’ve got to fight back — now. Early grassroots donations grew our Democratic majority in 2022, and early grassroots donations will protect our Democratic majority in 2024. = | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = While we celebrate our hard-fought victories, we’ve got to get to work delivering more results for working families. And to get it done, we need to keep Jon Tester in the Senate. Jon Tester’s always reminded me of my big brothers (not just because of the flat top haircut). He’s tough as nails, he’s got a heart bigger than the state of Montana, and he centers every decision on the needs of working people — because he understands those needs down to his bones. He’s the only working farmer in the Senate, and he and his wife, Sharla, work on the same land that his grandparents tended more than 100 years ago. He is the best person to represent Montanans and working families in Congress, and it’s important to ensure he has the resources he needs to win. We need to invest now to keep our majority because if the GOP takes over, they’ll derail the progress we’re making. They’ll drive an agenda chock-full of goodies for their rich donors and pain for struggling families. They’ll rip away more and more of our freedoms and threaten more and more of our democracy. = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2023 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: American Update
subject: Revealed: Plan to Transform America
body:
| **Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy? And What Does It Mean for Your Money?** Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system. Right now, the mainstream media is completely ignoring what might be the most important story in the financial world that nobody is talking about. Amid the distractions caused by conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation, Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at an event called COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world’s most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President, Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a [$150 trillion ‘global transition’ of our economy. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650297%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dcVZ9tasWy3JEOXT0siVJQ&sysid=1) Since then, Bank of America has committed, along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world’s biggest companies. Several billionaires, led by Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this ‘transformation’ as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their ‘transformation’? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins, who predicted the 2008 market meltdown has followed the money... And what she’s discovered is startling. It has nothing to do with a market crash... a new reserve currency... or the end of fiat. Prins says: **“While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines, I’ve found evidence the elites are spending $150 trillion to ‘transform’ our economy into something we didn’t vote on ... didn’t ask for... and very few are prepared for.** **In essence, we’re about to see a stranger, more extreme ‘new normal’ in America.** **Most people will be shocked when they see what happens in the months ahead.”** Prins considers this transformation so urgent, she has agreed to sit down for an interview to get her message in front of as many Americans as possible. For now, there’s no cost to watch. [Go here to see how this ‘transformation’ could affect you - and find out what it means for your money.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650298%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1IG3ILPWEPxDSuWo4rO6cQ&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650299%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=c0w6jr6VNdqm41pOUWg8%2bA&sysid=1)

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Here’s why abortion is pushed in Black communities
body:
It's funny how you never hear about the racist origins of Planned Parenthood during Black History Month.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41f484d3b734430db91d478e39bd2f1b&_e=JGeQ1AtFCi7z1js_7oqykfE_mgmtOZknV11gDU7VjSbM4nN12DYELplr7WetlqNA11rNZDaqQn_WBNLDU0rLCgIPa5a7to4PWC0m7eIHGU_ZEZg2mFayrZyT_4TsKROIZ0TRlP0iiR1222pFN9XlfE520EcdorMMMwi4wNt3zLvBgGcJmFbI6oJcg-7R_oRqrh5ICEO50BawniAV8Wr4TZnpN3rvSbxuqAXNQvNRUb5cNPD3q9hjsRE3wz1T2y5un2Sg69ZFE32nP9p2MeLKfm9aEDvALAQ94wob7BmKpZU%3D)

Friend,

It's funny how you never hear about the racist origins of Planned Parenthood during Black History Month.

But it's hard to ignore Sanger's racism when even Planned Parenthood has stated that Sanger believed in eugenics,

_"**An inherently racist and ableist ideology** that labeled certain people unfit to have children. . . [and] caused irreparable damage to the health and lives of generations of Black people, Latino people, Indigenous people, immigrants, people with disabilities, people with low incomes, and many others."_

Time and time again, abortion apologists try to justify her beliefs in eugenics, but it's hard to explain away quotes like:

_**" We do not want word to go out that we want to exterminate the Negro population."**_
-- Margaret Sanger

Before I tell you the full story, I want to introduce myself. My name is Brandon Tatum, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41f484d3b734430db91d478e39bd2f1b&_e=JGeQ1AtFCi7z1js_7oqykfE_mgmtOZknV11gDU7VjSbM4nN12DYELplr7WetlqNA11rNZDaqQn_WBNLDU0rLCgIPa5a7to4PWC0m7eIHGU_ZEZg2mFayrZyT_4TsKROIZ0TRlP0iiR1222pFN9XlfJ-jqxViAYZoJYugmN29q80FwJIYB1BP6mmfoFoDiXqk_uwhadA5efH3FFX56aXpan1hW3HSc8-54h60hJL81d_0CzDPc4-tS1HNfzCVr-nhVnu05XobnXZc79mifxsbrvE0tL-2h_whnHl_R10hJNE%3D)

BLEXIT focuses on teaching Black and minority communities about the importance of freedom, faith, and family to get them away from Planned Parenthood, CRT indoctrination, and the victimhood mentality.

I've set a goal of raising $50,000 this month to promote families over abortion, and I need your help to reach that goal.

[_**Will you send your support with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41f484d3b734430db91d478e39bd2f1b&_e=JGeQ1AtFCi7z1js_7oqykfE_mgmtOZknV11gDU7VjSbM4nN12DYELplr7WetlqNA11rNZDaqQn_WBNLDU0rLCgIPa5a7to4PWC0m7eIHGU_ZEZg2mFayrZyT_4TsKROIZ0TRlP0iiR1222pFN9XlfMUcr390gzvL4Wfy7Bls_jprlnUElvHPb-MDxTIbf10GZ0ByRH70_X3YPQvLNMcxMzLP78JyI8lUQXnX6yqOMf9kp-fl5iOnYE0i1a9ZFCX-sTqK4H2r-aiSsmUaUYS4Utv9O-7q4jkh3UkRsuwkoD4%3D)

Planned Parenthood is a racist organization that takes advantage of vulnerable teens and young adults in Black and minority communities:

79% of Planned Parenthoods are within walking distance of communities with a higher proportion of Black and Latina women.

**Because Planned Parenthood comes into Black communities,****they have surgically aborted 20 MILLION Black babies****.**

Since 1973, Planned Parenthood has effectively cut the Black population in half.

Now, abortion is the leading cause of death amongst Black Americans.

Unlike many of these causes of death -- like cancer, heart disease, or accidental deaths -- abortion isn't an accident or a sickness.

**Abortion is murder. **

I know it's cliche to call people racists. I'm sick of it. But Planned Parenthood and abortion need to end.

[_**Can I count on you to join the fight against the racism and murder perpetuated by Planned Parenthood? Click here to send your support >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41f484d3b734430db91d478e39bd2f1b&_e=JGeQ1AtFCi7z1js_7oqykfE_mgmtOZknV11gDU7VjSbM4nN12DYELplr7WetlqNA11rNZDaqQn_WBNLDU0rLCgIPa5a7to4PWC0m7eIHGU_ZEZg2mFayrZyT_4TsKROIZ0TRlP0iiR1222pFN9XlfB6Zt02ygKon5NGCuxSbtxmIMxR3gowsy1u4wj_5gbHmUt4f5-ub0WO-zo-Jdc3DWCOm52yXncPt7fUvFNpx3fjtiGmk1ZL7pKuKpN72Fvtk1pWJrQWVPa4-KbUWzUitaFY3me007VUJOvdmdiTMxAo%3D)

BLEXIT is teaching people to value life and the sanctity of every individual.

We stress the importance of supporting families and how the nuclear family can heal Black and minority communities.

By building strong families and educating future generations about the history of our great country, we can change the narrative surrounding America's minority communities.

Your generous support helps the BLEXIT Foundation fight for our country, empower minority communities with our message, and win the hearts and minds of thousands.

[_**Please consider supporting BLEXIT Foundation with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount. Click here to send your donation >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41f484d3b734430db91d478e39bd2f1b&_e=JGeQ1AtFCi7z1js_7oqykfE_mgmtOZknV11gDU7VjSbM4nN12DYELplr7WetlqNA11rNZDaqQn_WBNLDU0rLCgIPa5a7to4PWC0m7eIHGU_ZEZg2mFayrZyT_4TsKROIZ0TRlP0iiR1222pFN9XlfGdRVuua9aVZTa5QD2oIcKrCf3N4gmr8L1Lz53wOKI5s3gZLIrMOWvcdavM4nbTCZEBL4ng0oTBUQMlQVYie0xZeTm2PJhqvRdrwRPiqxwL_VmMPtpYj2liln4oPJIE2oXvQPEjDHJdhgKiQ5dv69h8%3D)

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41f484d3b734430db91d478e39bd2f1b&_e=JGeQ1AtFCi7z1js_7oqykfE_mgmtOZknV11gDU7VjSbM4nN12DYELplr7WetlqNA11rNZDaqQn_WBNLDU0rLCgIPa5a7to4PWC0m7eIHGU_ZEZg2mFayrZyT_4TsKROIdf1LZbQ1E8yYGJlP0OMARjSYIKlutq2VPQoVu-cHpuzto22M71IO74YOhTFGxdJPShZTDthTPXrbTdkLHMXpvBhJO9qqf8Buf-SmiNR0HwYYQA4U6cnSUEeC9z1nUXwUawZ8x6HNwIirTWP9rCvBpWsBbwdPeaIl5m49iFBt8Gs%3D)

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: We need to talk about my border visit in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
You don't need me to tell you this, but the border is an absolute disaster

| |
---
| | | Friend, it's Kevin McCarthy.

I just visited the southern border with Rep. Juan Ciscomani, Rep. Derrick Van Orden, Rep. Jen Kiggans, and Rep. Lori Chavez-Deremer.

You don't need me to tell you this, but the border is an absolute disaster - a self-inflicted disaster unleashed upon the American people by the Biden Administration's open border policies.
* Over 5 million illegals have been ushered in by the Biden Administration.
* Hundreds of thousands of pounds of fentanyl and other dangerous narcotics are unleashed onto our streets to poison our youth.
* Criminals and terrorists are sneaking in undetected.
* And the countless handouts & benefits the Biden Administration is giving these illegal aliens is all funded by _**YOU.**_

Now that we are in the majority, we can finally DO something about the unmitigated humanitarian and national security catastrophe Joe Biden is trying to sweep under the rug.

We are going to begin congressional hearings AT the southern border, so we can hold Democrats accountable for the crisis they have caused and END this disaster once and for all.

_**But I can 't do this without you.**_

**I'm setting an emergency goal of $20,000 by the end of today to help House GOP's efforts to secure the southern border.**

**[Can I count on you for a small gift of $5 to $35?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f95167d718124c03b5eae5938e5e03a3&_e=xEQYvmvmvkDM9B8GLTsd9R-XHkgqAlepctrw6NDrmyHon0GL4jTOt9_GfQOlHOi4bGqyhI38ZyhDm67WMqMYw0le-vvbZuhZtiqWG6we79GbcjvbBhxEuKiHpS-mV32Xq894sZC1jPoJdBUJc5qkGRV9l8qfviYhF5AZbAluL3d1q8MRdYzD5mRAFcu1zdi5nmUPHc9bM50k9HEmXVnTqAG8arW3ap69DHNVud5T9ymoQOFloptUUCBROB3fyr7Km4UmIQMOrFhbDWcL_2Mdy494_aL7Tmv9pAh2YPVkH2xRu4JYsOA8mlIfgdelegTicAVWu_uCz-dI5-yQf9PdgWqaZL9H2GtSqGBV__0EFR6Isf8yw-jQ0rJLZ6V7L3WwkGhZ6Dh8QyJy6mNmqJ_pI_jxx4x87eyXzoNHLeuGuzNVEWAqcTIer7H3nXWRTOod-xxmCinJ2jAAlBUs2g-RyUwY0307ulcgH-f8jOXutTk%3D "Can I count on you for a small gift of $5 to $35?")**
