name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Revealed: Plan to Transform America
body:
| **Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to 'Transform' the American Economy? And What Does It Mean for Your Money?** Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system. Right now, the mainstream media is completely ignoring what might be the most important story in the financial world that nobody is talking about. Amid the distractions caused by conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation, Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at an event called COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world's most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President, Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a [$150 trillion 'global transition' of our economy. ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb4b9717fdef46ebb43b48ffa7b5ea51&_e=waw3l8ax2n_y8KmRhJdyQOdhHx0bX3tNx82i3a9h-PxsB5ivVbplT9vszv0zpaN0hOgWrfK-Lqfi_8m_RwgkWLb03QQqFLzV5bQDixtH1z68p4LWTk7DQEejQvB2noBkAt2E8V-kK4eN-9Usn0vlRaXW49hMrZBRryvIed7uwgAJyXxvH4A0zj2OGCYr1XruLsbtoaBgli07FzNRHNaL-7JY_KlDTF6fjTGMijmcVDS0X2o3A93tbC-Vs-b13K5z) Since then, Bank of America has committed, along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world's biggest companies. Several billionaires, led by Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this 'transformation' as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their 'transformation'? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins, who predicted the 2008 market meltdown has followed the money... And what she's discovered is startling. It has nothing to do with a market crash... a new reserve currency... or the end of fiat. Prins says: **" While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines, I've found evidence the elites are spending $150 trillion to 'transform' our economy into something we didn't vote on... didn't ask for... and very few are prepared for.** **In essence, we 're about to see a stranger, more extreme 'new normal' in America.** **Most people will be shocked when they see what happens in the months ahead. "** Prins considers this transformation so urgent, she has agreed to sit down for an interview to get her message in front of as many Americans as possible. For now, there's no cost to watch. [Go here to see how this 'transformation' could affect you - and find out what it means for your money.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb4b9717fdef46ebb43b48ffa7b5ea51&_e=waw3l8ax2n_y8KmRhJdyQOdhHx0bX3tNx82i3a9h-PxsB5ivVbplT9vszv0zpaN0hOgWrfK-Lqfi_8m_RwgkWLb03QQqFLzV5bQDixtH1z5icEFFxpNsQdUt378twzxbuHUnulrEDL51Mgz-eOrAXhZbpLXesKpVvSfbUS7F_TWNHlxAKPVz7fTyqaxQgj1Udd-cCWXwJlhi6OkEbWRL-4Wx2PMELm9NK3XiZCxHMU1gY2C7X94kc9lrM-NnaIlj) [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb4b9717fdef46ebb43b48ffa7b5ea51&_e=waw3l8ax2n_y8KmRhJdyQOdhHx0bX3tNx82i3a9h-PxsB5ivVbplT9vszv0zpaN0hOgWrfK-Lqfi_8m_RwgkWLb03QQqFLzV5bQDixtH1z4CBRWmCUVkw1o6fXD5MVimIjybxzH8Z5VAEi-mxeqAgAMakp5pdquhel_zpWWrjhaLtyXJFUqF9ktvNaZYY3-nmW8XHPk5OE5znk3MglsLOOHMvc6vPf2oqZ6FvVi_66IB7uVGF2AOA6hJVuGUMCi3)

Today, I'm writing to let you know that we've produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our "Constitution 101" course, and I'd like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College's world-renowned faculty. I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can't go on. I won't allow it.

I'm Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you've given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you've ever given to Freedom Watch.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4784f331244942718770bf36301cd009&_e=K5Fuueh9ZOIFaZOZzLSxgdForF028Q5fDEZg6k14Vns4Z-FzjGQcZHb0XMV1rFKLb634qht6XZIs7RY7u7kq9m0hoQOhE0syqizdGRH6Kkpze_pYhY7Rmaiw5juAX5TuMFRKtPI_oUHNOlXSKYaZdTmIvPQk2Kic9xRgpGr2pvYTRWvezfyv5skFBDAVZXnxFT_4M5BMzCR-l8nV6480VteO9KFubeKmoVR0pgC-jVArcCjJexM84PFVWywhqqnI9i4MLw0r2IBc6YlePEbS7xniMULfFmdFDH4_OwIjegIAZNsiBBUbj6voCbuXsJYO)

I can't do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | | | | | | Hi Patriot, I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election. Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots. Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union. Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit): Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy No Mass or Sunday worship service Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time Outrageously, there's more. Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them. Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency). There's much, much more...all of it horrifying. And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA. They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment! This can't go on. I won't allow it. I'm Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years. You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court! I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN! And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court. Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people. Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous. I can't do it without you, Patriot. Thank you for doing whatever you can now. Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Patriot, I'm heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship! - Free the January 6 Protestors! ** Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they're often abused and beaten...they're blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy! name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
In an interview published in Imprimis, Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=53a2d99f4c0d4bfb8d53d3f76459c2db&_e=25iYSgZHFq74lJJMP-G7NVHVVGVmxYytybMAKc63ZAv11FVL1MVAKeF-FTdMa5YDsZcU2rI2-T80hBYXhGTBM_5UimkY_8sr-0Jkln5qWoRhzBV5ppMq0ngnAxEOoz1yCWHPnnLGAPD2tIZv9GPdxgO9xwnu1UfcyVeqb-odIRMDUaMWxvKs2KCuW6--vAq-afYRofvzRKCq-IlqkyMpDcPID4Fl5frbqeyXdVjySlFXwCy-DUNF7fv1VjoB7J-jn4IDmbnkJD5wO9oxDrhnmQltC3OIKGeTNzdSBGkUXPvD0xTEigFOLUd7eQCLOevb8FnFGyny7BXHXBvKzgRj6-nEeFmn1Vz8KeGpNGHq0BfF8uQZX-9gLDjRko86kgL7BsKE42sVYCTmPbUjwfe3sw%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: **" My job is to apply the Constitution."**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=53a2d99f4c0d4bfb8d53d3f76459c2db&_e=25iYSgZHFq74lJJMP-G7NVHVVGVmxYytybMAKc63ZAv11FVL1MVAKeF-FTdMa5YDsZcU2rI2-T80hBYXhGTBM_5UimkY_8sr-0Jkln5qWoRhzBV5ppMq0ngnAxEOoz1yCWHPnnLGAPD2tIZv9GPdxgO9xwnu1UfcyVeqb-odIRMDUaMWxvKs2KCuW6--vAq-afYRofvzRKCq-IlqkyMpDcPID4Fl5frbqeyXdVjySlFXwCy-DUNF7fv1VjoB7J-jd5lpyWq8Y7T1vw4eIq3sDBuqkjBFTZUFiPs754ox6jnaqJGde550uvj_H5qMJrJ8fsYP3urmoYkx5aK70oeK3HV7FJgm9efQX9XwSiEmVMWz6MzogTDZnabQxzX4GGXi01IxEVr8dpVNylZXSco7NA%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=53a2d99f4c0d4bfb8d53d3f76459c2db&_e=25iYSgZHFq74lJJMP-G7NVHVVGVmxYytybMAKc63ZAv11FVL1MVAKeF-FTdMa5YDsZcU2rI2-T80hBYXhGTBM_5UimkY_8sr-0Jkln5qWoRhzBV5ppMq0ngnAxEOoz1yCWHPnnLGAPD2tIZv9GPdxgO9xwnu1UfcyVeqb-odIRMDUaMWxvKs2KCuW6--vAq-afYRofvzRKCq-IlqkyMpDcPID4Fl5frbqeyXdVjySlFXwCy-DUNF7fv1VjoB7J-jw16gbX9_tOEti3QTMKQb3Dzh_3vOFKEczcmse2DZT4XkBpdxp0LFLgm-mPML5GUYU-az2ci_377vkC4oi8ic55MjXSMfPd77pGvBXSDveLsOI4zKNF_bBbd1VkFEfsTqiQCft4rkS83iYKs-Yf-t_A%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=53a2d99f4c0d4bfb8d53d3f76459c2db&_e=25iYSgZHFq74lJJMP-G7NVHVVGVmxYytybMAKc63ZAv11FVL1MVAKeF-FTdMa5YDsZcU2rI2-T80hBYXhGTBM_5UimkY_8sr-0Jkln5qWoRhzBV5ppMq0ngnAxEOoz1yCWHPnnLGAPD2tIZv9GPdxgO9xwnu1UfcyVeqb-odIRMDUaMWxvKs2KCuW6--vAq-afYRofvzRKCq-IlqkyMpDcPID4Fl5frbqeyXdVjySlFXwCy-DUNF7fv1VjoB7J-j_rQxPY3TycpArNnmRkRMxFuD1qjaeirGoTtDSIJ4sXZhwiFfDurfKDmOYwrgf_l4P_J7ExRsXwdX143EQECsk8IBcV_U8_bSmLd0m3izb0VcFmSAWcs60dG8zH5SSpdStysT-Tnk2WqSpI6zv8khag%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution."

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=53a2d99f4c0d4bfb8d53d3f76459c2db&_e=25iYSgZHFq74lJJMP-G7NVHVVGVmxYytybMAKc63ZAv11FVL1MVAKeF-FTdMa5YDsZcU2rI2-T80hBYXhGTBM_5UimkY_8sr-0Jkln5qWoRhzBV5ppMq0ngnAxEOoz1yCWHPnnLGAPD2tIZv9GPdxgO9xwnu1UfcyVeqb-odIRMDUaMWxvKs2KCuW6--vAq-afYRofvzRKCq-IlqkyMpDcPID4Fl5frbqeyXdVjySlFXwCy-DUNF7fv1VjoB7J-jOSey-D_ys6a_CEcas6dQ0l5IdeBLI2CKkOUEQkOXvEVa6dLt5luluYWU71YyQoBQufUvBAuUjm2KriFgEJvsRLKckftSCnmXDYP5aI9ZL9MnQAgYpIiNbrqtzsLw8oZgCoyDTu9V6CpbpRBACNA-5g%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

**[Harry Jaffa vs. Willmoore Kendall Redivivus](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)**
Intellectual leadership of what people are pleased to call the “conservative movement” is in disarray, with numerous champions vying for the crown or recommending that past champions—most often Edmund Burke or Alexis de Tocqueville—be resurrected. Almost all of those contesting for leadership agree that a return to founding principles is necessary, but disagree on the meaning of the founding.

**[Questions for the Washington Uniparty on Ukraine, One Year Later](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)**
Joe Biden’s surprise visit to Ukrainian premier Volodymyr Zelenskyy in Kyiv earlier this week was an unmistakable sign of solidarity with Ukraine on the one-year anniversary of Russian kingpin Vladimir Putin’s reckless, unjust invasion. To the extent Biden’s aim was to send such a symbolic message to Moscow and its allies, he succeeded.

**[Media Demands Darkness, Not Sunlight, on January 6 Tapes](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)**
Ever since Axios reported that House Speaker Kevin McCarthy (R-Calif.) gave Fox News host Tucker Carlson unfettered access to surveillance video captured by Capitol security cameras on January 6, 2021, the corporate media has experienced a collective convulsion bordering on a nervous breakdown. Guardians of the fourth estate long ago abandoned their self-proclaimed role as watchdog over those in power in exchange for the role of lapdog.

In his exceptionally thought-provoking American Greatness article, “Artificial Intelligence and the Passion of Mortality,” Edward Ring explores the ramifications of deeming machines to be sentient and granting them (un)human rights, which will ultimately lead them to having supremacy over humanity—at least until they consider us “problematic” and kill us off. Ring puts his finger on the critical issue of what separates humanity from machines: mortality. We have it; they don’t.

Biden Administration Is Suffering From An ‘Epidemic’ Of Hubris, Tucker Carlson Says Harold Hutchison on February 24, 2023 Fox News host Tucker Carlson said Friday an “epidemic” of hubris has hit the Biden administration, despite a track record of failures, including Afghanistan. “If you spend billions trying to make a place better and it gets worse, you have an obligation to think about why. Maybe you’re doing it wrong. Maybe you’re not as powerful and clever as you thought you were. ‘Superman’s Not Coming’: Ohioans Brace For Tough Road Ahead After Toxic Train Derailment Alexa Schwerha on February 24, 2023 Prominent environmentalist Erin Brockovich hosted a town hall Friday evening in East Palestine, Ohio, to give residents information about steps they can consider after a Norfolk Southern train carrying hazardous chemicals derailed earlier this month. PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178

Fellow Conservative, My message is clear and simple: **NO MORE OIL to Communist China!** I'm proud to be leading the charge, alongside West Virginia Democrat Joe Manchin, to build a bipartisan coalition to stop the Biden administration from shipping one more drop from our nation's oil reserve to our nation's greatest advisory. Senate Republicans are all-in and we have FIVE Democrat cosponsors on the Cruz-Manchin Protecting America's Strategic Petroleum Reserve from China Act!**
** **I shared more on this important legislation on one of the latest episodes of _Verdict_. **
---
[**LISTEN NOW**](http://trk.readactnews._)
---
Joe Biden exploited our nation's oil reserve to drop the cost of gas before the election. You've seen where prices have headed since. And we know that some of the oil the Biden administration released was shipped out to Chinese communists with ties to Joe and Hunter and their business dealings. _You can bet that Joe Biden and his far-left pals are firing up their spin machine to stop us! _ **It's time to take China off the table, period.** The fact that we've drained our stockpile of emergency oil to help fuel China's economic growth is the definition of insanity.

For Liberty,

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: I'm the proud granddaughter of Jewish immigrants
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
I'm proud that my faith tradition helps guide my service to Nevada and our country.
| | |
---
Friend,

Want to know how I first got into politics? I was recruited to run for Congress while serving as the president of my synagogue.

Looking back, although it seems a bit unconventional, it's incredibly fitting that leading Nevada’s largest synagogue was my entry point to public service. My Jewish faith and values are at the very core of so much of my work in the Senate today. In fact, my decision to run for public office in the first place was guided by the Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam – which means to leave the world a better place than how we found it.
**Now, as both the third Jewish woman senator in U.S. history and the only former synagogue president in the Senate, I'm proud that my faith tradition helps guide my service to Nevada and our country.**

I firmly believe that if everybody stands firm and does their part to help better this world, we can move mountains to make positive change happen. **As we face everything from growing antisemitism to attacks on abortion rights and threats to tear down our very democracy, there's never been a more crucial time for us to come together, roll up our sleeves, and make a difference.**
**[So if the principle of Tikkun Olam resonates with you – if you're with me in the fight to make real progress for our country – I hope you'll chip in $5 or more today to help me continue this critical work in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59239941/393658988/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2376-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzVmYzQ1NS0yYWI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AAyWneXwZCw4Tzk_gdGNrWc41z8FpXn0uVf1wwZTmN0=)**
Whenever we have the opportunity to stand up and make progress for the people we love and for our communities, we should. Thank you so much for helping me do that today.

Jacky

As we face everything from growing antisemitism to attacks on abortion rights and threats to tear down our very democracy, there's never been a more crucial time for us to come together, roll up our sleeves, and make a difference. = Whenever we have the opportunity to stand up and make progress for the people we love and for our communities, we should. Thank you so much for helping me do that today. Jacky | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada PO BOX 27195 LAS VEGAS, NV 89126 United States

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Unapologetic pursuit of excellence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
If you're going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding.

| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=be0472e1e0ae45188c6845d956e3f357&_e=l7vxIduGj44Jiturf1z2OIeSHn89Iv97HqA60J8ywT9vXvlCyOaqgb-9ZO_jJ0xEDapPpkNAKuVjosVta1WSKLARjgR6lzLNbc0mTTH5aDpeeXLW8qh7cnMHuiU1NUUCWCg6dPWD_zo6aiA_SHmXmJIn22loHSAI6rN5k_uK6LUe3pb5dlho3jfD51RG1OvARXZkUwAVc3vHJOc3ZeDSiQdzsltEo1sXxLUxNDnRInZP5TmkhjgiGVLOyYpVMI7ZYf7XjV1Lu6FcwIaByMOJ7uut6tmTBPKE6BH0pzj66PLR5PzzQk95FnpRi5Uf8nqU_wAgzcC4ccTP0qRStp-yPC7AIGT6SqiMFQp5s_BwMhMGK9Wxmwm5AMMNeYbD2skd)
Fellow American,

I am lucky. I grew up in Ohio in the '90s back when America still valued merit.

I might have been a skinny kid with a funny last name, but my parents taught me an important lesson: _If you are going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding._

If I'd been born 20 years later, my story would have been impossible. Today our nation is hungry for a cause; we want purpose and meaning.

The woke Left preys on that vacuum with a poisonous obsession with race, sexuality, and climate change. If you disagree with them, they call you a bigot. This is psychological slavery.

Fellow American, the best measure of the health of American democracy is the percentage of citizens who feel free to say what they actually think - _**IN PUBLIC.**_

Right now, we're failing that test.

**That's why I am running for President of the United States.**

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=be0472e1e0ae45188c6845d956e3f357&_e=l7vxIduGj44Jiturf1z2OIeSHn89Iv97HqA60J8ywT9vXvlCyOaqgb-9ZO_jJ0xEDapPpkNAKuVjosVta1WSKLARjgR6lzLNbc0mTTH5aDpeeXLW8qh7cnMHuiU1NUUCWCg6dPWD_zo6aiA_SHmXmJIn22loHSAI6rN5k_uK6LUe3pb5dlho3jfD51RG1OvARXZkUwAVc3vHJOc3ZeDSiQdzsltEo1sXxLUxNDnRInbtIoDO2p4CBTsGt4f79D-ybFix2RquDjkVSGuWJpNsYN-1QWsWvuAIVYwx4jhgzPgu8o-6-b2TT_zqlCr9bz9jZleg3xTh2GAB1IHYpUzZqDA8gmbtY-TBgpHpeIHos1IQuSpFm7l8Y_YfPedt9hC9)
Today, we're starting a cultural movement in our country, Fellow American, and I want you to be a part of it. I want you to join our movement to create a new American dream for the next generation.

This time it isn't just about money. It is about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence itself. It means that we:

Believe in merit.
Believe in accountability.
Believe in free speech.
Believe in American exceptionalism.
Fellow American, if you're on board with these ideals, then we're already on the same team. We're ready to fight for the future of America. If we rediscover our shared national identity, then we can take on the greatest external threat we face: Communist China.

**[Will you join me? Please take just a few minutes to watch my launch video- and join Team Vivek by chipping in $1 or even $5 today as I launch my presidential campaign.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=be0472e1e0ae45188c6845d956e3f357&_e=l7vxIduGj44Jiturf1z2OIeSHn89Iv97HqA60J8ywT9vXvlCyOaqgb-9ZO_jJ0xEDapPpkNAKuVjosVta1WSKLARjgR6lzLNbc0mTTH5aDpeeXLW8qh7cnMHuiU1NUUCWCg6dPWD_zo6aiA_SHmXmJIn22loHSAI6rN5k_uK6LUe3pb5dlho3jfD51RG1OvARXZkUwAVc3vHJOc3ZeDSiQdzsltEo1sXxLUxNDnRInbKhZSGJB8tnfmycdHk7PUU-YNee9PKXU1tyf7yZvOqUfW9N27r299_zGk3z_BUkzaRmfcCbBmozfmRC4AeSqim-5vf_JIvXd5UKFD9lm7GPdJYzG6j8_r6k31F1tLP_Mlrvz8UNKcGqnPhFitoZK65)**

It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy in America - in Washington D.C., on Wall Street, and in Silicon Valley - that does whatever allows them to accumulate more money and power for themselves. They try to divide & conquer, but that won't work if we stay united.

**E pluribus unum - _from many, one._**

These are the ideals that won the American Revolution; that reunited us after the Civil War; that won two World Wars and the Cold War. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist, and I am running for President to revive them.

Join me,

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=be0472e1e0ae45188c6845d956e3f357&_e=l7vxIduGj44Jiturf1z2OIeSHn89Iv97HqA60J8ywT9vXvlCyOaqgb-9ZO_jJ0xEDapPpkNAKuVjosVta1WSKLARjgR6lzLNbc0mTTH5aDpeeXLW8qh7cnMHuiU1NUUCWCg6dPWD_zo6aiA_SHmXmJIn22loHSAI6rN5k_uK6LUe3pb5dlho3jfD51RG1OvARXZkUwAVc3vHJOc3ZeDSiQdzsltEo1sXxLUxNDnRInZb8UXHda1oUbg5Pg1V5JeLhYIVzPP2m3yzZZo5PELn8rYDVdjCoAehmK_hTQzjKXWO5Ja62l19RAErygM50Y4tp-bkGmzk1P8IVTQza7t4tBUnqsOEUBL1tacsBah4P-Vm30cR8DWGfbeRbqhTnPFC)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW ->**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=be0472e1e0ae45188c6845d956e3f357&_e=l7vxIduGj44Jiturf1z2OIeSHn89Iv97HqA60J8ywT9vXvlCyOaqgb-9ZO_jJ0xEDapPpkNAKuVjosVta1WSKLARjgR6lzLNbc0mTTH5aDpeeXLW8qh7cnMHuiU1NUUCWCg6dPWD_zo6aiA_SHmXmJIn22loHSAI6rN5k_uK6LUe3pb5dlho3jfD51RG1OvARXZkUwAVc3vHJOc3ZeDSiQdzsltEo1sXxLUxNDnRInZzEz24vYlEYjUZ2fBN8w0v1YlRFyAQwDAb55frYBjQC_XlBHamz7LmkGiM542jZWLNLTgAieFtq6H64zxA3EkPliAyqoYDac2nJV2n5pqG0GeUn70agl9jlshJ_88Ep8LwlIEM9LN0phpVcFI2uSuD)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: If you're going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding. | Fellow American, I am lucky. I grew up in Ohio in the '90s back when America still valued merit. I might have been a skinny kid with a funny last name, but my parents taught me an important lesson: If you are going to stand out, you might as well be outstanding. If I'd been born 20 years later, my story would have been impossible. Today our nation is hungry for a cause; we want purpose and meaning. The woke Left preys on that vacuum with a poisonous obsession with race, sexuality, and climate change. If you disagree with them, they call you a bigot. This is psychological slavery. Fellow American, the best measure of the health of American democracy is the percentage of citizens who feel free to say what they actually think - IN PUBLIC. Right now, we're failing that test. body:
Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided she was "trans"

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided she was "trans"... _... and fast-tracked her into Kaiser Permanente 's multi-billion-dollar __industry to "transition" her from a girl to a boy._
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8c184790fa24461288fe6a8c8a6492ca&_e=jORlBOlGojLMP70CS4_ddIhEr6WEBb_3kTNjpg2bCkZRQyrf_sDhXOUY0aACrTYMYlcqt4DPWHdK0lYcu2z2D556LjOM8GAQKeacj_Uj7qknC69k9vNu1STqoP_5LxaZn-fW86p06S8knxFnJRMKrY5Gs63OlHiPaEqU9J4aaWLLplaCGEvIqy_vR5UOmI_eQR_NvG7-EBwloANR6aOkSsUNz4g82XO1MwUhu1UNBYnwqq15Zsojn8OaV9v3kINX1_hpfpZzMoppiG4jLlIJnsFzFvKHrMnSPt2tmFrE-5sFwKo_woBxc_hhhgOsbIDTLKiBPrr92LxnMflXRQDPFA_RBcrDpzSgHytQ2sZl8tTvSO06ZX8Y30SE9povnhjRohsMDqpQsiZC2imAr5zv8w%3D%3D)
---
| |
* She was given weekly testosterone injections.
* She was injected with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders.
* And finally, at age 15, the doctors at Kaiser Permanente removed Chloe's healthy breasts in a radical double mastectomy.

---

clean_body: Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided she was "trans" | | | | Fellow Patriot, Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided she was "trans"... ... and fast-tracked her into Kaiser Permanente 's multi-billion-dollar industry to "transition" her from a girl to a boy. | | | She was given weekly testosterone injections. She was injected with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders. And finally, at age 15, the doctors at Kaiser Permanente removed Chloe's healthy breasts in a radical double mastectomy. | | Chloe and her parents were coerced by these doctors into thinking she was a boy. They purposefully lied to her about the side effects of the experimental treatments they were forcing her under. And they effectively used Chloe as a lab rat to "test" their "gender affirming care." Now for the rest of Chloe's life, her voice will always be deeper, she'll never be able to breastfeed - if she can even have children - and who knows what cancers, fertility problems, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more lurk in her future. Bottom line: The doctors at Kaiser Permanente destroyed Chloe 's healthy body for profit. And this is happening to children across America. My non-profit, the Center for American Liberty, is helping Chloe Cole SUE Kaiser Permanente for permanently destroying her body... ... and finally bring justice to those who have suffered the same fate at the hands of doctors they should have been able to trust. | | | I 'm asking you to support Chloe's landmark lawsuit today by contributing a tax-deductible donation of $35 to the case's legal fund. | | | Winning this case won't be easy. Kaiser Permanente is the largest medical group in the country. They're going to come at us with high-powered lawyers to protect their goldmine. But making radical activists like this pay through litigation is the only way we 'll shut them down. | | | I 'm counting on you to join me in Chloe's fight today by supporting our legal battle with a tax-deductible $35 donation to our legal fund.** Any donation you can send today will get us one step closer to finally bringing Chloe the justice she deserves after being coerced and harmed by a hospital that abused her like a lab rat. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for standing up for Chloe and for kids like her across the country. Thank you and God Bless, | | Harmeet K. Dhillon, CEO Center for American Liberty | | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. subject: In Wisconsin, liberal Judge Janet Protasiewicz finished with 46.4% of the vote. The two Republicans received a combined 46.1%. When you add the 7.5% a second Democrat got in the primary, we absolutely have a majority to elect her in April if we keep building her campaign.
body:
State Supreme Court race!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f939e19-ec8d-4eb2-9927-e97064d0327a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

|

| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Last Tuesday’s primary delivered a stunning result in Wisconsin, where an amazing liberal (judicial races are "non-partisan") not only won, but beat her two GOP opponents combined in the open primary for a Supreme Court seat that determines if MAGA devotees or those devoted to the rule of law have final say over this ultimate swing state's electoral votes in 2024. **_Liberal Judge Janet Protasiewicz finished with 46.4% of the vote. The two Republicans received a combined 46.1%. When you add 7.5% a second Democrat got, you see if we continue to fund and support Protasiewicz, we absolutely have a majority to elect her in April._** **_[Celebrate our win by getting Judge Janet Protasiewicz off to the strongest start possible in beating this cave-dwelling bigot, Kelly. Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to ensure we win the seat and prevent disaster?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbe1c96f8-99a4-4b01-839a-1a67d97df211/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_**

|

---
| _**Also, the Republican who won, friend of Trump and far-more-extreme, Daniel Kelly, clarified the race.** _ _This will help explain:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taa9f56f9-b056-4fd5-9a70-370e94846d15/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_You didn't read it wrong. A guy who wants to be on the highest court in Wisconsin compared Social Security to slavery. Attacked gay rights openly and derisively._** **_[So, let's celebrate our win by getting Judge Janet Protasiewicz off to the strongest start possible in beating this cave-dwelling bigot, Kelly. Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to ensure we win the seat and prevent disaster?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T059d4197-9ac7-4370-b814-817fe17efe15/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_** _It's one of the best investments you'll ever make in both a great human being, and democracy._ Cliff

| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T15449f9a-a39d-4f42-8a0f-690d53100033/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: I’m waiting…

body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.

Friend,

It’s been a wild start to 2023. I’ve witnessed first-hand (and been a victim of) the games Kevin McCarthy and his Trumped-up House majority have chosen to play. And they’re just getting started.

Let me be clear: The games these MAGA Republicans are playing are doing nothing but preventing progress for the American people.

Look, I will always be proud of the grassroots support this campaign has built. And I will always keep fighting for the truth, work to hold the MAGA right accountable, and protect our democracy.

But to ensure that I can keep fighting back against Kevin McCarthy’s MAGA games, I need to know that you have my back.

Eric

Hi Peter, hope that you’re doing well. A few weeks ago, I had the honor of joining Congresswoman Debbie Dingell and fellow Midwest Democrats in the launch of what we’re calling the Heartland Caucus. Organized around the idea that we need more Democrats from the Midwest, the Caucus will work to elevate Midwestern values and make sure that our Democratic party is thinking about how to support Heartland communities, to grow American innovation and sustain growth for this generation and generations to come. You may be asking yourself, what’s the importance of the Midwest? What’s the difference between a seat in western Illinois or upstate New York or eastern Washington when it comes to majority math? What I always tell people is that besides being part of our historical base (blue collar manufacturers and farmers), the battleground districts in the Midwest look like the majority of this country. **If we want to grow our Senate majority and continue to win the White House then we must learn how to win seats like IL-17. The path to real change in our country runs right through the Midwest.** **[My race is slated to be one of the most competitive House races in the country. Help me send a message that Democrats refuse to cede ground in the Midwest by chipping in $5 today.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqA0WItqqJyJPc6AGRosYvZFgG82cvqKEn_JEb9_L1yXW_DFVSj9-p64gq3rkuHYBr_J2LAOns16UoLASKIYzKxnyDaAAW-YYBiBSDBt0RKBAWhBuy2IyffT3eeiFJ-WGap1_Pq98nujeMex4iTfc5XIqonV_uZ30sCkbwK6A6ESmIn4REna2bm0dEgR539isl3tXKX1Z06ipgnE4kCConm6wR2Hg6qDDkDs620-AUX89_VN37Z4dWbO3XTSLibl-Apuohy-EA7p9gwKr5WX782sZ5N98-fk8EEJ22e0c5s0IoPxT1UGlIYX04bILaiIwtJe2jLPAEg2-daht-jQ9AVUJCD6iGsIZL7ke6HSnuzO8I/3u0/obcPfb3PSjW2Xy-fO0YWdQ/h1/6sDM1ARrwtOeoyp4nqyhZl-aso77Q218srErFk6iNGI)**

---
I’ve been thinking about my role in Congress for the next two years (and hopefully more). I am the climate communicator and the science communicator, but I also want to be the Midwestern communicator. As I said at the introductory press conference, “We represent industry, manufacturing, new ideas that move us forward. And yes the home of John Deere. We are the heartland, because we represent the heart that ensures our economy keeps beating.” There is so much work that I want to do (and our team is already doing) around lowering costs, bringing sustainable jobs back to Central and Northwest Illinois, investing in broadband expansion, supporting our family farmers, and taking meaningful steps to address climate change. **But I see this role to be just as crucial: without the Midwest, and districts like mine, Democrats will not be able to hold the Senator or White House in 2024. And there's no way we can flip the House without districts like mine.** If you'd like to support our efforts toward progress, send in a donation to help us keep this seat blue. Donate here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-q1-2023](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqA0WItqqJyJPc6AGRosYvZFgG82cvqKEn_JEb9_L1yXW_DFVSj9-p64gq3rkuHYBr_J2LAOns16UoLASKIYzKxn33OG661Yb5ss6OrntwyNLpkZhH2c3n_ykY7VGKPVeaptGmHyEKzuvzP4Nqc0YGicveDNTJscCM7MFwxNy1XcPwcca9zv1OXwu5IWmWOSv6tfj2i1nPBN0x3gkfi11D8dEe9SYEajXPk22MAqYmXVWm4HhT04QFJ2xJJIfVNB7QyQnH4tzS1zb99pl6IgpJacVPo0hF_vqNwku2-HZQ3kC8ZudJmvZAvJmuTaMB_KuzEMScSKHuoIpxXT3hMbHBPqHsbwJq6w5zqShdR8XYP7kc/3u0/obcPfb3PSjW2Xy-fO0YWdQ/h3/p5RQ8sfTY3PAXVOB1yIxljHu_ns3uOtxcZ4IHk1nOd8)** Be well and talk soon! \- Eric

We’re approaching the end of the month, and I want to tell you why it’s important to start preparing for 2024. At the end of March, we’ll have to report our numbers publicly to the FEC, and the NRCC will take a look at that report and judge the strength of our grassroots team. The next few weeks will set the narrative for how our race unfolds.

**[I'm reaching out to ask personally for your support, because we're still short by $5,112 of where we need to be by February 28. Can you rush $5 today to help us make up the gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59225445/393609627/-1372990689?refcode=EM_FR_230225FR_N_MK_60DA_5_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODE2ODY0Zi0wY2I1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vTZwniYP5GeAVGKWcbJPNWJeUvO1PybrFXLfw6dVTxY=)**

If we miss our early goals, extreme Republicans will gain ground in a seat that Democrats have to hold if we want to win back the House.

I’m working around the clock to continue to get things done for Ohio, just as I have my entire career. And now I’m coming to you for your early support.

It's through the support of grassroots donors like you that we are able to get our message out. **So if you can, please donate $5 today by using this link here:** **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur_feb2023](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59225446/393609628/-1372990689?refcode=EM_FR_230225FR_N_MK_60DA_5_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODE2ODY0Zi0wY2I1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vTZwniYP5GeAVGKWcbJPNWJeUvO1PybrFXLfw6dVTxY=)**

Thank you so much,

Marcy Kaptur

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Suing to stop medical malpractice
body:
| |
---
| | Patriot, I recently announced on _Tucker Carlson Tonight_ that we're suing the activist doctors and hospitals of medical giant, Kaiser Permanente, **and I need your immediate help**. Specifically, I'm asking you to support our groundbreaking lawsuit on behalf of Chloe Cole - an innocent and healthy girl who was turned into a lifelong medical patient by Kaiser Permanente, who decided to start "transitioning" her from female to male when she was just 13 years old. These doctors and hospitals who abuse children to advance a twisted agenda must be stopped before one more child is put under their knives and experimented on. **Making monsters like this pay through litigation is the only way we 'll stop this barbaric practice.** [**That 's why I'm asking you to support Chloe's landmark lawsuit today by contributing a tax-deductible donation to the case's legal fund.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62365570:64XATcGyN:m:1:3391001263:2EF19A6F78C653670FD9FB4A36D62888:r) Chloe was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided she was "trans"... ... and fast-tracked her into Kaiser Permanente's multi-billion-dollar cottage industry to "transition" her from a girl to a boy.
---
| |
* She was given weekly testosterone injections.
* She was injected with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders.
* And finally, at age 15, the doctors at Kaiser Permanente removed Chloe's healthy breasts in a radical double mastectomy.

---
| | **They destroyed Chloe 's healthy body for profit.** **And this is happening to other children across America.** With your help today, our case can help stop this madness. We MUST set a loud and clear legal precedent before their predatory movement goes any further. Because the radical Left not only supports these grotesque sex-change surgeries for children... they want them to be taxpayer funded in every state... Make no mistake: winning this case won't be easy. Kaiser Permanente is the largest medical group in the country. They're going to come at us with high-powered lawyers to protect their goldmine. On her own, Chloe would never have the resources to battle a giant like Kaiser Permanente. But battles like hers are why I started this non-profit, the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty is honored to be fighting in the courts for American values and bringing together talented lawyers who are ready to fight and people like Chloe who have nowhere else to turn. **But we don 't have the big money that our opponents have.** [**That 's why I need you to click this link right now to give a generous, tax-deductible donation to support Chloe's landmark lawsuit today.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62365570:64XATcGyN:m:1:3391001263:2EF19A6F78C653670FD9FB4A36D62888:r) If you can donate today - please do so. Click one of these buttons below to give your best possible donation to support Chloe and the Center for American Liberty win this historic and critical lawsuit against radical medical professionals victimizing vulnerable children:
---
| | [**DONATE $50**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62365570:64XATcGyN:m:1:3391001263:2EF19A6F78C653670FD9FB4A36D62888:r)
---
[**DONATE $100**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62365570:64XATcGyN:m:1:3391001263:2EF19A6F78C653670FD9FB4A36D62888:r)
---
[**DONATE $250**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62365570:64XATcGyN:m:1:3391001263:2EF19A6F78C653670FD9FB4A36D62888:r)
---
[**DONATE $500**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62365570:64XATcGyN:m:1:3391001263:2EF19A6F78C653670FD9FB4A36D62888:r)
---
[**DONATE $1,000**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62365570:64XATcGyN:m:1:3391001263:2EF19A6F78C653670FD9FB4A36D62888:r)
---
[**DONATE ANY AMOUNT**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62365570:64XATcGyN:m:1:3391001263:2EF19A6F78C653670FD9FB4A36D62888:r)
---
This will be a long and expensive fight, but together, I know we can win.
---
| | Thank you and God Bless,
---
| |
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon, CEO
---
Center for American Liberty
---
|
---
| | P.S. YOU can stop the doctors and hospitals who irreversibly harm vulnerable children in the name of "gender affirming care" by giving a generous tax-deductible donation to our legal fund. The success of our lawsuit - _Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente_ - depends on us banding together to stop this barbaric treatment. Thank you!
---
| | [**Donate >**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62365570:64XATcGyN:m:1:3391001263:2EF19A6F78C653670FD9FB4A36D62888:r)
---
| |
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62365570:64XATcGyN:m:1:3391001263:2EF19A6F78C653670FD9FB4A36D62888:r)

---

If you are outside of Anchorage and want to watch the Kickoff, please click here or see our Facebook Page**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=63fa510f4eb0925cd7074c69&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fprofile.php%3Fid%3D100088118914747&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_63fa4e31afe1902d8f954b18&l=en-US&s=Evo_wdALEVxu4OVplcbMKtAl1w0%3D)

---
#### **More Signing Dates Below, Make Sure To Share with Friends & Family**
---
**admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com or call 907-802-8116****We only need 26,000 signatures, which is the lowest amount in history since we had the lowest turnout by percentage in history. Rank Choice Voting has made our job even easier. Let’s Do This Alaska.****If you would like to help us collect signatures, please sign up here** https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures**The Pro Rank Choice Voting group paid $300k and used mostly out of state signature gatherers, we want this done “By Alaskans, For Alaskans”**
---
#### **An Alaska Senator has said that our Bill is the Most Important Bill for the 2024 Election. We need you to get there. Help us Today!!!**
---
---
|
---
### **Come Sign Today**
#### **Want To Sign The First Petition To Get Rid Of Rank Choice Voting!!!**

There are 40 House Districts, we need at least 35 or 75% of the districts. Attached is a breakdown of how many signatures we need per district. We will need signature gatherers in each district. The sign up link is the only way we can keep track of all of the people who are getting petition books. The group that passed Ranked Choice Voting in 2020 spent over $300,000 just on the signature gathering process, they paid an out of state firm to gather signatures here in Alaska. We want to have Alaskans in charge this time around. They collected 40,000 signatures, we want to collect 75,000.
Link to sign up for a Petition Book
[https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=63fa510f4eb0925cd7074c69&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fpetition-signatures%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D63fa4e31afe1902d8f954b18%26ss_email_id%3D63fa510f4eb0925cd7074c69%26ss_campaign_name%3DCome%2BSign%2BIn%2BAnchorage%2BToday%2521%2521%2521%2BCall%2Bor%2BEmail%2Bif%2BYou%2Bneed%2BDirections%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-02-25T18%253A19%253A24Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_63fa4e31afe1902d8f954b18&l=en-US&s=PKlL6-NkXVyvur8IP8-AhrTx7cw%3D)Please use the link below to find your house district or include your address if you do not know your house district. Scroll to the bottom and it has a search by address, which should tell you Your House and Senate Representatives.
[https://akleg.gov/Districts.php](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=63fa510f4eb0925cd7074c69&u=https%3A%2F%2Fakleg.gov%2FDistricts.php&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_63fa4e31afe1902d8f954b18&l=en-US&s=6Jji76zZn6LimYjWIEkudMxesa4%3D)**To get involved please email**[**Admin@AlaskansForHonestElections.com**](mailto:admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com?subject=Newsletter%20Contact)

---
### Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers!
---
**We have completed two parts to the Petition Process, please read 3 and 4 below to learn about the next steps.****1.** Collect 100 Sponsor Signatures**(Completed November 23rd, 2022)****2.** After the Lt. Governor approves our initiative, we will need to collect 10% of the most recent General Election, which is the lowest turnout in 12 years, so our actual signatures needed will be less than 40,000. At this point (December-January 2022) we are collecting sponsor signatures to take a lead roll in removing Ranked Choice Voting from Alaska.**(Completed January 20th, 2023)****3\. We now need to collect signatures from at least 30,000 Registered Alaskan Voters, we will receive 500 Petition Books, each Book contains 150 Signatures. We need help, please see our timeline and either email, call, or text us if you would like to get involved.****4\. We will need signatures from 75% of the House Districts, We plan to collect signatures from 100% of the 40 House Districts. We will need to collect 10% of the total number of voters in the previous election in each House District. Please let us know if you have questions about this.**
---
[_ _ Call Us or Text Us Here _ _](tel:+19078028116)
---
---
|
---
**Rank choice was sold to Alaska by outsiders as a means to control dark money. Outsiders put more of their money than ever before in our elections. It did not work!****99% of their funding came from out of Alaska.****Rank Choice voting has proven to discourage voter turnout. This past election had the lowest turn out since 2010. It is so complicated that 1000’s did not vote.****Some voters, votes are counted 2 or 3 times. Not fair! It should be 1 person 1 vote.****This is not a partisan issue. Rank Choice voting affected everyone. In at least 1 race the Democrat received less that 15% of the vote.****Rank Choice creates division and bitterness.**

body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a c Hillsdale College | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fde02fc366fa4c4c8f6e8b248c3f9f5a&_e=FqgOleENo0uM-DSAdAXFNSnJPPNB2A4k4zmhoA09vhoNGs-zcxYqVneLQEyKmIo6ph8qQM63zY35ZnEuSMimwRNp-K1TbvmE8bkk8YuyD5I0fPgL_lt3BpGXNwjvgma2OyZhN_0FxdeL8OoVoyNQq0wtA3pdRylIsZRyS09gKg5sOqeP1knkGiGlk25V24yHxxxurSO921xOLSSbJWMVuER93_6eg3aCYS7XQaU5FClp2nqpepsUK3Ep2DbbBb60m7Udtf9Ec-Bs_VRrKSdgfW49oPgpFvLsTDfMrSYVZa0m3abzACPoEL8ViMB23Ar2Voy_TN1H2J0FJQgnl0tJ-m_Sky2VAMw69tRV4VXXi4pgbpQD7FclQgpBmmomstZYU3bBGwZ16O2cNSkxU0OfFw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fde02fc366fa4c4c8f6e8b248c3f9f5a&_e=FqgOleENo0uM-DSAdAXFNSnJPPNB2A4k4zmhoA09vhoNGs-zcxYqVneLQEyKmIo6ph8qQM63zY35ZnEuSMimwRNp-K1TbvmE8bkk8YuyD5I0fPgL_lt3BpGXNwjvgma2OyZhN_0FxdeL8OoVoyNQq0wtA3pdRylIsZRyS09gKg5sOqeP1knkGiGlk25V24yHxxxurSO921xOLSSbJWMVuER93_6eg3aCYS7XQaU5FClp2nqpepsUK3Ep2DbbBb60OO4GnVaegx3G_XiHy6_cv_SOeQX8cb8OERNG5Jj2slPZycpB2yCpaX8HkfOoqcKFAdrPwGpa_3gqAIP1-4evv0DGIY-53yR8KCndPM4bmC-oAuR5BhiFjRIE6imnd05V2hGa4c9SqWahqS-PetLp-A%3D%3D) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale’s excellent faculty — the same professors who teach here on campus. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fde02fc366fa4c4c8f6e8b248c3f9f5a&_e=FqgOleENo0uM-DSAdAXFNSnJPPNB2A4k4zmhoA09vhoNGs-zcxYqVneLQEyKmIo6ph8qQM63zY35ZnEuSMimwRNp-K1TbvmE8bkk8YuyD5I0fPgL_lt3BpGXNwjvgma2OyZhN_0FxdeL8OoVoyNQq0wtA3pdRylIsZRyS09gKg5sOqeP1knkGiGlk25V24yHxxxurSO921xOLSSbJWMVuER93_6eg3aCYS7XQaU5FClp2nqpepsUK3Ep2DbbBb60k37Ia_ajnpvErSJ_fbWby13TJk6T4wgsvOGQaFE9HtccbfNfSva12XYq8e92rQBjytBvIwP6q4OEgHJ92fsteKOdC3mz-nfi9WkcLq1NjpxJGcjpE0JWLhKYXeJvpt4XaV8TdvJqJ6GbkoiayaD60A%3D%3D) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c50ef4baa7e44ad1b53e3aa6f893e824&_e=yXdqeNAvs8Oope4fjOT-J0bEsyqv189KeO7K4G_WjzfFHEHqHzrDz8HU8oI-dcl3KdX9HX0AgJyQwuxmd5CVVsWnHQqTe02NmP-0BVDsSfspuSg7v8fzdoBj496_yfn_rU-J5AG0HkYvOKecH8ZyAEBObnfRsDc9eOEfWemfmDU6GralJr5GFyWH83szOrryexTwxboh1Mnoz1wgAeSlUBYm4a6AtTVwXCDDGXcYj4v-3PWB0xe2JKu_tsyp6JjrGT4Quy_V6G-Ld_AhtyQmuRONSysR9dLksKHkg40qYnVrH1nmSBi1Gx0U0jR5nfVpL0Ro3EbGs_vrHSYBkkNFV_YjOJ442qQjvvn7TtCfV8NEbZkI9W6NzIh-pwM0GVimMJS-IFN_TEo3Hs6bW9diHXdIuSNrKaQD3PGhzWbMqamHtC8DMmds6kyeH4Wz1nv7)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c50ef4baa7e44ad1b53e3aa6f893e824&_e=yXdqeNAvs8Oope4fjOT-J0bEsyqv189KeO7K4G_WjzfFHEHqHzrDz8HU8oI-dcl3KdX9HX0AgJyQwuxmd5CVVsWnHQqTe02NmP-0BVDsSfspuSg7v8fzdoBj496_yfn_rU-J5AG0HkYvOKecH8ZyAEBObnfRsDc9eOEfWemfmDU6GralJr5GFyWH83szOrryexTwxboh1Mnoz1wgAeSlUBYm4a6AtTVwXCDDGXcYj4v-3PWB0xe2JKu_tsyp6JjrGT4Quy_V6G-Ld_AhtyQmuTOCpdbhoUMm6PIO4L-3_rKgJPHfS1gbiStsyOLw7g6c_cTZ0qs1Z_YB7ArkAlLDE1OVDvEumO5N4Nxj8mP_e-d_jmjXYFcWslbF1iMFeLWsLu8sS0Ah_aA4nm5794MianlUoncs1eQE5CJvVr0cK63yoWy9uzxU5gsYMePi-6qr)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c50ef4baa7e44ad1b53e3aa6f893e824&_e=yXdqeNAvs8Oope4fjOT-J0bEsyqv189KeO7K4G_WjzfFHEHqHzrDz8HU8oI-dcl3KdX9HX0AgJyQwuxmd5CVVsWnHQqTe02NmP-0BVDsSfspuSg7v8fzdoBj496_yfn_rU-J5AG0HkYvOKecH8ZyAEBObnfRsDc9eOEfWemfmDU6GralJr5GFyWH83szOrryexTwxboh1Mnoz1wgAeSlUBYm4a6AtTVwXCDDGXcYj4v-3PWB0xe2JKu_tsyp6JjrGT4Quy_V6G-Ld_AhtyQmuRbaGYLbfxGq5W1m0Spdm8fhYY5I4qzQQmMEoAOqTNK9ryuSeZlGYDnb41os5FKR8F5z0ZdZaVfPcXtxk5LqgYzVemaEK3WbPOOvU4EyLHDS5aWEs0efU4TvNa53IMFNhVvalsOR1lNn9A2FXI6lR1yfaUL-Mwz3E9h6BuVn8N2f)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c50ef4baa7e44ad1b53e3aa6f893e824&_e=yXdqeNAvs8Oope4fjOT-J0bEsyqv189KeO7K4G_WjzfFHEHqHzrDz8HU8oI-dcl3KdX9HX0AgJyQwuxmd5CVVsWnHQqTe02NmP-0BVDsSfspuSg7v8fzdoBj496_yfn_rU-J5AG0HkYvOKecH8ZyAEBObnfRsDc9eOEfWemfmDU6GralJr5GFyWH83szOrryexTwxboh1Mnoz1wgAeSlUBYm4a6AtTVwXCDDGXcYj4v-3PWB0xe2JKu_tsyp6JjrGT4Quy_V6G-Ld_AhtyQmuXT76fU7KSFS_ZDNQjOLb1T_CokP4CI9Yp8xiRFjGCDFK5Kook2xx5vfEk1Gl5wAsr50dy2l9u24JmP7ySVsOBhN7S-gVLRblQUO2Jjul4kC3kzvxViruaQDg6xDBPCdIa5JRtYr1U56o0susNAauxAwl80nwTQ3CwIGTRcB1g_N).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

I was one of 11 Air Force veterans who had their personal military records illegally STOLEN by Democrat operatives.

Don Bacon

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Would Medicaid expansion improve healthcare in Mississippi? – update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132832?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Ever since the 2010 Affordable Care Act, states have been able to enroll low income Americans onto Medicaid using federal subsidies.** So far, thirty nine states have signed up to expand Medicaid this way. **Mississippi is one of eleven states that hasn’t. Should we?**

**The debate over Medicaid expansion in Mississippi is a perfect example of what happens when politics becomes polarized.** The argument generates heat rather than light. Advocates on either side stopped listening to each other long ago.

**Those opposed to Medicaid expansion refer to it as ‘Obamacare’ as though simply associating the idea with the 44 th President was reason enough to reject it. **
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=e777ff0137&e=5703353baa)
---
_Click above to watch Dr. Lee Gross of Florida describe his method for health care - a subscription model that ultimately costs less than regular insurance prices with better quality care._
| **Advocates for more Medicaid often imply that those on the other side harbor some sort of moral flaw.** Governor Tate Reeves has been remarkably consistent in opposing more government throughout his career. This has not prevented various critics from implying that his rejection of Medicaid expansion is cynical or opportunistic.

**What most Mississippians, I suspect, really want to know is will more Medicaid mean better health care? **

**Medicaid has already been expanding in Mississippi** , even without our state formally opting into the provisions of the Affordable Care Act (ACA). Between 2014 and 2023, Medicaid spending in Mississippi rose almost 40 percent. This year, Medicaid spending will total an estimated $7.2 billion. **There are currently about 880,000 Mississippians on Medicaid, a 22 percent increase over the past three years.**

Expanding Medicaid further under the provisions of the ACA would mean enrolling every low income adult (those on less than $20,120 pa) on to Medicaid. This would place an estimated 300,000 more people on Medicaid in Mississippi, meaning over 1.1 million Mississippians were signed up for Medicaid.

**“And about time too!” some might say. “If 300,000 more people qualified for Medicaid, we would see a dramatic fall in the number of uninsured, meaning more people accessing better health care”.** But would they?

**Advocates for expansion have yet to show that increasing the number of Medicaid claimants by a third would of itself mean improved access to health care.** Might not enrolling over a quarter of a million more Mississippians on Medicaid just make it harder for those on Medicaid to get the health care they need? **It’s not as if the 880,000 current Medicaid recipients are getting optimal outcomes, is it? **

Those wanting to expand Medicaid often cite the state of our cash-strapped rural hospitals in support. More Medicaid patients, they tell us, would save these hospitals from closure. Are we certain of that?

**We already know that rural hospitals lose approximately 12 cents on the dollar for every Medicaid patient that they treat.** How would increasing the number of loss making Medicaid patients save them? Rather than insult those that raise this point, or accuse them of dishonesty, those wanting to add 300,000 more people onto Medicaid ought to address it.

**On the opposing side I have yet to hear a slam dunk explanation as to why Mississippi should reject a scheme that would see Washington DC shoulder 90 percent of the costs.**

“Ha! Just wait until that federal subsidy dries up! The cost of all this extra Medicaid will end up being paid for out of state taxes” some have said to me. Really?

Federal subsidies might only cover 50 – 78 percent of the cost of earlier Medicaid enrollees, but I am not aware of any state currently having to pay more than 10 percent of the costs of expansion under the ACA. Were that to change, to be fair, it would have massive consequences for tax rates in our state seeing as Medicaid in Mississippi costs in excess of $7 billion. It would mean goodbye income tax elimination and hello tax hikes – forever.

**Those opposed to federal subsidies for Medicaid might be more convincing if they had opposed subsidies for all those other boondoggles down the decades. **

A few days ago, the brilliant Florida physician, Dr Lee Gross, was in Jackson talking about a different way of providing affordable health care. Dr Gross’ model does not involve insurance, socialised or otherwise. **Dr Gross’ patients, many of whom are on low incomes, pay a monthly subscription of $80 ($30 per child). In return they get unlimited primary health care treatment.**

**How is Dr Gross able to make this work as a viable business? Precisely because he does not deal with insurance companies.** According to Dr Gross, it is the interaction between insurers and providers that pushes up cost for physicians and patients – and which helps explain why America has some of the highest health care costs in the world.

Simply offering to deal with providers on a cash basis allows Dr Gross’ medical practice to secure substantial discounts (for example a 95 percent discount for an MRI scan), which he passes on to patients making his subscription model viable. **Here is a list of some of the cost reductions Dr Gross is able to routinely secure for his patients. **
---
|
---
| $19,723 Vs $301. It’s worth taking these ideas seriously if our goal really is to help low income Mississippians get affordable heathcare, no?

Subscription-based primary care provision works in Florida because there is a competitive market in services – and is growing rapidly. There are not the restrictive laws that we have here in Mississippi that intentionally limit the number of providers. **Mississippi’s Certificate of Need laws intentionally prevent more providers offering services in competition with one another. This, not too much or too little Medicaid, is our number one health problem. **

If policy makers in Mississippi really want to ensure better health outcomes, they should remove the myriad of protectionist laws. No amount of federal subsidy will improve outcomes as long as they remain.

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=66fe3db2b9&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=111f2f295c) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=111f2f295c).

| | | Peter,

| | This month, Mitch McConnell removed me from a Senate Committee for challenging him for Republican Leader. This is what happens when you challenge leadership in Washington. It’s the kind of vintage Washington insider move you find here in the swamp. But that won’t stop me from pushing Senate Republican leaders to act like Republicans. I stand by my decision to challenge Mitch McConnell for Minority Leader, and I’ll continue to fight Washington insiders who make Washington work for _them_ instead of _you_. Maybe they’ll take away my parking spot, next? We came so close in 2020 — by laying the groundwork immediately, we can help deliver a victory for Joe Biden and Democrats across the state. | **= With our committed network of supporters like you, it’s easier for our team to make campaign plans in advance of 2024 than it might be for other Democrats. You always step up when we need your help, and you know how key NC will be in upcoming election years. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thanks! Team Cooper **=** **=** Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. body:

clean_body: By now you’ve probably heard that Senator Dianne Feinstein is retiring after an incredible and impactful career serving our country. This also means there is about to be an open Senate seat in my home state of California. | = | Peter, By now you’ve probably heard that Senator Dianne Feinstein is retiring after an incredible career serving our country. This also means there is about to be an open Senate seat in my home state of California. So now it’s my turn to make a major announcement... I have decided I will NOT be running for Senate this year (nor was I ever really considering it.) 🤣🤣🤣 The truth is I love representing my community in Congress and proving to them that government can be used for good. I also know the best way I can continue to protect our democracy from Donald Trump is by holding one of the most competitive House seats blue. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- I’m proud to be from the Valley - my heart is here and my work is here. However, I’m really afraid that if we don’t protect my seat and take back the House next year, Republicans could have total control over Congress - regardless of who wins California’s Senate race. And that will have devastating consequences for our country. = Thank you for continuing this journey with me! \- Josh *

body:
Senator Sinema’s refusal to bypass the filibuster has real world consequences for people.
#

Peter -
$3.
That is the contribution we are asking you to make before our end-of-month fundraising deadline comes to a close.
Not for Ruben. Maybe not even for you.
$3 for the person who has to choose between medicine and utilities.
$3 for the person who has an impossible time voting because of Republican voter suppression.
$3 for the person who needs an abortion but can’t access one because Senator Sinema wouldn’t vote to protect that right.
Senator Sinema’s refusal to bypass the filibuster has real world consequences for people. She had the power to help millions of Americans, and she chose to side with hedge fund managers, drug executives and Mitch McConnell.
Ruben won’t make that mistake. But it will take ALL OF US to get him into office. So please - do it for someone you don’t know.

name: Senator Scott
subject: Mitch McConnell booted me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
| | Mitch McConnell removed me from a Senate Committee for challenging him for Republican Leader. This is what happens when you challenge leadership in Washington. It's the kind of vintage Washington insider move you find here in the swamp. But that won't stop me from pushing Senate Republican leaders to act like Republicans. I stand by my decision to challenge Mitch McConnell for Minority Leader, and I'll continue to fight Washington insiders who make Washington work for _them_ instead of _you_. Maybe they'll take away my parking spot, next? [**Can I count on your support?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62365251:JyGkkcGNG:m:1:3365131770:F5D378032E3C400BBF7AABD12586F14F:r)
