body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD | | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=86d2e7536cbb4f8aa266a698ee2ea312&_e=v-Iyk_akkobt571XHRvBjhLUJLhCdaPmJ4GkISJhUJexNMXyeE1-CNR3QG25Y59zX7ewqQle30fUJxUxy8Ot3f4farnpwG_2jCfNBWzwFQGCXVV3t1nPbL_j0fqnqxVjFIEzAQuzQN4Npybwtb2W_A5m-hncdIedyF1u1fBFlhEB3xFt8UP3E9GHH-cxxsF3CSfn4OoEuCZxfGTNYmhAbDIEDF9HUL12pxkjUz8GWMGcgXwmXst1S-zntlyPoeMcNKsra-P3eDJwAHK15U1u1O4of1TTI4ws-frZOkrOlDPdlw3xW10PuDSzg1OdNe4eNxOegjB8BwBa1vpaDYJjPsapYpye4F5qoe9bHz4-CS08DyM2NIEf2B7-mUVLga4uu659hfTFWVPFZwAGF9HX8g%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=86d2e7536cbb4f8aa266a698ee2ea312&_e=v-Iyk_akkobt571XHRvBjhLUJLhCdaPmJ4GkISJhUJexNMXyeE1-CNR3QG25Y59zX7ewqQle30fUJxUxy8Ot3f4farnpwG_2jCfNBWzwFQGCXVV3t1nPbL_j0fqnqxVjFIEzAQuzQN4Npybwtb2W_A5m-hncdIedyF1u1fBFlhEB3xFt8UP3E9GHH-cxxsF3CSfn4OoEuCZxfGTNYmhAbDIEDF9HUL12pxkjUz8GWMGcgXwmXst1S-zntlyPoeMc9mXLkRDoTBGo_f89tz3BtCpAoezHGZzwK_L2C3O_mckLsxy1Vxgs6OvPtkjtGtZVNT1CvjxNXblbr9LP54ECdMBxi5NDEnUU747S2_8RXE8YqY8qrclpX40v26oLYu60CxtBgqSFGJJL_mvQnDD_aQ%3D%3D) I hope you're having a great day so far. Today, I'm writing to let you know that we've produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our "Constitution 101" course, and I'd like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College's world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. "Constitution 101" is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=86d2e7536cbb4f8aa266a698ee2ea312&_e=v-Iyk_akkobt571XHRvBjhLUJLhCdaPmJ4GkISJhUJexNMXyeE1-CNR3QG25Y59zX7ewqQle30fUJxUxy8Ot3f4farnpwG_2jCfNBWzwFQGCXVV3t1nPbL_j0fqnqxVjFIEzAQuzQN4Npybwtb2W_A5m-hncdIedyF1u1fBFlhEB3xFt8UP3E9GHH-cxxsF3CSfn4OoEuCZxfGTNYmhAbDIEDF9HUL12pxkjUz8GWMGcgXwmXst1S-zntlyPoeMcwzoNkoKHbmgfjMxjn9WjXONl8p_B2X_80lnH9V_xezdyBzaSYM8QmcDcYk4SxbkSRBS7On4UIZAUE5QpBQ-mFn5qEe_ZrpZGN8ZDWFA7QqcMaA1GB_n15VpCKiY1MVOW8HE3k266_YN0lu0AyyHG3w%3D%3D) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new "Constitution 101" DVD box set are limited, so I hope you'll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844

body:
You’ll want to see this | | |
---
| | Sound the alarm, Friend—
---
**NOT ONE...BUT TWO MORE MAJOR DEM GROUPS ARE COMING FOR NEW JERSEY’S TOM KEAN:****_EMILY’S LIST AND HOUSE MAJORITY FORWARD._**
---
[**HELP TOM FIGHT BACK**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=0cab48bf4b044a88b274aa620d775baa&_e=6jBP7OrEplZd2TADTNr4pL2qN4i5V0wFbYQdhxVSOOzpwCZ0gQniFJUWFo5h5iVJQ-jTWsVm8VAEolMUo0HqdaTiJSrRZvfwizpm04LkYpRQY94oMo1uvEbH01X2DvXqatoShK1xMWueJxcUuDNLmTJ_fLT2ZQ8Wz1z7I6WIAemihnw-KRLLt3aeYZfMpFIg8GbHqOqPdVizeZzfqPYN0jHZ3mzu7K86m7hyTRAlk_ST_cjL7_1zwqI1MNE55PsoM9UFHKwrtTg1LC557Ymca-7OgeXPweDlNxhbGPKTH3wvQn5OIxcqa_Z2Cqqiu6Mf2DJNYP4ASRYQRX4sGrZKZ2i8zIwZkugNbW6hBfze3pqWjfJyvhVq9C5-ta6A0H8Nrlfo32X7rYHIDlYUaBySuA%3D%3D)
---
House Majority Forward is launching a six-figure digital and billboard campaign in Congressional districts across the country—**including Tom Kean’s.** If you take anything away from this, friend, it’s this: The new Republican Majority Congress has barely been sworn in. Peter, It’s CAPT Hung Cao, and I’m reaching out to you because I can trust you.

This message is secure material between you and me, so please don’t share it with anyone else.

Right now, our mission is at a critical juncture, and I’m counting on our top patriots to step up.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Leadership in tough times
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Running for office is a way for me to continue my service to this country, and to Michigan.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/193?t=1&akid=27%2E135344%2EbCjYbI)
Friend -
When you spend five years running for office and have three tough elections in those five years, people often ask you what keeps you going. I’ve got one answer I always return to: **service.**
I was in New York City on my second day of grad school when 9/11 happened, and it changed my life. I knew I wanted to dedicate my career to national security. I went on to serve at the CIA, the White House, and the Pentagon, where I worked on some of the world’s toughest problems.
Running for office is a way for me to continue my service to this country and to Michigan.
And this week, I’ve been reminded of how important service is after the tragedy at Michigan State University, the second school shooting in my district in 15 months. Our community is grieving and we need our elected leaders in Congress to wake up and realize what should be a no-brainer: We should be able to have a real conversation about keeping our kids safe.
Whether it’s passing laws to make our communities and children safer or fighting for protections for people with pre-existing conditions and bringing down the over-the-top price of healthcare — I will always try to serve Michiganders with hard work, present leadership, and a commitment to making things a little bit easier.
**I just wrote an op-ed in the Detroit Free Press about the work we are doing in Michigan in response to the tragedy at Michigan State University. If you have time, give it a read and stay up to date with our work.**
**[READ THE OP-ED](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/189?t=2&akid=27%2E135344%2EbCjYbI)**
My very best,
Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=27%2E135344%2EbCjYbI).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

With just 3 days left, I have a really important ask: can you chip in just $5 to help us reach our end-of-month goal? | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59234364/393637316/815293876?refcode=230225-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDA2MjI1Zi0xZGI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hd_3hv14GJswEDVewCx-AfW3NODPJwbl-0Rd7QF46wo=) Friend – We are nearing the end of the shortest month of the year. With just three days left, I have a really important ask: [**can you chip in just $5 to help us reach our end-of-month goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59234368/393637320/815293876?refcode=230225-email&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDA2MjI1Zi0xZGI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hd_3hv14GJswEDVewCx-AfW3NODPJwbl-0Rd7QF46wo=) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59234371/393637323/1061643755?refcode=230225-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDA2MjI1Zi0xZGI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hd_3hv14GJswEDVewCx-AfW3NODPJwbl-0Rd7QF46wo=)** My team and I have worked hard to make this short month as strong as possible, but with less time to fundraise, we are falling short. That's why I’m reaching out to you all directly. So far, I have loved representing our community in DC. We have gotten off to a great start in Congress, and I know that we’ll be able to accomplish so many important things for the families of North Carolina. But, as you all know, _Bo Hines has officially announced that he is running against me in 2024._ We flipped this seat together last November, but we can not let that momentum die down. Friend, since the Trump-stacked Supreme Court struck down Roe v. Wade, Republicans all over the country have been relentlessly working to roll back reproductive rights — from state legislatures all the way up to the new GOP-led House majority.
Now, millions of people across the country have fewer reproductive rights than their parents and grandparents. And Republicans won’t stop until they've ended reproductive freedom nationwide.
**That's why Kirsten is leading the fight for our fundamental rights in the Senate, but it isn’t a fight she can win alone. She needs 127 more members of this team to add their voices with hers before midnight, but your response is still missing. So please, tell us right now:**

clean_body: | | | | | ALERT: The GOP is already using their new House majority to attack reproductive rights Kirsten is fighting tirelessly to protect the fundamental right to control our own bodies, but she needs to confirm where 127 more members of this team stand before midnight — and your response is missing, friend. Do you condemn the GOP’s attacks on reproductive freedom? | | | | Responses submitted after 11:59 p.m. will not be recorded. Friend, since the Trump-stacked Supreme Court struck down Roe v. Wade, Republicans all over the country have been relentlessly working to roll back reproductive rights — from state legislatures all the way up to the new GOP-led House majority. Now, millions of people across the country have fewer reproductive rights than their parents and grandparents. And Republicans won’t stop until they've ended reproductive freedom nationwide. That's why Kirsten is leading the fight for our fundamental rights in the Senate, but it isn’t a fight she can win alone. She needs 127 more members of this team to add their voices with hers before midnight, but your response is still missing. So please, tell us right now: Do you condemn the GOP’s attacks on reproductive freedom? | | | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: re: More Democratic Volunteers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party
body:
Hey Peter,

I just had to reach out and tell you how hard our Director of Party Affairs, Maria, is working on helping our amazing County Parties to reorganize! The lifeblood of Democrats in Tennessee, our County Parties, will be organizing to elect new leadership and recruit volunteers who will power us through 2024. Maria is spearheading outreach efforts and enlisting help from both staff and volunteers to ensure we get as many Democrats as possible involved in the process.

But her plan needs your support. We've set an ambitious goal to raise another $20,000 before the end of the month to help power programs like Maria's. Can you chip in $20 right now to help us get there? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

$5 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
$10 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
$25 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
$50 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
$100 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
OTHER » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

Thanks so much for your help , Peter. I know it means a lot to our team and to the people of Tennessee.

Thank you,

Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

PS — If you'd like to get involved in your County Party's reorganization, contact your Chair here [https://www.tndp.org/county-parties/] .

Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party.Carol V. Abney, Treasurer.

**To:_Dr. Anthony Fauci_**
**Signature:_Not Received_**

Team, Dr. Anthony Fauci recently retired from government after over **_50 YEARS_** of public service!

Dr. Fauci has devoted his entire career to serving our country. He's guided us through MULTIPLE public health crises, including the COVID-19 pandemic -- but despite his decades of service, **Republicans have continued to attack and smear his reputation!**

That’s why we're organizing a MASSIVE thank you card to stand with Dr. Fauci and let him know how grateful we are for his decades of service. But we need 53 more Democrats from Pennsylvania to sign on if we're going to hit our 50,000 signature goal! **Please, before the midnight deadline:**

[**Click here to sign the card and thank Dr. Fauci for his _decades_ of public service! >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/11607?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230225-AddYourName-FauciRetirement-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230225-AddYourName-FauciRetirement-Pros-sl1&akid=9891%2E9716520%2EvNmGDL)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Jon Tester shocked the political world in 2006, knocking off an incumbent GOP Senator. He did this because he is, and always has been, the real deal. Let’s help send him back to the Senate.
body:
Our improbable Senator from Montana
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta9956987-b4b4-4c74-bac6-7df992d3cac7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**It's official, he's in!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdb26f208-34e7-4702-9d93-72e94d1c6acd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _The "he" is Jon Tester, and it's incredible news because it's such a key race for us to hold our majority. But also because of the kind of person Jon Tester is._ _**Tester shocked the political world in 2006, knocking off an incumbent GOP Senator. He did this because he is, and always has been, the real deal.** _ **From Tester himself:** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tccd46c8e-8934-4c68-b395-8e56ffa93754/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Tester easily connects issues we all care about--climate, USPS, infrastructure & more--to a life of hard work, in his case on the farm, better than anyone else._** [**_Will you please join us in supporting Jon Tester, from "On The Farm with Sharla & Jon," by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, to hold a crucial Senate seat, remain in the Senate majority and keep this incredible Senator in DC?!?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7a9f7651-3ba2-4dfc-86de-68dea3381bad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_He's always there for Democratic priority legislation, because he knows it benefits _his_ _people_. Never feels a need to position himself vs our party for some narcissistic need for attention, or fear he appears too "liberal," like Sinema & Manchin. Again, because, _he's the real deal-_ -he's "Yellowstone," no performance required_**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T228101b4-8317-4c3b-ad2c-359de4e5f87c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _How many politicians do you think this would describe?_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a4a4d99-5569-4c18-98c0-51c1f04c95b5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_But even with his talent and authenticity, Tester will only stay a Senator, fighting our fights from Montana & Washington, if we provide him the resources so every Montantan hears his story, sees his huge smile. And we'll only hold our Senate majority if we reelect Sen. Tester--the math just isn't there without him._** **_[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e402fd8-8aba-416d-b277-e9c088f1427a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_** [**_So will you please join us in supporting Jon Tester, from "On The Farm with Sharla & Jon," by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, to hold a crucial Senate seat, remain in the Senate majority and keep this incredible Senator in DC?!?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc0df3369-9699-470b-8702-56c159a748f6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thanks for fighting to keep the good ones. We need them now, more than ever._ Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T62fc5bd2-169d-4136-8f12-6182001e253f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b70ec2a-d48c-4a35-bd68-abacbc6e8f0f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

From Tester himself: Tester easily connects issues we all care about--climate, USPS, infrastructure & more--to a life of hard work, in his case on the farm, better than anyone else. He's always there for Democratic priority legislation, because he knows it benefits his people. Never feels a need to position himself vs our party for some narcissistic need for attention, or fear he appears too "liberal," like Sinema & Manchin. And we'll only hold our Senate majority if we reelect Sen. Tester--the math just isn't there without him. Thanks for fighting to keep the good ones. We need them now, more than ever. Peter Willis,

The corporate elite and the political system they control rely on dividing
us with culture war issues to distract us from their economic subjugation
of the working class.

We can overcome these divide-and-conquer tactics by focusing on what we
have in common and fighting for each other, even folks we don't know.

Bernie Sanders has long stood for this idea, and we designed a sticker to
honor his conviction of fighting for people you don't know. Donate $10 or
more here and reserve your exclusive sticker!

Our Revolution

Connecticut’s 5th district is one of the most competitive in the country | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59238884/393654656/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTQ4MGViMi0yNmI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_x4KHvckKKDZ3bMzMVopo9ZBqCCgtrQc6iNC8T3gYT4=&emci=a17a75a3-78b4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=89480eb2-26b5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15529135) | I’m still feeling fired up from President Biden’s State of the Union, especially when he talked about investing in good-paying union jobs, education, and more. We recommitted ourselves to NOT “sunsetting” Social Security and Medicare as some of the more extreme members have suggested and recommitted ourselves to not holding the American people hostage in debt ceiling discussions. **However, we know that under Kevin McCarthy’s leadership, House Republicans will do everything they can to stop our Democratic agenda of supporting workers, uplifting families, and investing in our communities.** Connecticut’s 5th district is one of the most competitive in the country – and my team and I are preparing for my re-election already. If we want to take back the House in 2024, keeping CT-05 is a MUST. [**We set a goal of raising another $5,000 before the end of the month so we can go toe-to-toe with dark money interests that will surely flood our district just like they did in 2022. name: Giffords.org
subject: Join us in the fight to help pass universal background checks legislation
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is commonsense legislation that will save lives
#

Friends -
Last week, the Background Check Expansion Act was introduced in the U.S. Senate.
Sponsored by Senator Chris Murphy, this legislation would require a background check for all gun sales and transfers, with reasonable exceptions for self-defense, law enforcement, hunting or target shooting, and exchanges between family members.
Since our founding ten years ago, one of our top priorities at Giffords has been working towards a future with universal background checks. Requiring a background check before the sale of a gun is the most effective way to ensure that people who are prohibited from possessing guns cannot acquire them.
In the past decade, 29 states have passed 71 significant background check laws. While this is great progress, it’s long past time to make universal background checks law at the federal level.
But with a narrowly divided Senate and a Republican majority in the House of Representatives, this won’t be easy. That’s why we’re counting on you.
[**Will you make a contribution to Giffords PAC if you support passing the Background Check Expansion Act? This is commonsense legislation that will save lives.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb23.wLJBGg&refcode=em230225-1-30-nor&t=1&akid=4299%2E3935704%2E57Mxbr)

name: Adrastos, Campaign Manager for Team Cori
subject: Emails like this one fund a large percentage of our budget to re-elect Cori
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
If we're going to re-elect Cori, we can't slow down.
#
Hey — can I be honest with you?
I know that emails like this one might add up in your inbox, I see it in mine too! I understand that the stream of emails asking for a donation can seem endless, so I wanted to make sure you knew that a real person wrote this email.
**As Cori's Campaign Manager, I'm reaching out today because the truth is, emails like this one fund a large percentage of our budget to re-elect Cori.**
Last month, we didn't hit our fundraising goal. And now, we're having to work extra hard to make up that gap. _That's where you come in, Peter._
Our opponents are already raising millions from corporate PACs and lobbyists to defeat our movement in 2024, so we can't afford to start this year off financially behind. **But according to our records, it looks like you have yet to chip in to power our campaign to re-elect Cori.**
We understand you may not have been in a position to donate before. But with so much at stake in these next two years, we're hoping we can count on your support today.
[**Will you consider making your first donation to help re-elect Cori today? A donation now will help us get this year back on track to ensure we can put all our energy into fighting for the people.**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230225.fbIWrQ&amount=5&refcode=em20230225-2234&t=3&akid=2234%2E1082990%2Eqh0k0_)
**[Chip in $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230225.fbIWrQ&amount=5&refcode=em20230225-2234&t=4&akid=2234%2E1082990%2Eqh0k0_)**
To many, 2023 is an 'off-year'. But Cori has made it abundantly clear that for us — working people and families — we can't afford to take an off-year.
Not while corporate PACs and lobbyists are already fundraising to take us down next year.
Not while reproductive freedom, Medicare for All, and housing justice are on the line.
And not while right-wing extremists have their eyes on our campaign to see if we have what it takes to re-elect Missouri's first Black Congresswoman.
**[If we're going to re-elect Cori, we can't slow down. Please make your first donation today to support Cori as she presses forward on our progressive agenda for racial, economic, and environmental justice.](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230225.fbIWrQ&refcode=em20230225-2234&t=5&akid=2234%2E1082990%2Eqh0k0_)**
Thank you,
Adrastos
Campaign Manager, Team Cori
_*This data only reflects donations made online with this email address. If you've made a previous contribution via check or with a different email address, you may not see it here — but know that Cori and our entire team are deeply grateful for your support._

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230225?refcode=em20230225-2234-footer&t=6&refcode2=2234_1082990_qh0k0_&akid=2234%2E1082990%2Eqh0k0_) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

| Endorsement Alert Howard Gregory
---
| Dear Friend, We would not have a country without our men and women in law enforcement. Thank you! I am honored to receive the endorsement of retired State Police Division Commander and fellow Veteran, Howard Gregory. Despite his many accomplishments, Howard is about as humble as you can get. Howard is a well respected member of the Appomattox County community and I really appreciate Howard's time he took over the summer to introduce me to folks at several churches, festivals and more. Together, we will bring people together in ten counties and win the nomination May 6!
---
| | |
---|---
|
"Delegate John McGuire has my whole-hearted endorsement for the Virginia State Senate. While other candidates may claim what they "will do if elected," John has proven many times over that he is a dedicated patriot and true conservative Christian who is vigorously pro-life, pro-military, and pro-2nd Amendment. John's service as a Navy SEAL, business owner, and Virginia State Delegate vividly demonstrates his courage, tenacity, and love of our state and nation. I urge all patriotic citizens who share these values to support John at the Republican Convention at Buckingham County High School on Saturday, May 6, 2023, at 10:00 A.M., which is critical to ensure his nomination."
-Captain G. Howard Gregory (Retired)
Division Commander
Virginia State Police

Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Petition: Ban Tucker, Hannity and Ingraham on Military installations for deliberately peddling election fraud conspiracies they knew were false.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
They all knew Trump’s cries of a stolen election were false.
#
Derek -
Tucker Carlson, Sean Hannity and Laura Ingraham knew.
They all knew Trump’s cries of a stolen election were false.
It came out in court documents released last week.
According to the New York Times, Tucker Carlson called Trump’s team “insane.” He said “Our viewers are good people and they will believe it.” Ingraham called one of Trump’s lawyers a “complete nut” and said, “Ditto with Rudy.”
Yet, they peddled those election fraud lies nightly on their shows to rile up their followers and boost their ratings while the far-right flocked to even crazier networks than Fox during that period.
Sadly, you can draw a straight line between Fox’s disinformation and the violent attempt to overturn the election at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021.
Here’s the truth:
The Military should not be showing these shows on installations in the US and around the world. Not only as a means of combatting disinformation in the Military, but because this is a network that exists to divide America in two.
Enough is enough. So we’re hoping you’ll lend your voice to ours:
[**Sign VoteVets' petition calling on the United States Armed Forces to ban the shows on Military installations of Fox News hosts who deliberately lied about “election fraud” claims.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230225_vv_usaf_petition/?source=em230225-1-15&refcode2=7746.3013755.Q5UM6b&t=1&akid=7746%2E3013755%2EQ5UM6b)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230225_vv_usaf_petition/?source=em230225-1-15&refcode2=7746.3013755.Q5UM6b&t=2&akid=7746%2E3013755%2EQ5UM6b)
---
We’ll pull together a list of petition signers, including those of Veterans and Military family members, and share them with the administration.
Thank you.
The team at VoteVets
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230225_vv_usaf_petition/?source=em230225-1-15&refcode2=7746.3013755.Q5UM6b&t=3&akid=7746%2E3013755%2EQ5UM6b)
---

name: James Carville (via Democrats.org)
subject: I’m humbly asking: Will you rush $10 to the DNC before their fundraising deadline on Tuesday? When you do,you’ll receive your very own Official 2023 DNC Membership Card.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
As of right now, the DNC could fall short of their February end-of-month fundraising goal. That could make a huge difference in our fight to keep moving the country in the right direction. | |
---
I’m sorry to message you like this, Derek, but with the DNC’s fundraising numbers where they’re at right now, I’m too damn worried to sit on the sidelines! **As of right now, the DNC could fall short of their February end-of-month fundraising goal.** We cannot let that happen again, Derek: _They missed their goal last month._ Tuesday’s fundraising deadline is no joke. Hitting this goal will help support the DNC’s continued investments in innovative organizing, voter protection, data and technology, and so much more that we need to elect Democrats in 2023 and 2024. Grassroots donations had tremendous power in last year’s elections, and it’d mean a lot if you made your first contribution of 2023. So, I’m humbly asking: Will you rush $10 to the DNC before their fundraising deadline on Tuesday? When you do, you’ll receive your very own Official 2023 DNC Membership Card.

clean_body: As of right now, the DNC could fall short of their February end-of-month fundraising goal. That could make a huge difference in our fight to keep moving the country in the right direction. | | I’m sorry to message you like this, Derek, but with the DNC’s fundraising numbers where they’re at right now, I’m too damn worried to sit on the sidelines! As of right now, the DNC could fall short of their February end-of-month fundraising goal. We cannot let that happen again, Derek: They missed their goal last month. Tuesday’s fundraising deadline is no joke. Hitting this goal will help support the DNC’s continued investments in innovative organizing, voter protection, data and technology, and so much more that we need to elect Democrats in 2023 and 2024. Grassroots donations had tremendous power in last year’s elections, and it’d mean a lot if you made your first contribution of 2023. So, I’m humbly asking: Will you rush $10 to the DNC before their fundraising deadline on Tuesday? When you do, you’ll receive your very own Official 2023 DNC Membership Card. ** Derek, I’ve been in politics for a long time, and I’ll tell you one thing: Democrats defied the odds in 2022. Grassroots donors dug deep to support Democrats nationwide, and it paid off. But know this: There are still fights ahead. Extreme Republicans like Donald Trump and Nikki Haley have already announced they’re running for president, and we can expect even more MAGA Republicans to run for office up and down the ticket. We need to fight back as early as possible, and that means closing the DNC’s February fundraising gap ASAP. Thanks for stepping up, James James Carville Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, . If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., . Joe Biden and the Democrats are spending America’s tax dollars like a kid in a candy store.

And while they’re cashing in on sweet benefits, the American people are being crushed under debt and inflation.

It’s time for Washington to get responsible, and I’m leading the charge.
Democrats want to raise the debt ceiling without taking ANY measures of fiscal responsibility.

It’s so irresponsible it’s almost shocking - but then again, I’ve come to expect nothing less from this incompetent administration.

**If we’re going to get America’s finances under control, we have to start by electing conservatives in 2024 who won’t waste your money. Democrats want to raise the debt ceiling without taking ANY measures of fiscal responsibility. It’s so irresponsible it’s almost shocking - but then again, I’ve come to expect nothing less from this incompetent administration. If we’re going to get America’s finances under control, we have to start by electing conservatives in 2024 who won’t waste your money. | | | | Peter, every day, American households use common sense when it comes to their money. If you’re in debt you make hard choices, cut back where you can, and save until your balance is paid off. But why can’t Washington do the same? Peter,

This is Congressman Sanford Bishop, and I’m teaming up with the Collective PAC to build Black political power. [To help us in our mission, can you split a contribution between the Collective PAC and me ahead of our end-of-month fundraising deadline? ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3WERB21b59uQNYdFZeI3OCC1Hw8Aax6F5JrKva1VAVzCo0B9PEbj4YdoZLYTSJCEhJlN6EpYmnlCRp9lq_J3CLIsUcF1Zw6-C1uWzvb8jkhZNGtDGzCQTKXEEDIggPcCNDEWgUGcIDJEk_3BxVJZ9jnOCly0TOUbqk2BMmHctUYMXlmp6aO4ewxP_ZXMemNqfcOilQIsG0M0ngVKPijN2BG7Jm-58fuOow7i6vdTH_JzS3i7bTWSNJwVUj1QR2c641zFHCs6l798-Se_mIrOBcVKNDGC5JW4pFgC-nsQHslqx5cDXqLsr1axyg9VaR7yqbADzy9hlQK60Z6ORr5V6Vun_ZO4L39Ae-TfWiyHyunEj9_PtIzCgOqfUstOv4-LZiJ4kRfkmhMUaWcnrOPxTtTRZvFTQNXhVOuNsuOPteB7E37GBuPURQ2ZKfZF95T_J2nPNKnZoMhb4KXt5NmjJZ/3u0/DznAdE2wSoi7ra-i24AutQ/h2/1w_3i7ntZkBuMHqFUHeggmLFQp1JtIizOE_zlKgufzI)

Before running for office, I was a civil rights attorney involved in a lawsuit against the Georgia State Prison in Reidsville on behalf of 6,000 African-American inmates. While incarcerated, **these inmates were experiencing a wide range of constitutional violations of their rights at the hands of this Georgia State Prison.**

Thankfully, the federal judge heard the case and decided that the state must improve conditions and rectify the constitutional violations that inmates were experiencing. However, every time we would have status conferences, our state’s attorney general would come back and say that _the legislature had not appropriated the money to make the necessary changes._

**After hearing that for three and a half years, I was beyond frustrated — it was time to act. I decided that I needed to run for the legislature to help deliver real justice for Georgians.**

Across the country, from local to federal races, there are so many candidates with similar stories. Candidates, especially those of color, see issues that have been ignored for far too long and are running for office to make real change.

The Collective PAC is doing critical work to reach voters and support these candidates so we can address the underrepresentation of African-Americans in office and build a new generation of African-American leaders.

[ So, Peter, will you split a contribution between the Collective PAC and my campaign before our end-of-month deadline? Reaching these goals are critical to continuing our work. ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3WERB21b59uQNYdFZeI3OCC1Hw8Aax6F5JrKva1VAVzCo0B9PEbj4YdoZLYTSJCEhJlN6EpYmnlCRp9lq_J3CLIsUcF1Zw6-C1uWzvb8jkhZNGtDGzCQTKXEEDIggPcCNDEWgUGcIDJEk_3BxVJZ9jnOCly0TOUbqk2BMmHctUYMXlmp6aO4ewxP_ZXMemNqfcOilQIsG0M0ngVKPijN2BnkGDSyrCk3SAnb61QE2vXsllOPXntAvpXA0VIOI4Z6hK07dozBKwiuIZ09jPrqw9o9khMMh7IDRqIL9VkRBkS0saNmLFOVRg4bvA2lwrl_wC7a6yPQRw_KhPhPr-IC-FZ7sqeKNinAm1NmUAtsZwO-bulcRE8gXHM8mu3TYOfjjIZ-WcHZmuurWbc_7sMUrerBsb62nEBC3t1BiqxiHBd0w9wJKPPiMRFgSf7Ziqvi3uM_coO3JBzznfyoY_o9sp/3u0/DznAdE2wSoi7ra-i24AutQ/h3/h-Jiyco8cOUgY3Iss305PdmrQ6aOvRAWlib8rbda5ac) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Sanford Bishop and The Collective PAC.

clean_body: I decided that I needed to run for the legislature to help deliver real justice for Georgians. | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, This is Congressman Sanford Bishop, and I’m teaming up with the Collective PAC to build Black political power. Before running for office, I was a civil rights attorney involved in a lawsuit against the Georgia State Prison in Reidsville on behalf of 6,000 African-American inmates. While incarcerated, these inmates were experiencing a wide range of constitutional violations of their rights at the hands of this Georgia State Prison. Thankfully, the federal judge heard the case and decided that the state must improve conditions and rectify the constitutional violations that inmates were experiencing. However, every time we would have status conferences, our state’s attorney general would come back and say that the legislature had not appropriated the money to make the necessary changes. After hearing that for three and a half years, I was beyond frustrated — it was time to act. I decided that I needed to run for the legislature to help deliver real justice for Georgians. Across the country, from local to federal races, there are so many candidates with similar stories. Candidates, especially those of color, see issues that have been ignored for far too long and are running for office to make real change. The Collective PAC is doing critical work to reach voters and support these candidates so we can address the underrepresentation of African-Americans in office and build a new generation of African-American leaders. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Sanford Bishop and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thank you, Congressman Sanford D. Bishop, Jr. The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Jim Jordan
subject: Do you support non-Americans voting in our elections?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62364787:JxrcLcGNA:m:1:3331421248:C9FD37885F8C1625ABF94872818EBD97:r)
|
[**Petition: Do you agree that illegal immigrants should not be allowed to vote in our elections -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62364787:JxrcLcGNA:m:1:3331421248:C9FD37885F8C1625ABF94872818EBD97:r)
Peter,

I wanted to share with you another reason why it's so important that we remain ever vigilant and ALWAYS stay in the fight to defend our great country from dangerous and destructive policies.

Just a few days ago, Republicans in the House of Representatives passed a measure making sure that non-citizens are not allowed vote in Washington DC elections.

Sounds like a no-brainer, right? I mean, who the heck would support a crazy idea like non-citizens voting in American elections?

I'll tell you who would support it: the vast majority of House Democrats would! **And they did! By a 4-to-1 margin!**

Despite their incessant anti-Trump tropes being laden with claims of foreign influence in elections, they call it controversial for conservatives to say that only American citizens should vote in American elections. I'm not making this up!

We all know that liberals want to fundamentally change our great country, and this latest move fits their playbook to a tee. They want weaker border security, they don't support law enforcement, and now they have shown they want to allow non-citizens to vote in our elections.

They weren't successful this time, but when considering that Biden's border policy is allowing record levels of illegal immigration, and Democrats are raising record levels of money for their campaigns, we should all be scared for the future of our country if the left makes gains in the next election.

I know you receive a lot of fundraising emails, but if you've read this far, I know you share my concern. **[If that's true, I'm asking you to step up and take action to let me know you join with other patriots like yourself to support the fundamental principles that make America great!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62364787:JxrcLcGNA:m:1:3331421248:C9FD37885F8C1625ABF94872818EBD97:r)**

[**Petition: Do you agree that illegal immigrants should not be allowed to vote in our elections -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62364787:JxrcLcGNA:m:1:3331421248:C9FD37885F8C1625ABF94872818EBD97:r)
**[Please take less than one minute and sign my petition letting me know you're with me on this!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62364787:JxrcLcGNA:m:1:3331421248:C9FD37885F8C1625ABF94872818EBD97:r)**

God Bless,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62364787:JxrcLcGNA:m:1:3331421248:C9FD37885F8C1625ABF94872818EBD97:r)
Jim Jordan

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [ ** JOIN JIM**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62364787:JxrcLcGNA:m:1:3331421248:C9FD37885F8C1625ABF94872818EBD97:r)

---

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lucas=20Kunce=20HQ?=
subject: Josh Hawley's former mentor: Supporting Hawley “the worst decision I've ever made in my life.”
body:
[](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=7d576fff8c&e=8095450ef8)
**[With your help, we can flip this seat! Chip in to help 13-year Marine veteran Lucas Kunce replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate>>](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=957739f08c&e=8095450ef8)**
* * *
Peter -- Please give us a moment to explain why **Josh Hawley is the GOP 's most vulnerable Senator** in this election cycle:
**FIRST --** In 2018, Josh Hawley's mentor -- 3-term GOP Senator Jack Danforth -- recruited Josh Hawley to run for U.S. Senate, helping to clear the field of Republican challengers in his primary.
**THEN --** On January 6, 2021, **Josh Hawley showed the world that he 's a coward and a fraud** by raising his fist then running for his life at the U.S. Capitol.
**NOW --** Hawley's support base is collapsing. A poll just months ago showed his approval drop to 39%, and his former mentor, ex-Senator Danforth, has even threatened to back a challenger against Hawley in what would surely be a devastating primary.
**Republicans and Democrats agree: Missourians deserve better than a fraud and a coward like Josh Hawley representing them in the U.S. Senate.**
**[CHIP IN TO BEAT HAWLEY»](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=f4a73d2dea&e=8095450ef8)**
That's where you come in. Every dollar we raise gives us an opportunity to put Lucas and his message in front of Missouri voters between now and Election Day. And if we're going to win this thing, we have to start strong.
**That 's why we need your help to reach our end-of-month goal of raising 5,000 individual grassroots donations before March.**
**[So we're asking: Can you chip in $10 or just whatever you can today so we can hit our goal, put our message in front of Missouri voters, and hold Josh Hawley accountable for betraying the American people?](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=8bc6856513&e=8095450ef8)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=a15d13f1ca&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $25](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=7db738c33c&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $30](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=ef1a8413d3&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $50](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=4d958661e4&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $100](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=786d596e73&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $250](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=22b89a7ba1&e=8095450ef8) [Give another amount](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=855818e174&e=8095450ef8)
---
Thanks for being a part of this movement. Together, we're going to beat Hawley and put everyday people in charge of our country.
Team Lucas Kunce

THEN -- On January 6, 2021, Josh Hawley showed the world that he 's a coward and a fraud by raising his fist then running for his life at the U.S. Capitol. NOW -- Hawley's support base is collapsing. A poll just months ago showed his approval drop to 39%, and his former mentor, ex-Senator Danforth, has even threatened to back a challenger against Hawley in what would surely be a devastating primary. Republicans and Democrats agree: Missourians deserve better than a fraud and a coward like Josh Hawley representing them in the U.S. Senate. That's where you come in. Every dollar we raise gives us an opportunity to put Lucas and his message in front of Missouri voters between now and Election Day. And if we're going to win this thing, we have to start strong. That 's why we need your help to reach our end-of-month goal of raising 5,000 individual grassroots donations before March. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thanks for being a part of this movement. Together, we're going to beat Hawley and put everyday people in charge of our country. Team Lucas Kunce **

subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJx1UE1PxCAU_DX01gYeFMqBQ9emRk2MBy-eNhTKFrfYbj-s---lG_Vm8gKZYd7w5rWKcCEoY1zyxCrNtWtt4hVgoBggJwIDKbIiNwAst4YUjBosEcNt0L7PNNn0NA1DyMwQkk7h1jTWCddwJ8FiwRth20ayxlobTXTSq25ZxhnREkEdi43LdAayt0dkem_OiNbL9OktohUBGT8DXtYP1Q6xzCPSzh3ntdmJguL0d9a0TGciC0M4e42qdQlHo8Oo_ekjSmv2kv4rTyZlx833vZ-5iOFOt3B7pGjQe3dVSBwQQOftHK_b9HB528K0voen-_SLPaYX_hzy_RHu4rlcx_ZP-WOS3Xa2s6L6BrEca7E). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJx1UE1PxCAU_DX01gYeFMqBQ9emRk2MBy-eNhTKFrfYbj-s---lG_Vm8gKZYd7w5rWKcCEoY1zyxCrNtWtt4hVgoBggJwIDKbIiNwAst4YUjBosEcNt0L7PNNn0NA1DyMwQkk7h1jTWCddwJ8FiwRth20ayxlobTXTSq25ZxhnREkEdi43LdAayt0dkem_OiNbL9OktohUBGT8DXtYP1Q6xzCPSzh3ntdmJguL0d9a0TGciC0M4e42qdQlHo8Oo_ekjSmv2kv4rTyZlx833vZ-5iOFOt3B7pGjQe3dVSBwQQOftHK_b9HB528K0voen-_SLPaYX_hzy_RHu4rlcx_ZP-WOS3Xa2s6L6BrEca7E). That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling . Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because: 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food is designed to last for 25 years , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too. You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food." And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out. You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest! And that's not all, because... FREE Bonus #1: because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you 2 of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. People love these kits. It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... FREE Bonus #2: You'll get a Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault with thousands of hardy and delicious heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. FREE Bonus #3: You'll also get an Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library. With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $19.95, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... FREE Bonus #4: You also get their Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. FREE Bonus #5: You also get Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee. Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. FREE Bonus #6: You also get Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa. Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... FREE Bonus #7: You also get $25 OFF your next purchase. This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... FREE Bonus #8: You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order! It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. Look, this food tastes homemade. It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just . When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. As it stands today, it's every man for himself. In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters More Raving Reviews From Customers! | | Rory H. I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things. ---|--- | Billy H. Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup. ---|--- | Kevin S. The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start. ---|--- | Carol B. I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings. ---|--- | Ken K. I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal. ---|--- | Justin A. My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great. ---|--- | Gary M. I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed. ---|--- | John H. We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when." ---|--- Real reviews from real customers. subject: FWD: 2x Impact: Help us meet our critical February Deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
to fund and bring momentum to our 2023/24 programs

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

============================================================

or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438&e=6a281f566d&c=8b042937fd)
.

name: Shelby County Republican Party
subject: Upcoming Event!
body:
Shelby County Patriots,

We would like to invite you, your family and friends to our annual Lincoln Day Dinner on Thursday, April 20th at Shelby Oaks in Sidney! It's always a fun time with delicious food, great speakers and interesting conversation.

Please look at the attached invitation and submit your registration by mail or online (online registration fee will be charged by Eventbrite). Feel free to share this email with friends and family.

We look forward to seeing you on April 20th! Please RSVP before April 10th.

Best Wishes,
Shelby County Republican Party

name: Coach
subject: [Video] I’m urging Congress to PROTECT FREEDOM
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
We must commit to a future free of tyrannical lockdowns. Read more >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/4fbc17ef6a659139/806b0a3db9b19bbdc3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter,

I recently delivered my first floor speech of 2023, and I did not mince words.

The impacts of COVID-19 related lockdowns have been **EXTREME** and **DEADLY** – we are still learning about the full scope of the disastrous consequences of shutting down our society.

I’m calling on Congress to commit to a future free of excessive tyrannical lockdowns.

We must learn from the past and take a stand to PROTECT FREEDOM!
[**If you agree, sign my “NO MORE LOCKDOWNS PETITION” now >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/4fbc17ef6a659139/2bc3d2ce38099c95c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
Today, millions of kids are behind where they should be academically, and we’re seeing a mental health and behavioral crisis in our schools. Our nation’s excess death rate has spiked upward due to shocking increases in accidents, overdoses, and homicides, with our young adults particularly hard hit.

**Countless lives and livelihoods have been lost and are STILL being lost.**

As I said on the Senate floor, we must be the barrier between the American people and tyranny. I’m urging every single one of my colleagues in Congress to commit to defending freedom in every circumstance. [**Join me in this fight today.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/4fbc17ef6a659139/ee9a46f890c4ea9dc3d6b838967d376c/33013)
For Alabama and America,

Coach
---

name: Crow HQ
subject: How many reasons do Republicans need to act?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
|
#
---
Folks — How many reasons do Republicans need to act? At a time when Americans are dying at the hands of assault weapons, Republicans are silent. At a time when our democracy remains in peril, Republicans are silent. At a time when millions of women have had their reproductive rights ripped away, Republicans are silent. At a time when some families are having to ration medication because it’s unaffordable, Republicans are silent. At a time when climate change is affecting our communities and the Colorado River is drying up, Republicans are silent. Americans are facing serious issues — issues Congress needs to address. Instead, extremists in Congress are turning their attention toward partisan investigations and appeasing their base. **Colorado is a top target for the coming election. Dark money groups are going to spend millions airing television ads in our district to flip competitive seats. | | I need you to see this. – On Thursday, Donald Trump hosted his Super PAC’s FIRST mega-fundraiser of the year at Mar-a-Lago. – On Friday, Ron DeSantis hosted a massive Republican fundraiser of his own. [**_Let me clear: Regardless of who the Republican nominee is, they’ll have MILLIONS in their war chest to smear our Democrats with lies and attacks. We can’t leave our Democrats undefended and let far-right extremists take power. Which is why I’m launching an immediate response to help Democrats OUTRAISE Trump and DeSantis in the next 24 hours. name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: we fixed the glitch RE: homeschooling freedom in Idaho
body:
*(check it out) |
---
| | We're trying to further protect homeschool freedom in Idaho with our Senate Bill 1038.

The goal is to empower parents and free kids from the government school monopoly.

_Yet some are trying to sabotage it..._

The far left hates it for obvious reasons (they LOVE government schooling). But some homeschoolers don't like it because they think it infringes on their rights.

_**This isn't true. **_

So with regard to the "the infringes on our homeschooling rights" crowd...** [I submit to you this post](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=9edc531bfd&e=dea908e0fe "why this bill is GREAT for homeschoolers").**

I didn't write it, but I had to share it.

**_For those who do NOT have/use Facebook, here it is: _**

There is a divide among homeschoolers as to SB1038 the Freedom in Education Savings Account bill.

While in all 50 states you can theoretically “homeschool” there are only 10 states in which you truly can be the sole educator of your child’s education without being in partnership with the state. The 10 green states are the only states where you have full and sole education choice and include:
* Alaska
* Idaho
* Illinois
* Indiana
* Iowa
* Michigan
* Missouri
* New Jersey
* Texas
* Oklahoma
* Rhode Island

Of these 10 states only 1 has homeschooling guaranteed in their state constitution and that is Oklahoma.

This means that any state who is doing vouchers, ESA, or any other funding in a state that is not green will have additional chains because they are already slaves to the state and must get the local or state government tyrant’s permission and/or approval to educate their children. If you must file anything then you are not in charge of your child’s education the government is.

SB1038 protects Idaho homeschoolers by explicitly stating in the bill on page 6 line 10:

**“33-6604. STATE CONTROL OVER NON PUBLIC SCHOOLS.**

(1) This chapter does not permit any government agency to exercise control or supervision over any nonpublic school or homeschooling.”

Should 33-6604 be removed from the bill, or the bill passes and a subsequent bill comes up to remove it then we should all start yelling about our homeschool protections.
Why is there a divide between homeschoolers and homeschool watchdog groups if this bill strengthens homeschooling protections in Idaho?

The answer: Fear

In states that are not green homeschool freedom states “homeschoolers” have slowly seen their chains tighten because they never fully removed their government chains in the first place. The answer is not to stop good legislation such as SB1038 in green homeschool freedom states. The answer in the 80% of states that still have chains those chains must be fought and removed. You can’t remove the chains from public schools until you’ve secured your own freedom. Idaho homeschoolers have removed their chains. Now we must fight and protect those who are oppressed in the public government school system. They want this, but they need help from those who have already fought for their freedoms and won.

The biggest threat to Homeschool Freedom in Idaho?

The 40 state governments who regulate any public/private requirements in order to “Homeschool”.

If you have friends or family who are subject to government regulation in states that are not green encourage them to get their state’s homeschool laws changed. We have won our freedom, but our freedom is endangered by the 40 states in which parents don’t fight every single intrusion of their child’s education in their home. I often see those who fled from CA argue that CA tried to force CPS visits to “homeschools”, which is not true. In CA, homeschooling is not legally recognized. You must become a “private school” to educate your children at home. CA tried to force CPS visits on “private schools” throughout the state which would have impacted all homeschool families because they were operating under the government’s permission to run a private school.

You are comparing apples to oranges when you compare a green state to even the arguably most lenient of the yellow states. You are either a true homeschooler by having no contract with your state government on how you educate your children or you are a slave to your government by complying with the education chains they have demanded of you regardless of how light or heavy they may be.

We want to thank Senator Brian Lenney, Senator Tammy Nichols, Senator Scott Herndon, and the others who have endlessly championed this bill through the education committee and are awaiting it to be heard and voted upon the senate floor.

We encourage everyone to call their senators asking them to please support and vote in favor of this bill.

______________________________________________

Cheers,

Brian

\---

1) To make sure you keep getting these emails, please add [blforidaho@gmail.com](mailto:blforidaho@gmail.com) to your address book or whitelist me.

2) Want to get off this list? [Unsubscribe from this list](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7&e=dea908e0fe&c=91dd311372).

4) Want to support the cause? [Click here to contribute](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=1a863b7c49&e=dea908e0fe "get in the fight").

body:
We’re proud of our average contribution - here’s why:
#
Derek, $12.66 is our average contribution for February.
**Here’s why we’re proud of that number:** Our average contribution proves that this movement is powered by small-dollar donations.
This campaign isn’t funded by corporate PACs or ultra-wealthy donors _._ We’ve relied on real people like you donating what + when they’re able to since Day One — and we plan to keep it that way.
**[So we’re asking again before our upcoming end-of-month fundraising deadline: Will you match this month’s average gift — $12.66 — or pitch in any amount you’re able to today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230225-1?refcode=em20230225-1-8261&refcode2=8261_434096_YR8IJd&akid=8261%2E434096%2EYR8IJd)**
**[Donate $12.66 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230225-1?refcode=em20230225-8261&amount=12.66&refcode2=8261_434096_YR8IJd&akid=8261%2E434096%2EYR8IJd)**
**[Donate Other Amount »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230225-1?refcode=em20230225-8261&refcode2=8261_434096_YR8IJd&akid=8261%2E434096%2EYR8IJd)**
With every contribution of $12.66 — or whatever folks are able to contribute — we’re building a powerful movement of folks across Pennsylvania and the country who are ready to fight for our future.
Every donation adds up and helps support John’s work in the U.S. Senate so we can finally make real progress on the issues that impact us the most.
**[Will you help us reach our end-of-month goal by making a contribution of our average amount ($12.66) or any amount today? Every contribution adds up and makes a huge impact, and we’re almost out of time.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230225-1?refcode=em20230225-1-8261&refcode2=8261_434096_YR8IJd&akid=8261%2E434096%2EYR8IJd)**
**[Donate $12.66 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230225-1?refcode=em20230225-8261&amount=12.66&refcode2=8261_434096_YR8IJd&akid=8261%2E434096%2EYR8IJd)**
**[Donate Other Amount »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230225-1?refcode=em20230225-8261&refcode2=8261_434096_YR8IJd&akid=8261%2E434096%2EYR8IJd)**
Thank you for your support, Derek.
— Team Fetterman 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230225-8261-footer&t=1&refcode2=8261_434096_YR8IJd&akid=8261%2E434096%2EYR8IJd)**
