name: Newt Gingrich
subject: I've been doing a lot of thinking...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | Peter,

I've been doing a lot of thinking about what the new Republican majority means for America, and I've concluded that it all boils down to three words: Speaker Kevin McCarthy. As a former Speaker myself, I know how tough the job can be. That's why I chose to support Kevin from the get-go - he's a natural-born leader who's prepared to fight day in and day out for the American people.

---
| | [SUPPORT KEVIN MCCARTHY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366526:6ejXmcGUN:m:1:3331421248:96C48733E7C8DB0DC621919B84473A97:r)
---

Kevin's first month in office confirmed what I, and millions of other Americans, have long suspected: **he 's THE politician America _desperately_ needs at this pivotal moment in history.** He's already fired 3 corrupt Dems from their committee assignments, rescinded the funding for Biden's army of 87,000 IRS agents, formed a committee to tackle the Chinese Communist threat, moved to protect our country's strategic petroleum reserve, launched an investigation into the Weaponization of the Federal Government, and take several significant actions to protect innocent life from radical abortionists.

Kevin is a man of results, not empty promises. I'm proud to call him my Speaker. If you agree with me and the job that he's doing, I'd ask you to give him your official approval **[here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366526:6ejXmcGUN:m:1:3331421248:96C48733E7C8DB0DC621919B84473A97:r "here.")** Fighting the Democrats is a tough job; he needs to know that the American people are behind him _every_ step of the way.

---
| | [GIVE KEVIN YOUR OFFICIAL APPROVAL](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366526:6ejXmcGUN:m:1:3331421248:96C48733E7C8DB0DC621919B84473A97:r)
---
| | [STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62366526:6ejXmcGUN:m:1:3331421248:96C48733E7C8DB0DC621919B84473A97:r)
---

Thank you for your time,

Newt Gingrich

---
| |
* * *
---

Bakersfield, CA 93389

name: Finance Team
subject: Hey, friend - can you help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Lashrecse Aird
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.21.2023_LA_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.21.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
Hi friend,
Lashrecse's finance team here.
We’re reaching out to ask for your support to help us meet our upcoming end-of-month fundraising deadline.
Earlier today, we ran the numbers, and even with the immense amount of support from all corners of our district, we're running behind where we need to be on our fundraising goal for the primary.
Can we count on you to contribute today and help us close this gap? Here's our ActBlue page if you need it: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.25.2023_LA_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.25.2023_LA_all&amount=25]
We're currently making major budgeting decisions, so a missed goal will likely mean that we'll need to scale back our game plan. With so much on the line for our Commonwealth this year -- it's a chance none of us want to take.
By the end of Tuesday, we're hoping to get at least $4,500 in the door to stay on track with our strategy.
Anything you're able to contribute would be greatly appreciated!
Thanks again,
-Finance Team
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.21.2023_LA_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_2.21.2023_LA_all&amount=25]

name: Democratic Party of Georgia
subject: Humbly asking for your help to defeat Georgia extremism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59248497/393690703/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzZlZTNjZC00ZWI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ngy0F87VccJwIMLPRIh7ndbMgqnDr9sijfmrpLlGymQ=&emci=ec54796b-69b4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=e76ee3cd-4eb5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter– we need your help.

We have a plan to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene’s extremism – but it’s going to be challenging.

In 2020, Marjorie Taylor Greene won her district by nearly 50 points.

In 2022, we narrowed that gap, _**but she still won by nearly 32 points.**_ And since Republicans won the House, they put her on some of the most important committees.

We’re closing the gap, but it’s clear that if we want to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene’s extremism, _**we’ll have to flip the entire House and remove her from her congressional committees.**_

_[**So we’re humbly asking for your support. We have our end of month deadline coming up in just a couple days, and if we want to flip control of the House and remove Marjorie Taylor Greene from her powerful committees, we need to not just hit our goal – we have to blow it out of the water. name: Team Jazz
subject: Shh! Tomorrow is Jazz's birthday
body:
Hi there, tomorrow is Jazz's birthday.

To celebrate, we are surprising him with a digital birthday card from as many of his supporters as we can get! We hope you’ll take a moment to sign Jazz’s birthday card. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/qt2S_Be79UiThW6Xe91f9g2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/qt2S_Be79UiThW6Xe91f9g2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/qt2S_Be79UiThW6Xe91f9g2]

Every year, Jazz’s birthday falls in one of the busiest times during the legislative session so he often doesn’t get time to celebrate. That’s why we are reaching out to all his friends, family, and supporters to make sure he knows how much we appreciate his work fighting for us - for smaller class sizes, affordable housing, and tax credits for working families.

Don’t forget to sign the card! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/qt2S_Be79UiThW6Xe91f9g2]

In solidarity,

Team Jazz

As a proven progressive leader and champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.
by authority Friends of Jazz Lewis, Chris Taitt, Treasurer
Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account
P.O. Box 341854
Bethesda, MD 20827
United States

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In the past few months, we’ve helped our newest Justice Democrats take
their seats in Congress, launched candidate recruitment, and officially
started our work for the upcoming election cycle. That’s because our work
is nonstop — we work year-round to keep building the momentum for our
movement.

Now, two months into 2023, we’re digging into our finances to make sure we
can sustain all of our planned programs through 2024. To be honest, we
could be doing a lot better,
Peter. But with your support, we
can turn this ship around and reach our February fundraising goal.

We took a look at our records to see what we have on file for you. Does
this look right?

Peter: Official
2023 Supporter Record

Remember, everything we do comes down to the support we get from folks
like you, chipping in when you can. Our grassroots base sustains our work
and allows us to continue to transform the Democratic Party cycle after
cycle.

Thanks for everything you do for our movement,

Team JD

name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I know this race won’t be easy, but my fight for working families isn’t done yet.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59249404/393693604/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230225-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjNDZkNmZiLTUyYjUtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6yuAkj6CT1JnmI39g4O7AwpqEST2F3ewGpLNHo0RJ4w=)

I’m not like most of my colleagues, and it’s not too hard to spot the differences. I’m the only working farmer in the U.S. Senate, and damn proud of it. My wife Sharla and I still work the very same land my grandparents farmed more than 100 years ago.

They didn’t know the meaning of the word "quit." And neither do I. Our work in the Senate is not done. That’s why I’m running.

It won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell and his allies see me as a top target in their fight to take back the Senate — they’re already running ads attacking me. I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection right now, and experts are rating my race as a toss-up. But I know how to win tough fights. **I’ve done it before as one of the only Democrats in a red state to win in 2018 — and I’ll do it again.**

[_**I can’t do it without your support, Peter. Can I count on you to step up and become a Founding Donor of my reelection campaign today so I can get back to work fighting for regular folks like you and me?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59249411/393693611/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230225-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjNDZkNmZiLTUyYjUtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6yuAkj6CT1JnmI39g4O7AwpqEST2F3ewGpLNHo0RJ4w=)

I first ran for office because I didn’t see anyone sticking up for dirt farmers like me. In the years since, I’ve demanded that Washington work for the people, fought to get veterans the health care they’ve earned, and ensured Montanans have someone defending our values in the United States Senate.

**And that’s exactly what I’ll continue to do when I’m reelected.**

It’s been the honor of my life to represent Montana families in the United States Senate. I’m fired up and excited for the road ahead, and I’m grateful to have you by my side through it all.

Thanks,

Jon

name: Bennett, Team Rick Scott
subject: I’m proud to be on this team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
| | Let me take a minute to introduce myself.

My name is Bennett, and I’ve spent the past year working with Rick Scott’s campaign team.

Peter, working with Rick has been an incredible honor.

When I started my career, I knew I didn’t just want to work for anyone with an “R” next to their name: I wanted to stand with a REAL conservative who wasn’t afraid to take on the hard policy fights with bold ideas and real solutions.

In the past few months, I’ve seen Rick exhibit bravery against the Washington insiders as few politicians have in recent history, and right now, he needs our backup.

**Our end-of-month deadline is just three days away, and Rick needs our help to meet this critical goal for his re-election campaign in Florida.[Can you rush a contribution to our team ASAP to help Senator Rick Scott? ](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=78ac38647e7f4e84955c9a1fcc80ca0f&_e=TyM4d_s1cEccxutzor2osMfk1LMn5niR0rCsLM5_yXaEeAKWVKKn2s3PdY0B5MfMEuQ5uWKi_eVJEyGOdVMNz5TdrLnUjqXUmCrU-EIaaA46iDdCy0i-VC0ZSZ72AYXSH9H_nnLk8nqeOgyVU4nuo4nmFJhBWF1Qd_5wDU4XWgmSlKJzCNUpg-wfmFLioevR9AaGcF-1gozbmOuwmHBN59NARVkIxWlVqcEmcEOObLeXl_hVb6MMfM0zFO_8lwbL8cvkIEEdyprD-rCpRDI4oBKnOyaQeWfZRq6z6UaJV1-e174EMQLJ23PQFSezBab4xQ2nB9Ep6b1wylPHHf_fbzVekCvVPZjuNTtdPiG1K1VV764PK8tjGVTHd5-9gJQE)**

| | **_These deadlines are important._**

clean_body: | | | = Friend, in all my time in politics, I've never seen the Republican Party as batsht as it is today! From attacking reproductive rights to attempting to overturn the results of the 2020 election, the GOP we know today is extreme and dangerous. = | | = Defeating Republicans won't be easy, but it starts with: Protecting our razor-thin Senate majority so we can continue passing legislation that benefits all Americans. Taking back the House so we can stop Republicans from pushing their extreme agenda and taking away our rights. Winning the 2024 presidential election to show the GOP that we are prepared to fight back, and we won't let Republicans undermine our democracy. American Bridge is working hard every day to make all of these things a reality. Holding Republicans accountable is what we do. But we have a long road ahead of us, and we need your help NOW or we're gonna be in a helluva lot of trouble when 2024 rolls around. Friend, we're hoping to raise $7,500 by midnight to make sure we have the early investments we need to win in 2023, 2024 and beyond. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you. – Carville | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by AB PAC. name: Yolanda Bejarano, AZ Dems
subject: My first month as chair
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | Help me flip Arizona completely blue | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xYrNg2gWMU1Kno2AMHtpMThfQgRcZKoUrhqJovobbuWwaYx_ecU2B4J8Hx_okAsNtNpgq52aiAPA3OpgbAkIxiDw_xLRlqRi7kW1LZI0Job19-wUTYiLfdNB7V0uU1xJKWeX4ai7fl0AikYHyudTT820oSJQUcY2EsSLyHIc7qlxzUXdXr3usGq9q4pPNavKtIkRY0RGjd1JRYj3-5KdAiByY9SykrgHvsmHGXHjCCY51RIJ-az3uqu_v6CtHYMNBXaVYhE_885MLFdudUqvlv40QnaPS8eZ8QuMumYQ4koUsrf2TW9KKcyjxLAKNlxY5OMlZgMzgtQwOtBURvPd6DVOPfMKsdz5xHlDTYpGr_ozT80u3pgC8gL0QAp4YvRFq30yWG3t_fbpNgpRVC19NI/3u0/mh91MVcDS92ECFGbCJ1X5A/h0/BMjPUxsYclYZn0beBfqjDhfzcgR01Pysrp73iDJbNOs)

---
| Team,

In a few days, I’ll officially have completed my first month as chair of the Arizona Democratic Party!

It’s an exciting time for me, and for our party. We have enormous momentum coming off wins in the last few election cycles. I also know those wins were built off early and constant organizing work. It took building up resources early in the election cycle to make sure voters heard from us before Election Day, and that our party was holding the AZ GOP accountable.

**My goal as chair is to continue to build off these wins in 2024 – finally flipping the Arizona legislature, winning back Congressional seats to help Democrats regain control of the U.S. House of Representatives, and making sure we elect a Democrat to the Senate.**

All of that requires investing __right now.__

**[Team, we need to raise $5,000 by the end of my first month as chair to be on track to accomplish our goals this election cycle. name: Lauren Williams, Democrats.org
subject: re: February fundraising
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
I'll keep it short: Our February fundraising numbers are not where they should be. We already missed last month's goal, so we need everyone on this team to step up so we don't continue to fall behind. | |
---
Derek, I have some not-so-great news to share about our fundraising:
* We _missed_ our end-of-month goal in January. We were close, but ultimately we fell short.
* February is the shortest month of the year, so we have even less time to reach our goal this month.

clean_body: I'll keep it short: Our February fundraising numbers are not where they should be. We already missed last month's goal, so we need everyone on this team to step up so we don't continue to fall behind. | | Derek, I have some not-so-great news to share about our fundraising: We missed our end-of-month goal in January. We were close, but ultimately we fell short. February is the shortest month of the year, so we have even less time to reach our goal this month. With only three days left, we still haven’t hit our goal yet, and I know it’d mean a lot to President Biden and Vice President Harris if you donated $7 right now. There is some good news though, Derek. The DNC is largely funded by grassroots donors coming together and investing their hard-earned money to help reach goals just like this one. And that money directly powers campaigns and state parties, funds innovative organizing and voter protection efforts, and invests in state-of-the-art data and technology infrastructure that we need to win elections. We still have a bit of time to make up ground, but it’s going to take your commitment ahead of Tuesday’s deadline. So, what do you say, Derek -- are you in? Lauren Lauren Williams Deputy Chief Mobilization Officer, Grassroots Fundraising Democratic National Committee P.S. 98% of donations to the DNC come from grassroots donors just like yourself, investing $7 or whatever they can for the party they support. name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: This is absurd, and it has to end
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
Members of Congress are involved in decisions that can affect the entire U.S. economy — and they're also allowed to trade stocks??

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59269458/393700201/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_220225ST_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTY3ZTljNS02NWI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TPAEAHqaIT3Ant0Y3aHeZJUh4fN-96NmLIlPu6T5_oQ=)
---
We send representatives to Congress to represent the interests of the people. But that's hard to make a reality when so many avenues remain open that allow for members to use their positions for personal financial gain.

One such area is stock trading. With members of Congress involved in decisions that can affect the entire U.S. economy, allowing them to trade stocks opens the door for major conflicts of interest.

[**Will you join me and add your name to help us ban members of Congress from trading stocks? We need to show those who want to keep gaming the system that we're not backing down.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59269459/393700202/1831287679?ms=EM_PET_220225ST_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_220225ST_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTY3ZTljNS02NWI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TPAEAHqaIT3Ant0Y3aHeZJUh4fN-96NmLIlPu6T5_oQ=&emci=d548a902-3fb5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d967e9c5-65b5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=32654120) [Add Your Name ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59269460/393700203/1831287679?ms=EM_PET_220225ST_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_220225ST_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTY3ZTljNS02NWI1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TPAEAHqaIT3Ant0Y3aHeZJUh4fN-96NmLIlPu6T5_oQ=&emci=d548a902-3fb5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d967e9c5-65b5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=32654120) Last year, the special interests got their way and blocked a Congressional stock trading ban. But I can tell you that one defeat doesn't have to be the end of the story.

We were counted out so many times before we finally passed legislation that lowered prescription drug prices — over the massive and pricey opposition of Big Pharma. And just as we overcame the special interests then, we must do it again here.

There's a renewed effort in the House _right now_ to ban members from stock trading. It has bipartisan support, and if we keep the call to action alive, **it has a chance of becoming law.**

Honesty and transparency in government are essential in a functioning democracy, and that's why I'm proud to take on the special interests. But I need supporters like you behind me.

[**If you agree that those in Congress shouldn't be able to trade stocks, add your name today. clean_body: Members of Congress are involved in decisions that can affect the entire U.S. economy — and they're also allowed to trade stocks?? = We send representatives to Congress to represent the interests of the people. But that's hard to make a reality when so many avenues remain open that allow for members to use their positions for personal financial gain. One such area is stock trading. With members of Congress involved in decisions that can affect the entire U.S. economy, allowing them to trade stocks opens the door for major conflicts of interest. Last year, the special interests got their way and blocked a Congressional stock trading ban. But I can tell you that one defeat doesn't have to be the end of the story. We were counted out so many times before we finally passed legislation that lowered prescription drug prices — over the massive and pricey opposition of Big Pharma. And just as we overcame the special interests then, we must do it again here. There's a renewed effort in the House right now to ban members from stock trading. It has bipartisan support, and if we keep the call to action alive, it has a chance of becoming law. Honesty and transparency in government are essential in a functioning democracy, and that's why I'm proud to take on the special interests. But I need supporters like you behind me. Thank you, Jennifer | Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America. **=** Paid for by Wexton for Congress Wexton for Congress PO Box 650550 Sterling, VA 20165 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .
